name: Steve Friend
subject: Thanks to Kash, I stood up to the Deep State
body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3f1828dbfd0f43c79ab009d1e0e521ca&_e=_Itfk3qRVnLEyMF2wQDITg2P6De0UL97jTaFb-YFj1qAcBHoiUuhpzu6Z1yLX8K1LakR2OYJaXQxBcCuKOKQ1XO2QRTcoVXw4KJiJCuR4vAMCDZJdDxIBmGJ_JpycobEbhHB8pxI2Exav6HBoCikXWVT3nq7fEw2Tmmv3s9NmBDT1izWO-LkHrZ8RrIVxhqpBh4ugL6hdZGV-KijVQpLIahjXkOJDpmW-r3YOY74KKEe1I47RbTHTfu5d7rSMll0wt7lpIgcDTPI1NAZZ8tyyaayOw5DeSOeL7tVfQ1wKDQWHR181o1v3LRCpYfct3Re3G44CDUD7krBBAGMuDjN7A%3D%3D)

Peter,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3f1828dbfd0f43c79ab009d1e0e521ca&_e=_Itfk3qRVnLEyMF2wQDITg2P6De0UL97jTaFb-YFj1qAcBHoiUuhpzu6Z1yLX8K1LakR2OYJaXQxBcCuKOKQ1XO2QRTcoVXw4KJiJCuR4vAMCDZJdDxIBmGJ_JpycobEbhHB8pxI2Exav6HBoCikXbcu2uaUJX3lsaHC82iUzRVs8mYruUN3iR2QLkOKuXPMcm2O09xYQpQHNcCCb-zFRwBrEBQts3ed16BrbODt8bv0SPT7-G79ML2WLFHZi058LbpZYgXw8qv19HhRK8V6j9ko8Ca5rJRUr1EOvWYJnEYo-bbPfOOn-2v7BKsi5mG-Do3iHYONILAQduI2Vub67HL4uXeVBJn1NOhlJCSL7P8%3D)

[Donate](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3f1828dbfd0f43c79ab009d1e0e521ca&_e=_Itfk3qRVnLEyMF2wQDITg2P6De0UL97jTaFb-YFj1qAcBHoiUuhpzu6Z1yLX8K1LakR2OYJaXQxBcCuKOKQ1XO2QRTcoVXw4KJiJCuR4vAMCDZJdDxIBmGJ_JpycobEbhHB8pxI2Exav6HBoCikXfHVsS6QX3cvn-hbX_6gQqK7dT4lm25fQ1oWKrYJSA1C7A7M0SO6SYxD7Cmy-f0TyFM1hZVLk1lyHYWUinLvbe-35AwoGe4mEHy6Q3ghPb7IPT1bdf21lrBwi02JPNgA2mCfk5UOsj9yZ_LcmBrlpO2cZ7jbEVSTc3l1TMCpEpbeCuGtm-X34GnEwCtxOYNQv1VErvty12crWv05jKWju-w%3D)

I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3f1828dbfd0f43c79ab009d1e0e521ca&_e=_Itfk3qRVnLEyMF2wQDITg2P6De0UL97jTaFb-YFj1qAcBHoiUuhpzu6Z1yLX8K1LakR2OYJaXQxBcCuKOKQ1XO2QRTcoVXw4KJiJCuR4vAMCDZJdDxIBmGJ_JpycobEbhHB8pxI2Exav6HBoCikXRqeb2AkvrVf3RhX908QaobT7qidjpNrNwEYVNKQphtkPdMk7bouR2PnXaK_GanxOzT35vTjo9DpkfksDyzTpBSg9lVwPfZ8b67bZNuMNHQsOj0fcsgSstjl5vtNMHzlVjXHdqqroSiHzWuJavcnxK7hX9I0Nt7o1UkCpUB9MJTuhdTzgNfkKOamFzYn85gQPkuaPUtSAlxwUH3OUluq9rY%3D)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

**The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O 'Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.**

Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State.

[Donate $10](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3f1828dbfd0f43c79ab009d1e0e521ca&_e=_Itfk3qRVnLEyMF2wQDITg2P6De0UL97jTaFb-YFj1qAcBHoiUuhpzu6Z1yLX8K1LakR2OYJaXQxBcCuKOKQ1XO2QRTcoVXw4KJiJCuR4vAMCDZJdDxIBmGJ_JpycobEbhHB8pxI2Exav6HBoCikXd6LcmDlOyDO5wGcB-2L0zy5D-K4MRYTw5-XbX0wwWyLLEJvxZExUf0NjMvDwA5_OPewtGQmlPC1jENZDupSBlXrZXBqYKNQJNO_a6odNViUxOXvqg3RjoSSAF92X1C99j7cMqeHNyXujRwcLO-DDtWBepBqsfhogvWPba4JM3jLfSVreca7itHuzTBuIkyksev7IsiFmAmrseqIa2fKf_Y%3D)

clean_body: Peter, Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic. When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something. In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office. My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath.However, it nearly cost me everything. Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions. To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State. I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking. Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment. I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI. At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk. I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions. The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger. Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty. I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back. The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth. In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign. Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at The New York Times. The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family. Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys. But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government. The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O 'Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes. Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State. Thank you, Steve Friend The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to The Kash Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Learn from Victor Davis Hanson

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=340d659fb8bc43c78c4fb1f2f138cbc0&_e=g0NV-ZaLavL7oE5qgGKpMjit8Su0OHJY21UKGJBXd1vr3Bn--sAyVvTU6nvBBgLVbt-C4fYxdf2_deuCUVxGOEG0YD5pu5aYgIF40-EaGXJHfwmpUDUHpD1-gqdER0IPZAYraW95OUnxOlF6X4-E8nopuPBbtfOJiQIhhhu_9N_3IlLVFcxpJOy-zWwKJl4yxB6MKPfSYnAUbUpJ6s7sYvG-rtcvd3ykYLZBjJJ3J6RhM_wZVZt6aMkk2O1_SThkFp2S1PNXK-qrkx6N5-IN33bCdDN6vccdjSUKHjNgUaq6BPpETIy74hKpySECI-uhCRzZFeL-LbBPvsKX9h21Tc6JgSmc6_mKU5_DlkWy9W2G-zANrKo0UgGeojGu0KDz9bU3aQJ6xem7chIoNaaDCPzx6iPBI5vyHx__yXu_e55UtkRdJCPt6-STbGJDgSQg)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=340d659fb8bc43c78c4fb1f2f138cbc0&_e=g0NV-ZaLavL7oE5qgGKpMjit8Su0OHJY21UKGJBXd1vr3Bn--sAyVvTU6nvBBgLVbt-C4fYxdf2_deuCUVxGOEG0YD5pu5aYgIF40-EaGXJHfwmpUDUHpD1-gqdER0IPZAYraW95OUnxOlF6X4-E8nopuPBbtfOJiQIhhhu_9N_3IlLVFcxpJOy-zWwKJl4yxB6MKPfSYnAUbUpJ6s7sYvG-rtcvd3ykYLZBjJJ3J6RhM_wZVZt6aMkk2O1_SThkFp2S1PNXK-qrkx6N5-IN34JdmjGdNV47b4BodxmMESgbMTmyCQtxOHOYQL8s5pArmMVg_oMubJfgKma_fZad-YSC0PRrCE_v8oaDsivKzp8qk6yVBU_YTo5WPb_d9Ka2T8VZwel2hS50C38xXsyBMPFtqeFHYrh9FbVRwKY9_r4lo6ubbyx7qzhbQFC3gW4e)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=340d659fb8bc43c78c4fb1f2f138cbc0&_e=g0NV-ZaLavL7oE5qgGKpMjit8Su0OHJY21UKGJBXd1vr3Bn--sAyVvTU6nvBBgLVbt-C4fYxdf2_deuCUVxGOEG0YD5pu5aYgIF40-EaGXJHfwmpUDUHpD1-gqdER0IPZAYraW95OUnxOlF6X4-E8nopuPBbtfOJiQIhhhu_9N_3IlLVFcxpJOy-zWwKJl4yxB6MKPfSYnAUbUpJ6s7sYvG-rtcvd3ykYLZBjJJ3J6RhM_wZVZt6aMkk2O1_SThkFp2S1PNXK-qrkx6N5-IN3wSgJov1Ire92n4UHwiTrB26And_8dUVigg-zlU5eSdjSWNUfY4rIg8BRafev8nYUx8qonmuWsh7tX7Qfdt3br_eyXgQ1Wp00_sjB4JAjpDeRjTmVCJ71Rqfs-fO-RlhmUStzm65qXIrOPl5WYITPtpSYHPddsvwGFoYXLGCegkP) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Grid operator says Texas is better prepared for extreme cold this winter,** " Texas Tribune's **Kayla Guo** -- "Texas' grid operator warned that the state should prepare for extreme cold this winter but said the state's main power grid is better equipped than in previous years to withstand a powerful winter storm.

At a board meeting on Tuesday, officials from the Electric Reliability Council of Texas said that while winter presented a greater risk of outages, new power generation added to the grid in the past year has lowered the probability that extreme cold will trigger emergency conditions.

ERCOT meteorologist **Chris Coleman 's** [forecast predicted](https://substack.com/redirect/0cf67285-f17a-421f-a662-31f6bee86bc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) above normal temperatures this winter, but a "greater-than-average" chance of extreme cold events.

Extreme cold events have occurred more frequently in recent years, he said, despite abnormally warm temperatures overall in Texas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/0a5143fc-bb10-4560-b498-d9ccbf45f016?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Scientists agree that climate change is causing more extreme weather. But the phrase "climate change" did not appear in any of the presentations at the ERCOT meeting.

Coleman's presentation to the board said 2023 and 2024 are poised to become the hottest years on record in Texas.

"You can have a warm winter in Texas and have a cold extreme, and that's becoming more frequent," he said. "Five of the last eight winters, we've had temperatures that met those thresholds."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/0a5143fc-bb10-4560-b498-d9ccbf45f016?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Coleman's forecast said ocean temperatures, atmospheric patterns, soil moisture and other measures this year closely resemble those of 2021. In February 2021, Winter Storm Uri brought days of freezing temperatures that crashed the state's grid, knocked out power and heat to millions of Texans and led to nearly 250 deaths." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/335cb26a-9c6d-489f-9254-31c260ef43fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Grid operator says Texas is better prepared for extreme cold this winter, " Texas Tribune's Kayla Guo -- "Texas' grid operator warned that the state should prepare for extreme cold this winter but said the state's main power grid is better equipped than in previous years to withstand a powerful winter storm. At a board meeting on Tuesday, officials from the Electric Reliability Council of Texas said that while winter presented a greater risk of outages, new power generation added to the grid in the past year has lowered the probability that extreme cold will trigger emergency conditions. ERCOT meteorologist Chris Coleman 's above normal temperatures this winter, but a "greater-than-average" chance of extreme cold events. Extreme cold events have occurred more frequently in recent years, he said, despite abnormally warm temperatures overall in Texas. Scientists agree that climate change is causing more extreme weather. But the phrase "climate change" did not appear in any of the presentations at the ERCOT meeting. Coleman's presentation to the board said 2023 and 2024 are poised to become the hottest years on record in Texas. "You can have a warm winter in Texas and have a cold extreme, and that's becoming more frequent," he said. "Five of the last eight winters, we've had temperatures that met those thresholds." Coleman's forecast said ocean temperatures, atmospheric patterns, soil moisture and other measures this year closely resemble those of 2021. In February 2021, Winter Storm Uri brought days of freezing temperatures that crashed the state's grid, knocked out power and heat to millions of Texans and led to nearly 250 deaths." "**Grid operator says Texas is better prepared for extreme cold this winter,** " Texas Tribune's **Kayla Guo** -- "Texas' grid operator warned that the state should prepare for extreme cold this winter but said the state's main power grid is better equipped than in previous years to withstand a powerful winter storm.

At a board meeting on Tuesday, officials from the Electric Reliability Council of Texas said that while winter presented a greater risk of outages, new power generation added to the grid in the past year has lowered the probability that extreme cold will trigger emergency conditions.

ERCOT meteorologist **Chris Coleman 's** [forecast predicted](https://substack.com/redirect/179d35f3-b9d2-4910-a611-c2fdd4714199?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) above normal temperatures this winter, but a "greater-than-average" chance of extreme cold events.

Extreme cold events have occurred more frequently in recent years, he said, despite abnormally warm temperatures overall in Texas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/d6a04bb1-5398-47ee-a5b8-b07452faa8fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Scientists agree that climate change is causing more extreme weather. But the phrase "climate change" did not appear in any of the presentations at the ERCOT meeting.

Coleman's presentation to the board said 2023 and 2024 are poised to become the hottest years on record in Texas.

"You can have a warm winter in Texas and have a cold extreme, and that's becoming more frequent," he said. "Five of the last eight winters, we've had temperatures that met those thresholds."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/d6a04bb1-5398-47ee-a5b8-b07452faa8fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Coleman's forecast said ocean temperatures, atmospheric patterns, soil moisture and other measures this year closely resemble those of 2021. In February 2021, Winter Storm Uri brought days of freezing temperatures that crashed the state's grid, knocked out power and heat to millions of Texans and led to nearly 250 deaths." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/69f1b4f2-897f-47b6-be3b-df55eb0cdcb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/a3323b0d2e57dabb/?utm_campaign=20241127&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I
dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.

To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up
_EVERYTHING_ I own – including my dignity.

That’s why I have OFFICIALLY APPEALED this outrageous ruling that
would leave me on the streets.

As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the
Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater
“heavenly treasures” await us.

Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_
more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen
and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”

AND WHEN I SEE THAT TWO OF THE RIGGED CASES BROUGHT AGAINST PRESIDENT
TRUMP HAVE NOW BEEN DISMISSED AND “DELAYED INDEFINITELY,” I HAVE
HOPE THAT I CAN WIN MINE TOO!

_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until
justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind
souls like you, Friend._

Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so
family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give
if you can’t!

BUT IF YOU CAN FUND MY BATTLE TO APPEAL THIS UNJUST RULING, PLEASE

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46843116623d48248df94f58f7bd0260&_e=XTlolqx4gNL1I02XmP5eYUnIK7Ol59A332-VEMxww2qHFV59CDhtYet15FyrRW1_2BDMQ5c8bAbT00TIcuDRMvkUq-Bdc_HFiSyN9faiYALVsEMWKdp4oM0RuaD1-oZVTCg4QErD8U2kGzILln8Pm5WHiBiLlpwPPsizP_VKv4B-aM86RqA3OhbQgsk4pAW0CZ3SeDsd7hfz_Sdye48oFrBIUDEquyBXDDRcQHIS5j3_db-h-w3n6LgzhCnybFjzdip4iYr-H0McUGLUbvtCSr3mlvvAaH1iXeJkH5vrz6UBfyop7PlyUma99tUnW0f_Xy2fePxCq3-oJUjfkSf9lXaRVgZlSoU-5ZrjOC9hT5gvrKtJ51_nQbiavkB6Lc_y8Lh4O8EhTmS2tJPgFWqZoQ%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46843116623d48248df94f58f7bd0260&_e=XTlolqx4gNL1I02XmP5eYUnIK7Ol59A332-VEMxww2qHFV59CDhtYet15FyrRW1_2BDMQ5c8bAbT00TIcuDRMvkUq-Bdc_HFiSyN9faiYALVsEMWKdp4oM0RuaD1-oZVTCg4QErD8U2kGzILln8Pm5WHiBiLlpwPPsizP_VKv4B-aM86RqA3OhbQgsk4pAW0CZ3SeDsd7hfz_Sdye48oFrBIUDEquyBXDDRcQHIS5j3_db-h-w3n6LgzhCnybFjzgLq9DoCn7l-XEXutxBPmmxaLN3KyB0yJlUQgY_pcaQnfa69QLvw-yCsS_F9k4JhEI9toLZ_6UB5IfJ3GDlDkw_Xw7-sb93B-5O1_V2W1YnJWxw0DilMVQxgnAa_Ovygn7ZchvTzBw9wFVKi2zX6l0Q%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46843116623d48248df94f58f7bd0260&_e=XTlolqx4gNL1I02XmP5eYUnIK7Ol59A332-VEMxww2qHFV59CDhtYet15FyrRW1_2BDMQ5c8bAbT00TIcuDRMvkUq-Bdc_HFiSyN9faiYALVsEMWKdp4oM0RuaD1-oZVTCg4QErD8U2kGzILln8Pm5WHiBiLlpwPPsizP_VKv4B-aM86RqA3OhbQgsk4pAW0CZ3SeDsd7hfz_Sdye48oFrBIUDEquyBXDDRcQHIS5j3_db-h-w3n6LgzhCnybFjzLI9jW-B_bh0RpMs72l2S-_gD69o-wvcW4BQ7NRVUT3JDR64dgAIIlQfC3EHA42WV_UA-O8uCXXYBrhP_EXWUvoWVemIbEe_hNC7WMhy__WetbeDa2pZbH3vR5_Hu5SnYCaTDImHYaJOuHiagz_v50A%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46843116623d48248df94f58f7bd0260&_e=XTlolqx4gNL1I02XmP5eYUnIK7Ol59A332-VEMxww2qHFV59CDhtYet15FyrRW1_2BDMQ5c8bAbT00TIcuDRMvkUq-Bdc_HFiSyN9faiYALVsEMWKdp4oM0RuaD1-oZVTCg4QErD8U2kGzILln8Pm5WHiBiLlpwPPsizP_VKv4B-aM86RqA3OhbQgsk4pAW0CZ3SeDsd7hfz_Sdye48oFrBIUDEquyBXDDRcQHIS5j3_db-h-w3n6LgzhCnybFjzi83M87fDn991uPzAxUlJQkK1B4GAW5z7Ik_qaJkQTvgEAllHmYHV-39v4dj8HkkOGsHnMpeVsWxmkW9F2Md9P2LZd4hYysPRnUnn5J-nRHqAwjFTuHZgu6X79p2cI0gaTxS7_zDoP8HKXSfOIHb6mw%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=46843116623d48248df94f58f7bd0260&_e=XTlolqx4gNL1I02XmP5eYUnIK7Ol59A332-VEMxww2qHFV59CDhtYet15FyrRW1_2BDMQ5c8bAbT00TIcuDRMvkUq-Bdc_HFiSyN9faiYALVsEMWKdp4oM0RuaD1-oZVTCg4QErD8U2kGzILln8Pm5WHiBiLlpwPPsizP_VKv4B-aM86RqA3OhbQgsk4pAW0CZ3SeDsd7hfz_Sdye48oFrBIUDEquyBXDDRcQHIS5j3_db-h-w3n6LgzhCnybFjzehlIBxuQhJhoUKXLof5z1gC2qTWVm2fDnh5vOwoqybUCpJNO-o5XhG3zG6LmLfXS-sqOw1RJ9NJfg23vYVTqBoEwiYLNYf4HBRkvSkges_AmThHwdmQ1NuAb0OVMZ5i8kEsiXZDnDDEJe85vSoBNTA%3D%3D)

**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**

|

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Stand with me and fight back against the radical transgender movement
body:
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. | |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aDGiqE8GOl4TYcXcbTeKWjTOaFgMhAoJSvM9Y9z24uF-TrJFqqTKCW87wutAjjkzqwFIBmnOsXD23Ima0VLN9YAWPJhRljG08OGM1dJJZdOIWxujLZhgjbeQLImFqVd6Ccq34ib_VnIyx1t3_UmL_SOQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aD6v5kD3ITdR2RrJ2OjMJbrs1-z1PwI5UIyp6rcsefSCyTfmXOeXeXDEiEnaYpP-zAhO7s-2exNZReOoo1dZDyp3dXjmc1TkmnLeQi9iJCbVWcW6aA7b0keZI42pSoETZNPGG-HKJ-DfPs7ozxNKDYZg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aD0el1w43yQFEvpTXHnxP3wJP65HbsHiB8bovwaRYIzZLleUtAG1UWQJ2XUK5tOwcucf2VtSvAPC4r3yOowUxYappGHhWymfGGB4P_ZW8iZFlX6pXYInUnDzXe742An63bR-jqw0bgPbDHyN3174xLEw%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aDijKB5j---Acf5SrfMDDtLVpL0MVBvVtlqz2mO55jU_KfOZmfF2HMJnunyYg4Ql-OPuPNvXqHACg7oiUiRv1bozqMW_7uMJFx0FIqQDWY5g6VjBgYb1RkoHCPRwn1skhrfgR2d54nMA-Eg343erwRMQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aD6nhmdvQ1pKKZ8C44TzjkRHLmtQJMV4qU5Q0w0GbvOlYOwCcVQqBFM4GBeFh6BdhOVH9lwTk4XT2wkTytcl9RESEC3HZKYQNBViBV8ITlZgSy2Ti2D_F3rY8EpO15v-kebp6flkkouL_x8CKicj65xg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aD_9LkNPLSEtmEyZjJU2mEaS6-mwqnMfhABDeQJmpZ5kmGfbIRpZWwc4BuhuNkkJa1p-NRvrvRvoCTi0MObf2Up37QmHV89Szfu05cqBPB4ZzRj-hWRyPUIWKmLAMmrGPZTk9uQey4INcbvvq8N2xIhg%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aDJVKfwXcW0CkOCB18mNSksLxO2q0n2sY9Rljb2CtrymyOk2jCEQGNwc_QqmGp3My2T4HhdhIG4suE81Ww1oiHqWX1z_6yXJVu_eNueANgb9-T2cdG9-3KsWx5E5pC_b33OVQwew9Y5nLDwoHR1m9ttg%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!

Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aDR2nBiPjLibLTPd4C1ZdSSqTW9NezwhUwnLANN_dzg6s84yEVduzYA2X1bVV12AndU8yDEjFDUnXcrmTI7GEDLHeNoVVMXgZsHP9b710Nskyy5nv2PaLU9eqzIDcywaDwypTxtp0_ce-bTCChRZ8vZA%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6df8cf83293246b8afc709dc856a5da1&_e=8Ui57W-aPaSeo6lHn97B8RyAj5xlG31I-qK3BPDXPWTXcKNam30A5svEIu_UQt2a01a81YjYzVwiXsoFcrh4gaM57iLE6WTg0Ymqfbo2UQ2OBUl1J20SvFlNSdOPPSE5ppFQJqmpRdW56o6VJj4Nr3HIKGIZEChFZzPMUAfGWGYTRfy6R1ZSlDKklF4YatCECHsW__nd0wrNYVbOiRwXwIkgn2ZBliK0EgQCLB9k45fMNGsuwQMxkMUR54IGU-aDAsR_s_9wRoa-h0Q8SVLcX2PFdGzG7_gC6ffidhk3wStLJlGiRkTysafNUoIy7Z3fcfKa5R9S06HKMN2hOCiGuyfuy6yW_cH9PslxtoHGQiqbPtY2N2e7HQXR59mOoOdyrWItTyOiEYPnk8qc_wnYaQ%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. name: Dr. Maxine Dexter
subject: I promise to listen with empathy and resolve.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98181117/515867009/577006200?amount=25&refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY2YTM4YTQtYWNiMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jtBOTRWXYWnG8WBFurWeNfpKwC21nRYa6R44kly2Hu0=)
Hi Peter,

This election outcome is deeply painful, and the consequences we face will be real and far-reaching. We know what Right-wing extremists are determined to do and the lengths they’ll go to achieve it. But we will fight back.

The fight ahead won’t be easy, and we won’t win every battle. But we must try—because our neighbors are counting on us.

Over 1,173,064 Oregonians voted to protect the right to choose, for an economy that works for the middle class, and to defend our democracy. Those voices will not be ignored.

To move forward, passionate and engaged Americans like you are one of the last guardrails protecting our values. I was elected to Congress to be your advocate, and I promise to fight every day to deliver for you.

[**Today I want to give you a space to share. Please, Peter, tell me what you think. You can tell me what you think my legislative priorities should be, about problems in your communities, or just vent about the election. I promise to listen with empathy and resolve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98181118/515867010/445750432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY2YTM4YTQtYWNiMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jtBOTRWXYWnG8WBFurWeNfpKwC21nRYa6R44kly2Hu0=&emci=26456e1c-eeb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9f6a38a4-acb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338)
****[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98181119/515867011/445750432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY2YTM4YTQtYWNiMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jtBOTRWXYWnG8WBFurWeNfpKwC21nRYa6R44kly2Hu0=&emci=26456e1c-eeb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9f6a38a4-acb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338)****
---
Extremists want nothing more than to see us defeated, divided, or disheartened. They know that if we turn on each other or step away from this work, their path becomes easier. I won’t let that happen. Together, we can build a stronger, more connected community—one that proves what unites us is far more powerful than anything that seeks to divide us.

We’ve faced uphill battles before. When the odds seemed stacked against us, we came together and made history. Think of the grassroots movements that rose up to protect healthcare during Trump’s presidency or the record-breaking turnout that reclaimed the House in 2018. Those victories weren’t easy, but they showed the strength we have when we fight together.

Take the time you need to rest and process—lean on those who inspire and uplift you. When you’re ready, know that I’ll be standing with you, ready to keep fighting for justice, equity, and a better future.

Every day, I’ll fight for the values that matter to all of us. As your Congresswoman, I’ll stand as a strong defender of our democracy and a tireless advocate for the Oregon we know we can build together.

In solidarity,
Dr. Maxine Dexter
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98181120/515867012/829186069?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY2YTM4YTQtYWNiMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jtBOTRWXYWnG8WBFurWeNfpKwC21nRYa6R44kly2Hu0=&emci=26456e1c-eeb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9f6a38a4-acb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98181121/515867013/-1852105559?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY2YTM4YTQtYWNiMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jtBOTRWXYWnG8WBFurWeNfpKwC21nRYa6R44kly2Hu0=&emci=26456e1c-eeb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9f6a38a4-acb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98181122/515867014/-872485808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk5MDQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY2YTM4YTQtYWNiMi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jtBOTRWXYWnG8WBFurWeNfpKwC21nRYa6R44kly2Hu0=&emci=26456e1c-eeb1-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9f6a38a4-acb2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9506338)

clean_body: | = Hi Peter, This election outcome is deeply painful, and the consequences we face will be real and far-reaching. We know what Right-wing extremists are determined to do and the lengths they’ll go to achieve it. But we will fight back. The fight ahead won’t be easy, and we won’t win every battle. But we must try—because our neighbors are counting on us. Over 1,173,064 Oregonians voted to protect the right to choose, for an economy that works for the middle class, and to defend our democracy. Those voices will not be ignored. To move forward, passionate and engaged Americans like you are one of the last guardrails protecting our values. I was elected to Congress to be your advocate, and I promise to fight every day to deliver for you. **** Extremists want nothing more than to see us defeated, divided, or disheartened. They know that if we turn on each other or step away from this work, their path becomes easier. I won’t let that happen. Together, we can build a stronger, more connected community—one that proves what unites us is far more powerful than anything that seeks to divide us. We’ve faced uphill battles before. When the odds seemed stacked against us, we came together and made history. Think of the grassroots movements that rose up to protect healthcare during Trump’s presidency or the record-breaking turnout that reclaimed the House in 2018. Those victories weren’t easy, but they showed the strength we have when we fight together. Take the time you need to rest and process—lean on those who inspire and uplift you. When you’re ready, know that I’ll be standing with you, ready to keep fighting for justice, equity, and a better future. Every day, I’ll fight for the values that matter to all of us. As your Congresswoman, I’ll stand as a strong defender of our democracy and a tireless advocate for the Oregon we know we can build together. In solidarity, Dr. Maxine Dexter | Paid for by Maxine for Congress PO Box 12209, Portland, OR 97212 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend,
Time is running out to join us for the **Annual Advance** , the premier networking and training event for Republicans across Virginia! ALL ticket sales close **tonight at midnight** , so don’t wait to secure your spot.
**Join us this weekend at the Kimpton Forum Hotel in Charlottesville** **for:**

* **Expert Training** : Sharpen your skills with sessions designed to equip Republican leaders and activists for success.
* **Networking Opportunities** : Connect with fellow Republicans from across the Commonwealth.
* **Inspiring Speakers** : Hear from some of Virginia’s top conservative voices.

This is the event where strategy is shaped, connections are made, and victories begin.
**Reserve your ticket before midnight:**

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfb7u0m35rhorrc9qmqdme2vktt7s4r6i3cr6kp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4e4gmrsqee1ccnk9q1214mdjje71q7j5hr3h06g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj2c1h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zshcvkkuii40k1nckcmeqgdtkm1s3auu01bj3kbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj2c1h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1934uasnhket71o4fk6bmfel15t7l2gk3qu53to_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj2c1h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs94gtvuldanht4mquuonet245mmtgk1cmpbf610_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55crtb3k9hcspv1jfjg5kdmpkfj3i9a7mg0atvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj4cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jia95fr9n1on6d5mresdgmdk5hov5m27v6gdbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj4cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z40p5hj9ku34m8l5ek26rbm9jp63oa787nab5hf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj4cjh2bs)

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: A full audit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zid2hr472626d7p8ki9c5qmfoambetpfqmrcv3g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj4cjh2bs)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg0abogjo57cc1h0g9d03s3hfdi4gqubmgbimrig_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpge9oj4cjh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zln3s0hgn8qkm3r7cmrp61fp6ear4ttvsm77bnl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie0p34c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z64fd9pvq75203fstdtjnt6j4j6hl5p5p1m1lds8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie0p34c5h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4ut6jljm9k63fbsg91nrchp8q71h9nhst8rp8ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie0p34c5h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu2i2s4lcn86sae0g9r7dvgn7qkg50dkqbf0hrv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie0p34c5h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

American Defense News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdoc6ks938csgphbi7n9gfk6rril1qg9tjgfske8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie0p34c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cphm9or0c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqnlvinaufhouq4mk9tdp1lf5pbs3b4iedd8jt10_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie0p34c5h2bs)_

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/sR4rm-QKXCfn6rmCpnmvYQ~~/AAVLBgA~_LlFnFicppVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

You see, the Radical Left poured a historic sum of money into these key races in 2024, and when you break it down, the states where we could afford to go toe-to-toe with them, we then WON on the issues.

_But in states like Arizona where we were**[OUTSPENT 2:1,](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/sR4rm-QKXCfn6rmCpnmvYQ~~/AAVLBgA~_LlFnFicppVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** the Democrats effectively **[BOUGHT](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/sR4rm-QKXCfn6rmCpnmvYQ~~/AAVLBgA~_LlFnFicppVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** the race!_

So, when I look at what the Left is already projecting to spend on the 2026 midterms, it makes me nervous about our chances to defend the critical majority we just built for President Trump.

_Just like this election, Friend, patriots like YOU will be our last line of defense for the midterms - and rest assured, the left won't be sparing a single dollar._

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt5dqhl65jmvn1ohapkms4t6hp8qcu896bl3ikh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie2or2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zulvsqk7qoltrjekcqeuo533st0fqt751qedld7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie2or2c9h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgpfsh58qgjeoddlj5e4pjg0etkmi7nmsvddhnk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie2or2c9h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvvv6t58p8o3llocbk2a4u5ojm7j9htrb16k4cc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie2or2c9h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

---

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Ready to hear from community changemakers / Listos para escuchar a los creadores de cambios comunitarios
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
SATURDAY in San Antonio:
Speaker series highlights how incarceration impacts communities
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Beyond%20the%20Block%20San%20Antonio%20R2J%20event.jpg]
JOIN TOP and our movement allies ACT4SA this Saturday at the Radius Center at 7 p.m. for an evening of reflection and community-building. Derived from “Beyond the Block: Voices from Sing Sing”, this speaker series seeks to amplify the voices and stories of people who are directly impacted by criminalization and incarceration within our communities. Along with ACT4SA, we envision a world in which we shoulder together our collective responsibility for compassionate community-building through creativity, dialogue, and storytelling.
Throughout the speakers’ discussions there'll be open dialogue between attendees and guest speakers to foster connection and relationship-building within our San Antonio community. Free parking will be available at the Radius Center Lot and anywhere downtown after 7 p.m. Refreshments and snacks will be offered during the event. The show starts promptly at 7:30 p.m.
Click here to RSVP for free. [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/beyond-the-block-san-antonio-tickets-1073962533849]
Share the Facebook event. [https://www.facebook.com/events/863074032687667/]
For more information about this event and TOP's Right2Justice campaign, contact Laquita Garcia at lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
NEXT WEEK:
Dallas County TOP housing justice campaign meet-up
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20justice%202024.jpg]
TOP's Dallas County Housing Justice campaign is gearing up to have a bigger impact as we get ready for 2025.
Join us at our next campaign meeting on December 11 from 5 - 7 p.m. at the Dallas TOP office (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250) where we'll break bread and plan out our campaign organizing efforts for the coming months.
Come drop by and find out how you can be part of our work! For more information, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Plug in to Texas For All
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/BlackTOP%202024%20Photo%20Collage.png]
The community organizing TOP does is year-round, centered on building the political power of Black and Latino Texans, all while advancing a bold vision where ALL Texans have the means to live their best lives and thrive.
Alongside progressive partners across the state, TOP and BlackTOP are proud to fight for the #TXForAll we Texans deserve — no matter our age, race, faith, gender, or income.
The work we do plugs into a statewide coalition space that we are a strategic partner in, Texas For All.
Visit tx4all.org [https://tx4all.org] to find out more about this coalition, its vision, and its members.
Also, follow them on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TX4All/] and X [https://x.com/tx4all] !
TOP Tip: Know about the changes coming to state vehicle inspections in 2025
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20vehicle%20inspection%202025.jpg]
If you've lived long enough in Texas, you know our laws pertaining to driving are constantly changing. New vehicle inspection rules are about to go into effect for Texas drivers on January 1. Read more about it to see how you'll be impacted. [https://www.ksat.com/news/local/2024/10/07/new-vehicle-inspection-rules-in-texas-what-drivers-can-expect-in-2025/]
Español
SÁBADO en San Antonio:
Una serie de conferencias destaca cómo el encarcelamiento afecta a las comunidades
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Beyond%20the%20Block%20San%20Antonio%20R2J%20event.jpg]
ÚNASE a TOP y a nuestros aliados del movimiento en ACT4SA este sábado en el Radius Center a las 7 p.m. para una noche de reflexión y construcción de comunidad. Derivada de “Beyond the Block: Voices from Sing Sing”, esta serie de conferencias busca amplificar las voces e historias de las personas que se ven directamente afectadas por la criminalización y el encarcelamiento dentro de nuestras comunidades. Junto con ACT4SA, imaginamos un mundo en el que asumamos juntos nuestra responsabilidad colectiva de construir una comunidad compasiva a través de la creatividad, el diálogo y la narración de historias.
Durante las discusiones de los oradores, habrá un diálogo abierto entre los asistentes y los oradores invitados para fomentar la conexión y la construcción de relaciones dentro de nuestra comunidad de San Antonio. Habrá estacionamiento gratuito disponible en el estacionamiento del Radius Center y en cualquier lugar del centro después de las 7 p.m. Se ofrecerán refrigerios y bocadillos durante el evento. El espectáculo comienza puntualmente a las 7:30 p.m.
Haga clic aquí para confirmar su asistencia de forma gratuita. [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/beyond-the-block-san-antonio-tickets-1073962533849]
Comparta el evento en Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/events/863074032687667/]
Para obtener más información sobre este evento y la campaña Right2Justice de TOP, comuníquese con Laquita García en lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
LA PRÓXIMA SEMANA:
Reunión de la campaña TOP por la justicia de vivienda del condado de Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20justice%202024.jpg]
La campaña de TOP por la justicia en la vivienda en el condado de Dallas se está preparando para tener un mayor impacto a medida que nos preparamos para el año 2025.
Únase a nosotros en nuestra próxima reunión de campaña el 11 de diciembre de 5 a 7 p. m. en la oficina de TOP en Dallas (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250), donde compartiremos ideas y planearemos nuestros esfuerzos de organización de campaña para los próximos meses.
¡Ven y descubre cómo puedes ser parte de nuestro trabajo! Para obtener más información, comuníquese con Iman a ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Sea parte de Texas For All
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/BlackTOP%202024%20Photo%20Collage.png]
La organización comunitaria de TOP se lleva a cabo durante todo el año y se centra en construir el poder político de los texanos negros y latinos, al mismo tiempo que promueve una visión audaz en la que TODOS los texanos tengan los medios para vivir sus mejores vidas y prosperar.
Junto con socios progresistas de todo el estado, TOP y BlackTOP están orgullosos de luchar por el #TXForAll que los texanos merecemos, sin importar nuestra edad, raza, fe, género o ingresos.
El trabajo que hacemos se conecta con un espacio de coalición estatal, del que somos un socio estratégico, Texas For All.
Visite tx4all.org [https://tx4all.org/] para obtener más información sobre esta coalición, su visión y sus miembros.
Además, síganos en Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TX4All/] y X [https://x.com/tx4all] !
Consejos de TOP: Conoce los cambios que se vienen en las inspecciones técnicas de vehiculos en 2025
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20vehicle%20inspection%202025.jpg]
Si ha vivido en Texas durante mucho tiempo, sabrá que nuestras leyes relacionadas con la conducción cambian constantemente. Las nuevas normas de inspección de vehículos entrarán en vigor para los conductores de Texas el 1 de enero. Lea más sobre esto para ver cómo se verá afectado. [https://www.ksat.com/news/local/2024/10/07/new-vehicle-inspection-rules-in-texas-what-drivers-can-expect-in-2025/]

clean_body: Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español] SATURDAY in San Antonio: Speaker series highlights how incarceration impacts communities [] JOIN TOP and our movement allies ACT4SA this Saturday at the Radius Center at 7 p.m. for an evening of reflection and community-building. Derived from “Beyond the Block: Voices from Sing Sing”, this speaker series seeks to amplify the voices and stories of people who are directly impacted by criminalization and incarceration within our communities. Along with ACT4SA, we envision a world in which we shoulder together our collective responsibility for compassionate community-building through creativity, dialogue, and storytelling. Throughout the speakers’ discussions there'll be open dialogue between attendees and guest speakers to foster connection and relationship-building within our San Antonio community. Free parking will be available at the Radius Center Lot and anywhere downtown after 7 p.m. Refreshments and snacks will be offered during the event. The show starts promptly at 7:30 p.m. Click here to RSVP for free. [] Share the Facebook event. [] For more information about this event and TOP's Right2Justice campaign, contact Laquita Garcia at lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] . NEXT WEEK: Dallas County TOP housing justice campaign meet-up [] TOP's Dallas County Housing Justice campaign is gearing up to have a bigger impact as we get ready for 2025. Join us at our next campaign meeting on December 11 from 5 - 7 p.m. at the Dallas TOP office (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250) where we'll break bread and plan out our campaign organizing efforts for the coming months. Come drop by and find out how you can be part of our work! For more information, contact Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] . Plug in to Texas For All [] The community organizing TOP does is year-round, centered on building the political power of Black and Latino Texans, all while advancing a bold vision where ALL Texans have the means to live their best lives and thrive. Alongside progressive partners across the state, TOP and BlackTOP are proud to fight for the #TXForAll we Texans deserve — no matter our age, race, faith, gender, or income. The work we do plugs into a statewide coalition space that we are a strategic partner in, Texas For All. Visit tx4all.org [] to find out more about this coalition, its vision, and its members. Also, follow them on Facebook [] and X [] ! TOP Tip: Know about the changes coming to state vehicle inspections in 2025 [] If you've lived long enough in Texas, you know our laws pertaining to driving are constantly changing. New vehicle inspection rules are about to go into effect for Texas drivers on January 1. Read more about it to see how you'll be impacted. [] Español SÁBADO en San Antonio: Una serie de conferencias destaca cómo el encarcelamiento afecta a las comunidades [] ÚNASE a TOP y a nuestros aliados del movimiento en ACT4SA este sábado en el Radius Center a las 7 p.m. para una noche de reflexión y construcción de comunidad. Derivada de “Beyond the Block: Voices from Sing Sing”, esta serie de conferencias busca amplificar las voces e historias de las personas que se ven directamente afectadas por la criminalización y el encarcelamiento dentro de nuestras comunidades. Junto con ACT4SA, imaginamos un mundo en el que asumamos juntos nuestra responsabilidad colectiva de construir una comunidad compasiva a través de la creatividad, el diálogo y la narración de historias. Durante las discusiones de los oradores, habrá un diálogo abierto entre los asistentes y los oradores invitados para fomentar la conexión y la construcción de relaciones dentro de nuestra comunidad de San Antonio. Habrá estacionamiento gratuito disponible en el estacionamiento del Radius Center y en cualquier lugar del centro después de las 7 p.m. Se ofrecerán refrigerios y bocadillos durante el evento. El espectáculo comienza puntualmente a las 7:30 p.m. Haga clic aquí para confirmar su asistencia de forma gratuita. [] Comparta el evento en Facebook. [] Para obtener más información sobre este evento y la campaña Right2Justice de TOP, comuníquese con Laquita García en lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] . LA PRÓXIMA SEMANA: Reunión de la campaña TOP por la justicia de vivienda del condado de Dallas [] La campaña de TOP por la justicia en la vivienda en el condado de Dallas se está preparando para tener un mayor impacto a medida que nos preparamos para el año 2025. Únase a nosotros en nuestra próxima reunión de campaña el 11 de diciembre de 5 a 7 p. m. en la oficina de TOP en Dallas (3910 Gaston Ave., Ste. 250), donde compartiremos ideas y planearemos nuestros esfuerzos de organización de campaña para los próximos meses. ¡Ven y descubre cómo puedes ser parte de nuestro trabajo! Para obtener más información, comuníquese con Iman a ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] . body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv9bqgraphd5flrr528lpkd400hs8aftj9mrm76g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob7c1h2bs)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

You see, the Radical Left poured a historic sum of money into these key races in 2024, and when you break it down, the states where we could afford to go toe-to-toe with them, we then WON on the issues.

_But in states like Arizona where we were**[OUTSPENT 2:1,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf4l9sc6h9l17ugjfemq462aodqslvmq1m604slg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob7c1h2bs)** the Democrats effectively **[BOUGHT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z77u6g9ijbjc9rjc70kk29jdajm315cqfmbcsmm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob7c1h2bs)** the race!_

So, when I look at what the Left is already projecting to spend on the 2026 midterms, it makes me nervous about our chances to defend the critical majority we just built for President Trump.

_Just like this election, Friend, patriots like YOU will be our last line of defense for the midterms - and rest assured, the left won't be sparing a single dollar._

**[Please make a grassroots contribution of any amount to help DEFEND the Republican majority we've built from the Democrats ever-growing warchest.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf87dovdccdum21u3dt1sd36ib7r4hbu96iss32o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob7c1h2bs)**

name: [1] Urgent Notification
subject: This is a chance for you to be part of a movement that will make history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This can’t wait

|
---
