name: Newt Gingrich
subject: - - 2024 Audit - -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is what mattered most...

Friend:

After such a resounding VICTORY for not only President Trump, but also for Republicans in both chambers of Congress, I've decided to work hand-in-hand with the National Republican Senatorial Committee to **[audit](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb83e7mj2ndc35ehjo5pvb33fojdpd7qsl3p308g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2chh2bs)** the 2024 election and uncover __exactly__ what led us to such a landslide victory.

Early reports and investigation indicate that one of the BIGGEST factors in this election - particularly in battleground Senate races - was, quite simply, _money_.

"...all-time record set this year in Ohio - $421 million, and likely closer to a half-billion once the final bills come in."
[Source: _Cronkite News_]

_But when all is said and done, I believe that our audit will clearly show the _single_ _most_ _important_ factor to our victories were the TOP issues for grassroots voters like YOU._

**[Which is why as the final piece of our Official 2024 Audit, I'm counting on _YOU_ to complete this survey before the submission window closes TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9vnqilcgjopehgc6irjhhrj9gdldrv7424lf218_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2chh2bs)

[Please complete your survey by following the personalized link below:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2j9i9te2m37umjttoji19fro4e1oq032tittdp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2chh2bs)**

Thank you,

name: Rep Eric Burlison
subject: Time’s up for this 3-letter agency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress
body:
Do you agree it’s time to ABOLISH it?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztpkemcqt3658pum2ll23esratcqvburqtu5cjn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2cjh2bs "Eric Burlison for Congress")
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq13b0bjfmnrtqjtco5u0lanec9pjf948bkpg67g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2cjh2bs "Eric Burlison for Congress")
**The Second Amendment couldn 't be clearer: _" shall not be infringed."_**

But the National Firearms Act (NFA) has been doing just that for decades--**_infringing on your constitutional rights and making felons out of law-abiding gun owners simply for owning legal items._**
Will you join me in this fight to protect our freedoms?
**[YES](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6gkjjri405ttu9qae7spovctgohslpd854jeb18_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2cjh2bs)**** [ NO](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl62g4rt0h0mv1j2d6osejbla5alkisj7k4mpbg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2cjh2bs)**
**This stops now.**

The NFA was designed to chip away at your freedoms and restrict your ability to protect yourself and your family.

** It's a relic of the past that has no place in a free America. **

That's why I've filed bold legislation to repeal the NFA, and with Republican control in Congress, we're ready to get it done.

This is about restoring the full power of your constitutional rights.

But I need _**YOUR**_ help.

I'm calling on **50,000 Patriots** to add their names and stand with me in Congress as we take on the Radical Left and their gun-grabbing agenda.
[**ADD YOUR NAME NOW TO STAND WITH ME**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg48g1tuop62c523p5qrpanliu1h78njl31kejj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cpie6ob2cjh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztgl0sh8d5k2p3p46107f7iim2hauao3soidlapo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5g60o30c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9kr83thcouscipqm396ba4uq5p905qu6olu7v4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5g60o30c3h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqf6ock2eua57f03lsgo4e1h7q0jt5hhrs1gh0c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5g60o30c3h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zprhdmp7grt4bj4k1a15ugu2npcpehsqlf1vjmf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c5g60o30c3h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

United Sovereign Americans (USA) is committed to securing lawful, transparent elections as a civil right for all Americans. Powered by dedicated auditors, volunteers and donors, we’ve filed nine federal lawsuits to ensure citizens in all 50 states can fight for their rights. Our litigation is advancing, and our meticulous analysis continues to uncover new evidence of election fraud. We will hold election officials accountable for misconduct and we are already planning for an even stronger 2026 election.

clean_body: United Sovereign Americans (USA) is committed to securing lawful, transparent elections as a civil right for all Americans. | | | | | Dear Peter, United Sovereign Americans (USA) is committed to securing lawful, transparent elections as a civil right for all Americans. Powered by dedicated auditors, volunteers and donors, we’ve filed nine federal lawsuits to ensure citizens in all 50 states can fight for their rights. Our litigation is advancing, and our meticulous analysis continues to uncover new evidence of election fraud. We will hold election officials accountable for misconduct and we are already planning for an even stronger 2026 election. | | | Have you experienced voting issues? Fill out our election complaint form or share it with others who have. Citizen-submitted reports are crucial to our lawsuits, helping us block flawed election certifications and hold officials accountable to follow the law. | | Check out these media highlights. "Enforcement is coming." In a Nov 27, 2024 on Twitter X, United Sovereign Americans addresses baseline security requirements for federal elections. Learn about an election "Marauder" in an October 30 and Watch this popular giving an overview of the USA legal strategy and aggregate forensic data. body:
If you can't pass a background check, you have no business in public office
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6834b3db-2a2a-47ed-b8cd-9cf0e9556bb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

THEN: MAGA loyalists started squabbling over nominee approvals, going as far as IGNORING FBI background checks. NOW: Chuck Schumer is DEMANDING FBI background checks on Trump's nominations and needs a groundswell of support to preserve our democracy. [Peter: We CAN fight back against Trump's dangerous nomination picks. Can you sign on if you agree that people have no business in public office if they can't pass a background check?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4aade01d-7b95-448b-9a26-6119bb75a998/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6eab710b-eea4-4536-8615-da78688553bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rep Eric Burlison
subject: Time’s up for this 3-letter agency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress

Do you agree it’s time to ABOLISH it?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52e1fc274f6a4534ab866f5b34a8de04&_e=xFUjA5XimnuBmGArRU6RFxbnSKhd1m6nOTs2jUgtpdGTBY1uteSkPaky1HGuEvFHA31O0wBwyFqRu1ESFe9QxUsIacNF9G2JZGtwTn4E-yAvTmjGJ6Bbloq-QxgirrVU0Ly8tPm2JWzgVsrOJRm_O6Ki5t6bmm8XDjaImENjngZ7PaY28KewBALt0EKxqAzELU61nHAfXkhsNk8pYV0Vs6ZorHZurztNxu4BQkmJtGizL_Ih8Wdup-x1kkhDoodo5jjvEnlJccPDh8ZhnUh2uKlDpRpx53yj9aA2wZelevVqYXmXpqm6iS5A_fNpUEaWOFbKHtf9GrticYPTQw9TW4Iivb1Sue6mrjjtBhJwQmN_D8ftACLDJqv4zbS8oWs2AWgyBxkAL158_NJMjvtUlCM4zJlDADHqUk3YpRliQDI%3D "Eric Burlison for Congress")
**The Second Amendment couldn 't be clearer: _" shall not be infringed."_**

But the National Firearms Act (NFA) has been doing just that for decades--**_infringing on your constitutional rights and making felons out of law-abiding gun owners simply for owning legal items._**
Will you join me in this fight to protect our freedoms?
**[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52e1fc274f6a4534ab866f5b34a8de04&_e=xFUjA5XimnuBmGArRU6RFxbnSKhd1m6nOTs2jUgtpdGTBY1uteSkPaky1HGuEvFHA31O0wBwyFqRu1ESFe9QxUsIacNF9G2JZGtwTn4E-yAvTmjGJ6Bbloq-QxgirrVU0Ly8tPm2JWzgVsrOJRm_O6Ki5t6bmm8XDjaImENjngZ7PaY28KewBALt0EKxqAzELU61nHAfXkhsNk8pYV0Vs6ZorHZurztNxu4BQkmJtGizL_Ih8Wdup-x1kkhDoodo5jjvEnlJccPDh8ZhnUh2uAvAg-C9pN7SrGLiv4jnxfHDesPSgEpxomNlt-Ugo8IXM-x-SzAZxBcKlkDIB9L3Y1wj6CuWmVnWEBPjksJsL-MH8F3Yxx3c9ThIn64Xbq3fRKdxHB7tO-A9uxeAXUtCO0tKxKKu-rFQqsoPZUsoapY%3D)**** [ NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52e1fc274f6a4534ab866f5b34a8de04&_e=xFUjA5XimnuBmGArRU6RFxbnSKhd1m6nOTs2jUgtpdGTBY1uteSkPaky1HGuEvFHA31O0wBwyFqRu1ESFe9QxUsIacNF9G2JZGtwTn4E-yAvTmjGJ6Bbloq-QxgirrVU0Ly8tPm2JWzgVsrOJRm_O6Ki5t6bmm8XDjaImENjngZ7PaY28KewBALt0EKxqAzELU61nHAfXkhsNk8pYV0Vs6ZorHZurztNxu4BQkmJtGizL_Ih8Wdup-x1kkhDoodo5jjvEnlJccPDh8ZhnUh2uGyinj9UunvXWhuHXk7ckETQAROhKBjEbuvpl9pafOHG6XPsiBwFuHZs1c26jARmQTVu9T-I2dKIF3ezr-H6XtF6lZpK86N4jXgmYYrVI7Bvox5U6XtaOYaJfHbhw08byvGM5xsfMB7RzR_JF7pFMdw%3D)**
**This stops now.**

The NFA was designed to chip away at your freedoms and restrict your ability to protect yourself and your family.

** It's a relic of the past that has no place in a free America. **

That's why I've filed bold legislation to repeal the NFA, and with Republican control in Congress, we're ready to get it done.

This is about restoring the full power of your constitutional rights.

But I need _**YOUR**_ help.

I'm calling on **50,000 Patriots** to add their names and stand with me in Congress as we take on the Radical Left and their gun-grabbing agenda.
[**ADD YOUR NAME NOW TO STAND WITH ME** >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52e1fc274f6a4534ab866f5b34a8de04&_e=xFUjA5XimnuBmGArRU6RFxbnSKhd1m6nOTs2jUgtpdGTBY1uteSkPaky1HGuEvFHA31O0wBwyFqRu1ESFe9QxUsIacNF9G2JZGtwTn4E-yAvTmjGJ6Bbloq-QxgirrVU0Ly8tPm2JWzgVsrOJRm_O6Ki5t6bmm8XDjaImENjngZ7PaY28KewBALt0EKxqAzELU61nHAfXkhsNk8pYV0Vs6ZorHZurztNxu4BQkmJtGizL_Ih8Wdup-x1kkhDoodo5jjvEnlJccPDh8ZhnUh2uLsIC7d8enbRxXgPegqwTLxL-hN4zuy_oRc41tUQLwJ2H2nEPU7z-TVyMyZEhIk6uhzG3bBbaC9JwoFFr8sXbQ6EKUo0qwQh8eLOsoSQM2WBG1Fs_aMvyOurfta66ENbCFlEnxuGzL2aRbPwun4OTjI%3D)

body:

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8fdb62a08df54eca8c3cf46f502c694a&_e=t4Zwa1Gxtffo-MEfosERzl7lLnAeArtvTaobrAl5Pzti0w_zLsdO9bJhjt5lRNveFpXZYl6lhSuRCxWngXd9JF6y_dAPaKr9KRSPJUgW6CMwxYCMkunpGPSEDINQmt91K36R0jwXWgCYj0vO1KsohmB4WXzZ5xDzrECsWxketevfFs5KhaEvk7LqApjtfwI83rZdbOOcDPn7qZil7DsjksXoS4OYU6xmiuXRamdSmLjJXQIpaRDKNkM3pPtHxEuZaaPBVfXwZG1fKk9owUGIE4OsV00hXJRgCLroYVHPWw_HaPMpRSMKK9bOM5AeBaG9fcKQ89FDOFYOouZKV6iCJ-rxLkLsImBMZCQg38LOxoxY-opmySSgEpbUEZLBoBeT)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8fdb62a08df54eca8c3cf46f502c694a&_e=t4Zwa1Gxtffo-MEfosERzl7lLnAeArtvTaobrAl5Pzti0w_zLsdO9bJhjt5lRNveFpXZYl6lhSuRCxWngXd9JF6y_dAPaKr9KRSPJUgW6CMwxYCMkunpGPSEDINQmt91K36R0jwXWgCYj0vO1KsohmB4WXzZ5xDzrECsWxketevfFs5KhaEvk7LqApjtfwI83rZdbOOcDPn7qZil7DsjksXoS4OYU6xmiuXRamdSmLjzdJJhjjQOIEt6_c1TxP47azANcu-Q_TGa7DMjjYUIxXaBsqEGOcHBMmdjyvXORGfjtBoW5mU2aEhZF38Ir7pwCogcJtHa0QyUTnRSsNmrpU5Teh1ky1B3nWMWsFU4rlpXsJz3ME6Le4oksmCpPwYc)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**The Second Amendment couldn 't be clearer: _" shall not be infringed."_**

But the National Firearms Act (NFA) has been doing just that for decades--**_infringing on your constitutional rights and making felons out of law-abiding gun owners simply for owning legal items._**
Will you join me in this fight to protect our freedoms?
**[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f025d22b4dac407eaf5c64c5aaf61104&_e=SjPxkafC51kHrM6R6CQxB36BruF3d8vstbjOQai3ljI0COhVHpGnZ5CnUbHkAMTCp4GKMUj_FwFwQ5Jq9XqXUCjBRDkxGtJbA7u1St9XLUj5cccAO-1FGZOQ7AGzJREA62OOhBI2HHn8tmv0bFjFdxcMw1m0UMAkTMolh6FxAilgBv71ysxlnzUV-ZCNPipWhdzOmZtGmFDqNDi2IddatG4HY8xxo7pv5qjonTNYMLqPuiFiBg98kCKFGU41zRnAu-TNEvgh-I-1WcyHViPPzd1A9klMaXuXOp2lxSpPD-kl7uEKZzf_v_XZBaswcc4JvVmO8ATCxCFNez-pK0MbI2iQ5AD3GGa4xNk1afDN0J37vmV7_0bfySSC1CrvePIu14U0v5Cg0-9ZZmFZx_98-jFvAmmSMagb89ZlWCBzFvk%3D)**** [ NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f025d22b4dac407eaf5c64c5aaf61104&_e=SjPxkafC51kHrM6R6CQxB36BruF3d8vstbjOQai3ljI0COhVHpGnZ5CnUbHkAMTCp4GKMUj_FwFwQ5Jq9XqXUCjBRDkxGtJbA7u1St9XLUj5cccAO-1FGZOQ7AGzJREA62OOhBI2HHn8tmv0bFjFdxcMw1m0UMAkTMolh6FxAilgBv71ysxlnzUV-ZCNPipWhdzOmZtGmFDqNDi2IddatG4HY8xxo7pv5qjonTNYMLqPuiFiBg98kCKFGU41zRnAu-TNEvgh-I-1WcyHViPPzfH6K5b83G5G-e94QHAQf_7pRF0n0FqILlNzD6LerF8iozUkWIEKdhWtfYeEjBvkTEDXrZk_JlP6xUN98mOHHvl-MWI5djOxcpjEUDFWqlJwCfAmXMsRullIrcPRWaZ1Dep-oPu3biT_njoLpkziH1w%3D)**
**This stops now.**

The NFA was designed to chip away at your freedoms and restrict your ability to protect yourself and your family.

** It's a relic of the past that has no place in a free America. **

That's why I've filed bold legislation to repeal the NFA, and with Republican control in Congress, we're ready to get it done.

This is about restoring the full power of your constitutional rights.

But I need _**YOUR**_ help.

I'm calling on **50,000 Patriots** to add their names and stand with me in Congress as we take on the Radical Left and their gun-grabbing agenda.
[**ADD YOUR NAME NOW TO STAND WITH ME** >>>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f025d22b4dac407eaf5c64c5aaf61104&_e=SjPxkafC51kHrM6R6CQxB36BruF3d8vstbjOQai3ljI0COhVHpGnZ5CnUbHkAMTCp4GKMUj_FwFwQ5Jq9XqXUCjBRDkxGtJbA7u1St9XLUj5cccAO-1FGZOQ7AGzJREA62OOhBI2HHn8tmv0bFjFdxcMw1m0UMAkTMolh6FxAilgBv71ysxlnzUV-ZCNPipWhdzOmZtGmFDqNDi2IddatG4HY8xxo7pv5qjonTNYMLqPuiFiBg98kCKFGU41zRnAu-TNEvgh-I-1WcyHViPPzZls6-Vz7lX24-xzwQ7qAnjMRWYGR97xQf_cLtPk3Hr8Bqby1oKlps5FJHHra8AtifhbDGyJW9uRDhkTVxbMivkVMyCO92_JAOUmkKCAmf5ztDUOpwhE-c3zV4Bl3EgtMRD9qxcbmWswuHhedie7RS0%3D)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The Flat Tax revisited
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsulzf_WNH

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osulzf_WNH

Dear
friend,

Fair,
efficient, and simple are words you probably don't associate with
our tax system. But what if they could be?

Unfortunately, the federal income tax is a complete mess.

It's not
efficient, fair, or simple. It fosters tax avoidance and cheating
and costs billions of dollars to administer.
First
proposed in 1981 by Hoover fellows Alvin Rabushka and Robert
Hall, the flat tax was intended to simplify the federal tax
system by replacing the progressive federal income tax system
with a low and simple flat tax. They believed that the flat tax
was the fairest, most efficient, simplest, and most workable tax
plan.

The flat
tax plan would give an enormous boost to the US economy by
dramatically improving incentives to work, save, invest, and take
entrepreneurial risks. It would also save taxpayers hundreds of
billions in direct and indirect costs.

As we
navigate the complexities of our present tax system, it becomes
evident that change is necessary. The classic book, The Flat Tax,
critiques the flaws in our highly progressive tax structure and
introduces a practical, efficient, and workable alternative.

Hall and
Rabushka explain that:

All
income should be taxed once, and only once, at a uniform low
rate.
A
flat tax would eliminate the distortions of the present tax
treatment of business.
It is
not an academic abstraction but a workable solution that has been
implemented in many countries.
If
meaningful, systematic tax reform is to succeed, it won't be
birthed in Washington. It will come from millions of taxpayers
demanding fairness in taxation.

That's
why we want to share this Hoover Classic with as many Americans
as possible, starting with you. By requesting your free copy of
The Flat Tax eBook, you not only gain access to invaluable
insights but also become part of a community engaged in reshaping
our thinking on taxation.

As you
delve into the pages of The Flat Tax, you'll discover not only
the critique of the current system but a practical alternative
that has been a guiding light for those seeking fairness,
efficiency, and practicality.

Join us
in unlocking the legacy of The Flat Tax. Claim your free copy now
and become part of a movement for transformative ideas in tax
reform. You can get your eBook copy here:
https://resources.hoover.org/the-flat-tax

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=68076af1814e47439d7272a933e6b3e7&_e=AW_9ZIDKwz4MEWYjG_UyoPIVxnRJGa2MDq2giYgL1M07FhB2saqe3YnrjUrVCDdZJWFcVX3VDj5UmDk50uLaHWxgO9-PkAFVUFfZdDwbS9N8Flkvb8XOW5lk_PugJiIPnHKUHMjd7eppD4tD1kyEQnqq_D8Ym3hBN963KlaUDPsqjS9RbBJaaVpBDA354Wlw4PMPxyYSkMKLRivdAYo4VTHjxFnoAZDiCW0G2uck0aiEAdVATk20ZHocea21zaU8NUvUHpmgA2JTN0wQ6XH4iQuRxLckOIT1pK9Ls_70YZqm0IRKMDTI2Wi1mTRgxnUyGezB0917d8Aemfz3kEtHG8ET1jbxtcpEfe06Bp6Ay17OBRaovbfj_VL8Nee353J6)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=68076af1814e47439d7272a933e6b3e7&_e=AW_9ZIDKwz4MEWYjG_UyoPIVxnRJGa2MDq2giYgL1M07FhB2saqe3YnrjUrVCDdZJWFcVX3VDj5UmDk50uLaHWxgO9-PkAFVUFfZdDwbS9N8Flkvb8XOW5lk_PugJiIPnHKUHMjd7eppD4tD1kyEQnqq_D8Ym3hBN963KlaUDPsqjS9RbBJaaVpBDA354Wlw4PMPxyYSkMKLRivdAYo4VTHjxFnoAZDiCW0G2uck0ahKzJohrH3sqF1UZkrTVQ-Jntq65w96VckqLDXEn8U0qgeDfy9FWnrV0r0HKLJs00rIfTbMbPEsPIEGoT8re8YzDOn0i-VJ_bXAI3WMGhSfwRYdYHwtR0tax3gEHyj5HC-Id-9FiVRbdEQveYxoDJ9E)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=68076af1814e47439d7272a933e6b3e7&_e=AW_9ZIDKwz4MEWYjG_UyoPIVxnRJGa2MDq2giYgL1M07FhB2saqe3YnrjUrVCDdZJWFcVX3VDj5UmDk50uLaHWxgO9-PkAFVUFfZdDwbS9N8Flkvb8XOW5lk_PugJiIPnHKUHMjd7eppD4tD1kyEQnqq_D8Ym3hBN963KlaUDPsqjS9RbBJaaVpBDA354Wlw4PMPxyYSkMKLRivdAYo4VTHjxFnoAZDiCW0G2uck0agxQvwKs-AxWbaLnJ1RRhI6FlUf3WKjMv9YQYOj7_it6nYXzHkqwNYA_kZPov2lFhUwxbdpuJsezAUhPKHdSNH8jp0fHj_B3rhuNQl17H_qntyrcoPorgbx1kuSEFdjA5bT-TLZBwMUW-hYRHzMFVs8)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L-KSWt6XeVJTXlEmfaoBPw~~/AARclAA~~) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L-KSWt6XeVJTXlEmfaoBPw~~/AARclAA~~) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L-KSWt6XeVJTXlEmfaoBPw~~/AARclAA~~). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L-KSWt6XeVJTXlEmfaoBPw~~/AARclAA~~)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fda81afb08d44cce945ab2e472c19f35&_e=QUymS-FPvhGA2y-GaDH0odp2F-k8hSNP-AewnrBds3a2Zv6FZUGqrVkpA0YFFcVeyNrR3ODXqmfUQ9VsSLIzkA_Hhoh2bBJ3PgOoOhsmLJ2iXeIClwkgsjlokmJiQKunHpJxuNAJr_zWwJj-xJ1l_ND0jKdkHosAXL14iLkRhMWGU50yYluUNiVxLAcDcBnU4RBCuACW6ZcsTBnWanJiL4rXYJZQrHzDag5ouwXVmkzDmzc6a1KSXg9HO9ae4S4fHns1vRKloarkK7QwMyueqDlwo-7b_vi1e9a2RFURUK-mBNZeVmFHEO5zjRB1pZ6-wQ-vv3Hwr9Pc6Yer4wKYUq6UhxJou7jSeMwBclBlRd1HrhG6o65a6p34B3Stb5hiT_whd0caCJ9p5Cw1vBC0E1g1M8zdYGAwyiAxWyxoWLmVr5T063gqIbKLbY_1Xz8x) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fda81afb08d44cce945ab2e472c19f35&_e=QUymS-FPvhGA2y-GaDH0odp2F-k8hSNP-AewnrBds3a2Zv6FZUGqrVkpA0YFFcVeyNrR3ODXqmfUQ9VsSLIzkA_Hhoh2bBJ3PgOoOhsmLJ2iXeIClwkgsjlokmJiQKunHpJxuNAJr_zWwJj-xJ1l_ND0jKdkHosAXL14iLkRhMWGU50yYluUNiVxLAcDcBnU4RBCuACW6ZcsTBnWanJiL4rXYJZQrHzDag5ouwXVmkzDmzc6a1KSXg9HO9ae4S4fHns1vRKloarkK7QwMyueqDlwo-7b_vi1e9a2RFURUK_ZeW5Fap9Grxlo-hHZF0N8xY4u_wqiRxWJnV2oMCHUIbI9RdFLILAo2YkUa-EdVzukRqLuqOw4LtDgysZ9BLcEwmrBohILwWZaJh43DEnhVHgLtDl_BKfldIq8qfKOHQ6Niu2lY1uiQV0__7EcUQWN) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fda81afb08d44cce945ab2e472c19f35&_e=QUymS-FPvhGA2y-GaDH0odp2F-k8hSNP-AewnrBds3a2Zv6FZUGqrVkpA0YFFcVeyNrR3ODXqmfUQ9VsSLIzkA_Hhoh2bBJ3PgOoOhsmLJ2iXeIClwkgsjlokmJiQKunHpJxuNAJr_zWwJj-xJ1l_ND0jKdkHosAXL14iLkRhMWGU50yYluUNiVxLAcDcBnU4RBCuACW6ZcsTBnWanJiL4rXYJZQrHzDag5ouwXVmkzDmzc6a1KSXg9HO9ae4S4fHns1vRKloarkK7QwMyueqDlwo-7b_vi1e9a2RFURUK-oE4YNZQ5wxcBSS9iJBYX6MoxGq1PM0fbClTuZnZpk-IbAiseBkFXhWWENxdfeBOefkjg_YYKfvdeN0GcO5Hzx6tMKGBob3NQHgN0hu1aivGnTzirDW_AlGjGaaFmFirxOuMQXjmI510ebwOcOpKsS). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fda81afb08d44cce945ab2e472c19f35&_e=QUymS-FPvhGA2y-GaDH0odp2F-k8hSNP-AewnrBds3a2Zv6FZUGqrVkpA0YFFcVeyNrR3ODXqmfUQ9VsSLIzkA_Hhoh2bBJ3PgOoOhsmLJ2iXeIClwkgsjlokmJiQKunHpJxuNAJr_zWwJj-xJ1l_ND0jKdkHosAXL14iLkRhMWGU50yYluUNiVxLAcDcBnU4RBCuACW6ZcsTBnWanJiL4rXYJZQrHzDag5ouwXVmkzDmzc6a1KSXg9HO9ae4S4fHns1vRKloarkK7QwMyueqDlwo-7b_vi1e9a2RFURUK9w-fEMUaer1So30QagEChque5rv3rzQK_aw7HOnScAsU11b6BmYOMFgMhznUI1CM_7KE5Y5KpGgAKVuDfwq9Hs4EE3zgXNfm10cxsVuTFzSqEfGJ9WeUoes8-ZiC0RemWv2OCWqObXbotrdNvL0Q9I)** Best regards,

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6sh2n86mDnWZmVhXEC_-Xg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNCGMP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwNVcDc3BjQgpnTs6IUWcTzxyZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6sh2n86mDnWZmVhXEC_-Xg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNCGMP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwNVcDc3BjQgpnTs6IUWcTzxyZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6sh2n86mDnWZmVhXEC_-Xg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNCGMP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwNVcDc3BjQgpnTs6IUWcTzxyZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6sh2n86mDnWZmVhXEC_-Xg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNCGMP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIwNVcDc3BjQgpnTs6IUWcTzxyZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vf1HZ5zkfxS5hTsZf4dvcA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNCGMP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmdOzohRZxPPHJlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1P4iODbUXijh08AFQ4brKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNCGMP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnTs6IUWcTzxyZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

# Thursday, December 5, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1936, author [James Lee Burke](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQgOGnsbeg89lgPHjowpauHdHBHcGpKRE4IXn7Kt27__qk_-vcnynl9HP5pEVieU5rj4DuZPAEdc-U8qt3muMAHIyWaLy1NrRonJ5j8CDYcEPgPU5CjgemYKEJLYg1o07xjRmE2hgMNVatsIfgvalrGKVh5UA4lXWryixFnrRP-bU-ZKvGddE5zqXcdmU_FHYKu-M4qistsmeR4b59y7tS2NGw3svpmgeFnd4i346Uc9obrxxcFkr5Tyv_7j0i_gYAAP__OapRsg) was born in Houston. He is best known for his series of mystery novels featuring fictional homicide detective Dave Robicheaux, whose character has been portrayed on screen by Alec Baldwin and Tommy Lee Jones. A 14-year-old girl from Corpus Christi showed off some [impressive shadowboxing moves](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tuwyAUgOGngS0WHLCBgaE3q0s6VepoUc6JjYQvwihO-vRVunf_9Un_13k4h5TTMn6EmXy9XdYBBOiThJNoBwwp3wfN0X8LdJKTl0Yp5SxIzScfTbAAQSFKTQGFs1p1WptoY9Q2djz5ByZBtFKCa6GxhEY4Y2TbikgdMi0IU11LUyeqdAv7Jd_XK5UmrjPPfqp125l6YtAz6I_jaNKy1zCWMD8KBn0hygz61xf38_72uXXPC4OeF4_bkXJOe2eYFuMcUv4j67-PVw-_AQAA__-XAFJS) at a cheerleading competition. Check out the story in today's _Et Cetera_ section! Today's sponsor is [GoldCo](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyE0cuunDAMBuCnCbuMHOcGCxaVKLupetSqVVcoJR6ImsCIhOHM21f0sqqqk2Vkf_5lf70OVxdiWKYPLlFbXm_rgICKC-SgB-9CfA6q8u138I2oqBVWStnUKFQ1t7VsCGVtvUYEuNVWGqtr9AaUdaBMFdoTEwhaCGw0XmryFhprhdYwkvFMAflQ1u1SZir06vItPtcHbZdxTVVs51Lumcl3DHuG_XEcl_u2FhpLWKb0zO4RlilzSi7Es4Nhv8cSkivEpz144mXl0xo9d4vnOcQHbRysQFSnKPt8G4NnsrMgXmY43zW-fPnG0MTMZAcg-PsT559n4v3vaPxTOf2PbvzhJuJXFxaGZlyY7GqtuWk0Vw0CQ7OXNOR130ZisntTOKsT-bAnJrtfU_98ji7dXZiWf3NWW-vvR4gxZGOZgunvIqry31s-WvwZAAD___pAnRE), offering a free beginner's guide to buying Gold and Silver.

## Texas May Bus Migrants To ICE
Texas officials are reportedly considering a plan to [transport illegal immigrants directly to ICE holding centers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnwR0R52CwXVDchi633dIi5thBwmAB-Xv7ldNvN9JIn0bzc52vLsSQtv9uJ9Pea55RYM8BuVCzdyF-5r7z5ib8BB0ZGKSU04jQd3fj5DhKGNVNDXqVTivdiwn04rUDkCC6YE4MUCgAnBReRvKDmIYBlBILac96QT60XC7tTo3erq7xk59ULkveu2jurR2VyX8MLUObPkeu7awY2lNmaAHOPDK0j8oTvSpD-4X4klMNnkrlhUp-tJA2voetuNT47VGp8pZ5WIivuXBPRy7NtZATQ9sV449XiDFUPbBebLsL8Tup_fnR0-BvAAAA__8-smgf) for expedited deportation as part of Operation Lone Star. The move would [mark a significant departure](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGurCAURb9GOwwgDFpQvMZuXntLg3CcOQmCgeM4_v3NTH_rnb2ysn7u891hxPT47zaw9F7zLLlUTEjG9RwcxmtWbbALD6NowQrT9_04SKHapzWjViC1GqEPbljloHuhBmOWsNzWcVlatB-YkFwLIUctuwGC4aMxQmvu4RYaxSEg5dLREwjerq7xyi8onc9bG-2TaK9N_6-RUyOn8zy7Nb8TnPWzN3Lac0RCXxs5fd_M5yMGthyVbfgoLlFlAQt4ihdDDyzAngs5wpwYpkrgAqsueTpcuZhHQqjsSAEK20vec4XA9uhSW2zYT4wR6800ij82h_ErSX9We1n5GwAA__8stnPm) from the state’s current practice of busing migrants to so-called sanctuary cities, a strategy to highlight the need for enhanced border security and the effects of illegal immigration. Although Gov. Greg Abbott has yet to comment on the proposal, Tom Homan, President-elect Trump’s designated border czar, [expressed interest in collaborating with Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAURp8GOwxcAceC4m_s5m-3NAxc9SYIRthxfPvNzNZbfycnX87Xfbo7ipSW_25DW19znkCA4hK40FNwFK9JNcE-RBhkg1b2XdcNN5CqWa1xxhnwqOSsjOs9zsOghfFyBgnDQzdk3zIJQksJg4b2hqEXQ99LrYVHE5gSGKjmo60rVny5MscrP_Fofd6aaNda98K6fwxGBuN5nu3pykppqTnhy22UflEG454j-YvBSNtGy-Eq5cRg7EBpbW4Mxo-eU-F7dClRWnjN_PFd-AdPtfBAB_oar_dAHvmBez4qg7E5bNhPipGK6ZkSy-Yofi7WP5s9LfwEAAD__18tcHg) on the initiative. _“We’re going to help them finish this job and secure Texas, and we’re going to work in partnership,”_ Homan said.
## ERCOT Says Grid Is Ready for Extreme Cold
The meteorologist for ERCOT, Texas' power grid operator, has predicted a warmer-than-average winter but cautioned about an [increased risk of extreme cold](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGysyAUBOCnwQ6Hc0SRguJv6PK3t3QQjgkTlAwSTd7-TtLfene-2dmfy3RxMcXt-t-tZOpryRMKlByQi34KLqb3JJtgZhE0NGRAdV2nRwTZ3IxYZo9uITmqwSuhlQwQAIYRPXVi1k00HwxQ9ACoe2xHCp-egr4XnobApKAQay5tvVGll9uX9M4HldbntUnmVutjZ90_hpahPc-zvR9P-oQMrSs1-kQM7UbnztCm7F1iaL8QQ0vF58rpVQutxH1OgdNBW-Vn3CoVnp815XxnaHHQXC4z6gADF-ADl1Jp7sZOcEXUoQ7oQWJTTHicMaW4D4pJcV1dTN-t9c_zDoO_AQAA___qgW8T), similar to the conditions that caused widespread outages in February 2021. During a Tuesday board meeting, ERCOT CEO Pablo Vegas [sought to reassure Texans](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHO4yAQBOCnsTsiWMyPKSiucZdrr7SAXdtI2FhA4uTtT0n_l6ORPo3m332-u5jisf51O9n2WvIMHAYmgHE1o4vpPQ89Ws_RiJ6s0FJKM4IY-s3iGAAUgQ9GyOAXD-iRB6W0CKhh6KP9YAK4EgKMgttIqLnRWijFA_1gN3DC2HK5tY0avVxd0js_qdxC3vtkt9bO2sk_HUwdTO486KqfqoPpUdkndTCFrcTKQk60u4N9FbYWWpnzPrfGrng0Kuwi1zYq7MwXFZYfza1UmTTegAaQXpoxYPC4DCaMzox-kQtCXyyeV0wp1h_dDXzdXUzfde3Xu54W_gcAAP__TgJt1g) that the grid is prepared for an event similar to Winter Storm Uri, highlighting 3,000 weatherization inspections and the addition of over 10,000 megawatts of new power generation since 2021. Critics, however, warned that natural gas plants have [not been sufficiently winterized](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdETrBWMoXFzjLtdeiXz2JlgyOLI3gfz9ifTXjTSjeaP5uc5XF1Pc7t9uJcPHLc8I2LcSW1BzcDG9574J5hfCJBsyUnddN40o-2YxhHqYoPM3AjmoHkaHalTKa0Xd4IepieYskwhKSpwUXkYKGiatpVLgaQiiBwqRc7nwQkyHq7f0zi8qF5_XJpmF-VFF9yXQCrT1QZ7Lc03Zu7TRXs-UQMuHQOueleMm0J6GQHuSBVqJAi2ciorP3O5xYyrtTo4XKu2H2d5LDE0x4bHHlGIdtOjhvrqYPjP4319eBv8CAAD__-AEY8o) and contended that too many energy-inefficient homes and buildings are straining the grid. We’re “better off than we were in February 2021 but not out of the woods,” said Doug Lewin, who authors a newsletter and hosts a podcast on the Texas energy market.
## Lubbock Man Ran 7 Marathons In 7 Days on 7 Continents
Mike Rogers, a 71-year-old from Lubbock, [completed the Great World Race](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwDXZcULzGXV67pYUv1zEKhgjYOPn7lVe75XZnNNLRaD6u89X64OPtv93J1NeaZhCguAQu9OysD-9ZNc4swo2yISOHruvGC0jVbAZX61bUQ9crrdZucDh2yuLagwPUiI03p0yC0FLCqKG9kBvEOAxSa4HUO6YEOV9TbutGlV62rOGdnpRbTHsTzFbro7DuH4OJwXQcR3vHxZ0lg-l0M5gkMJjESeFzWRLe-W4jx7Q_AlUq_JbJVn6kHBzPFokXelLku822bimWn-zs-xcxxeojxVoYTE027nH4EHzpB6bEbbc-fM-rf_71NPAVAAD__yoTbmY) last month, running seven marathons on seven continents in seven days to raise money for charity. “ _They all think I’m crazy. My friends, my family, my church—everyone thinks I’m insane_ ,” Rogers said. The race [began on a glacier in Antarctica](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79uwyAQgPGngS0WHGDigaGLt3TtaB1wsZFwiPApf96-Svfun37S93NZLlhqua3fuFPg17UtoMCeNJyUWzKW-l6szCGqPGlJQXtjzHQGbeUWKGmjTJqSiWMEArJxdN5HQuVx9E6W8ME0KKc1TA6GM2WvJu-1cyrRmIVVlAu3PvBGTC88rvXdHtSH1HZZw8Z8P4T5EjALmHmjtRPys_WaOyb6VALm2hJyabdDwCx7yPdnqbUcoxdWrTuW-qfxv3uPAL8BAAD__3lBUks) and took him through Cape Town, Perth, Istanbul, Cartagena, and Miami. Along the way, he endured blisters, freezing rain, and 100-degree heat. One of only 55 or so participants to compete in this year’s race, “More Miles Mike” said running has helped him manage his blood pressure and asthma. “As long as I’m running, I feel great,” he said.

The move would from the state’s current practice of busing migrants to so-called sanctuary cities, a strategy to highlight the need for enhanced border security and the effects of illegal immigration. Although Gov. Greg Abbott has yet to comment on the proposal, Tom Homan, President-elect Trump’s designated border czar, on the initiative. “We’re going to help them finish this job and secure Texas, and we’re going to work in partnership,” Homan said. ERCOT Says Grid Is Ready for Extreme Cold The meteorologist for ERCOT, Texas' power grid operator, has predicted a warmer-than-average winter but cautioned about an , similar to the conditions that caused widespread outages in February 2021. During a Tuesday board meeting, ERCOT CEO Pablo Vegas that the grid is prepared for an event similar to Winter Storm Uri, highlighting 3,000 weatherization inspections and the addition of over 10,000 megawatts of new power generation since 2021. Critics, however, warned that natural gas plants have and contended that too many energy-inefficient homes and buildings are straining the grid. We’re “better off than we were in February 2021 but not out of the woods,” said Doug Lewin, who authors a newsletter and hosts a podcast on the Texas energy market. Lubbock Man Ran 7 Marathons In 7 Days on 7 Continents Mike Rogers, a 71-year-old from Lubbock, last month, running seven marathons on seven continents in seven days to raise money for charity. “ They all think I’m crazy. My friends, my family, my church—everyone thinks I’m insane ,” Rogers said. The race and took him through Cape Town, Perth, Istanbul, Cartagena, and Miami. Along the way, he endured blisters, freezing rain, and 100-degree heat. One of only 55 or so participants to compete in this year’s race, “More Miles Mike” said running has helped him manage his blood pressure and asthma. “As long as I’m running, I feel great,” he said. | Stability. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2dd63ef58e942839e5b37defbba2c5f&_e=Ww6ualBL9QCixrWTgX2dayAXdQS_S3cNgxB3Y79TcVgre07pkkWxZE50m4cXH63TP4KUw9zT68JQFFn1z0hQLwYi5O5WzQ78_Jc0shT-oKRRwpaLuG3JdzGcZymUV5gVmV4--sX3TZbvO_2nDTbJgkyUTK2fvxsf-8vk4TLGemLHnQqwGV7Nie-QWKdAnKDFQ0HaVoGtulopEzIrHHSbqqsaDu-LwWnWZQ6X3beulsgwXhijoBnhtrWucaQe1_QMEmeu12kFXczNeLE8EkRSEJzJJhAtYsryrQUNc60Wd2uv2n5xuqz9vshMC_GatVnjDHx24xBOVtOW3lctL25M09VEtJHDLFFlyhFBFH5cmKNauj9HQPPBil-TGW7M4-tbarQTWYFcMRIyGxM_B8X0N9ztbdydx_uFyYJiLptRhi8HF7gwF6sw7JybP2m2STh3) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2dd63ef58e942839e5b37defbba2c5f&_e=Ww6ualBL9QCixrWTgX2dayAXdQS_S3cNgxB3Y79TcVgre07pkkWxZE50m4cXH63TP4KUw9zT68JQFFn1z0hQLwYi5O5WzQ78_Jc0shT-oKRRwpaLuG3JdzGcZymUV5gVmV4--sX3TZbvO_2nDTbJgkyUTK2fvxsf-8vk4TLGemLHnQqwGV7Nie-QWKdAnKDFQ0HaVoGtulopEzIrHHSbqqsaDu-LwWnWZQ6X3beulsgwXhijoBnhtrWucaQe1_QMEmeu12kFXczNeLE8EkRSEJzJJhAtYsryrQUNc60Wd2sRLjf1nP5iwLogUUATURvS1ue0GJsnPQyetUj6KiHgMA7Z8VAMnvFMP7qY0rlVf92oUnnrR9-L5vCr9KsB_E3wBQdCATykIPnRp0fH-iEOaT9geMOWyvNR_GVaXGqwl3uEkhJYIwG9FNR3tW_92slJ) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2dd63ef58e942839e5b37defbba2c5f&_e=Ww6ualBL9QCixrWTgX2dayAXdQS_S3cNgxB3Y79TcVgre07pkkWxZE50m4cXH63TP4KUw9zT68JQFFn1z0hQLwYi5O5WzQ78_Jc0shT-oKRRwpaLuG3JdzGcZymUV5gVmV4--sX3TZbvO_2nDTbJgkyUTK2fvxsf-8vk4TLGemLHnQqwGV7Nie-QWKdAnKDFQ0HaVoGtulopEzIrHHSbqqsaDu-LwWnWZQ6X3beulsgwXhijoBnhtrWucaQe1_QMEmeu12kFXczNeLE8EkRSEJzJJhAtYsryrQUNc60Wd2sYF1PFCL6QT442Ni7RfsUtE_gXKNt0DBGIyOxqjm_dN_Kb99dYqzXgH14CI7FVOJDY_A7JqwLV04zqgGBmLVkPTsj02IQjEkhuUkJRQMnnUb9a-WNuMT-W0Sy4A3KU1Ct6p4D9CZfXthBpx1-K8Lx9). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2dd63ef58e942839e5b37defbba2c5f&_e=Ww6ualBL9QCixrWTgX2dayAXdQS_S3cNgxB3Y79TcVgre07pkkWxZE50m4cXH63TP4KUw9zT68JQFFn1z0hQLwYi5O5WzQ78_Jc0shT-oKRRwpaLuG3JdzGcZymUV5gVmV4--sX3TZbvO_2nDTbJgkyUTK2fvxsf-8vk4TLGemLHnQqwGV7Nie-QWKdAnKDFQ0HaVoGtulopEzIrHHSbqqsaDu-LwWnWZQ6X3beulsgwXhijoBnhtrWucaQe1_QMEmeu12kFXczNeLE8EkRSEJzJJhAtYsryrQUNc60Wd2uhq4IvzcmNcvEHheh1SS1ZCmHC18xIXKuEfYhFoXOy6qPhDi4YK7-kQO6woLW_DGk4J3wxGON-9I7RcYlp7efPxLEQ8cv_HH6i865q6PQvckF8duDimBMBdnd4pLq9EhU7OhAgwHucfTbIPSZ_TeeX)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: The Flyover
subject: Healthcare CEO Murdered, Woman Vanishes in Sinkhole, and Unphotogenic Pets
body:
UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, 50, [was fatally shot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9u9CAQBPCnwR0Wu-B_BcXXuLuvTWntwXImwnCyyVl---iitOl-0kgz0nzclhvFFPPjP21saygLKjQSUKpu8RTTtZjG28CMrBu2MGitp7GfdLPa0AFOcO-gD6wo9OC81w5GGI3xDnUT7bsNUHUAeuj6FhFGQxQYdM93UMIo9rGWvf0sMdeVQ7rKi_fWla1Jdq31eQj9T-AscD7Ps813l_k83rnA-U2B89chf7VRloEqpXTJYy1V5svJtVRO8llSdCwPuuTuMsGIwzg1u_XPM6YUj34QRj02iulnvP51xsvidwAAAP__ag9hcg) Wednesday morning outside the Hilton hotel in Midtown Manhattan in what police described as a "premeditated, targeted attack."

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd7GAY7ApKK4Upcttt0TYHNus-LGAZJW3Xzlb77Yzn0Yz83E3d-uDT9t_G1G3NRtO-XBh_EKFcdaHlxk6p1dEjtChZiMAqEkq6HbtZokjm1fEeYFRwUxXwZQYlELJrMLO6zONcSoYg1HInnM2DdauyEDizCgZKDrfcuk_s09txzW88hNLv-TYBb23dlQC_wi_EX7z6Ym19YddbM0nccpwe7Roan6UBQlcXSw_frDJ-bQddkPC5clEdP4RCVwPW1rCUnd_sIleQIB57yVctmQj1j8Yw-goJgA6UdUV7Y4vH4KvciQD3aL14d28_fbkU_PvAAAA__9exHPS) | |
# Thursday, December 5, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1933, Utah became the 36th state to ratify the 21st Amendment, repealing the 18th Amendment and [bringing an end](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngQ2LOwgkA0MXb-na0SLhCFcRY9kolt--StW180_6Pv2_rtM1cuX58RmfFHpuE2q0ClDp05Qi12OyMoVMhGQkBfDGmMvZXYwswSeX70lDtBk8GcjJ3W8ZUPtk4ay15PBeA9QnAONPbkCEs40xExhHN9DCakrc2zp8N557oVyP9qJ1uLenrKH0vmzCfAgcBY77vg-Ft97W4-0Cx154Uykeimf1JwLHZW2Fb9y5zYrmtMk1pGXnWnlzXlj9eEauvw_9v-JXwJ8AAAD__9p7WT8) to the era of national prohibition of alcohol. We all love our pets, but perhaps you think yours is not so ready for a modeling career. Good news! There's an online community that specializes in [hilarious photos of various unphotogenic animals.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGPtCAQgOFfA50GBlS2oPgau_3aK80Ig84FxShZs__-stdf_-ZJ3q_n9ETOvC__cSNfU5lAgW00NKqbInJ-T1ZGn4iAjCSvB2PMw_UPI1ePw4A6pD44kwK6Rwg2JgeaQCvXpSTZfzQNqtPaDF3fAmhnERNp09OslbCKItdytt-F97pSyu_yorMNZZPZr7UelzD_BIwCxvu-27mcFA_cI34SASPuvGG-mpl4X5pI53E1B4dLwChPH4-bc-arH4RVy4acf-X61-nLw08AAAD__zWdVg8) We recommend it for a good laugh. We're flying today with our sponsors from [Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd7GAY7ApKK4Upcttt0TYHNus-LGAZJW3Xzlb77Yzn0Yz83E3d-uDT9t_G1G3NRtO-XBh_EKFcdaHlxk6p1dEjtChZiMAqEkq6HbtZokjm1fEeYFRwUxXwZQYlELJrMLO6zONcSoYg1HInnM2DdauyEDizCgZKDrfcuk_s09txzW88hNLv-TYBb23dlQC_wi_EX7z6Ym19YddbM0nccpwe7Roan6UBQlcXSw_frDJ-bQddkPC5clEdP4RCVwPW1rCUnd_sIleQIB57yVctmQj1j8Yw-goJgA6UdUV7Y4vH4KvciQD3aL14d28_fbkU_PvAAAA__9exHPS), offering a real estate investing opportunity you won't want to miss.
|
---
## Trump Eyes DeSantis to Replace Hegseth
President-elect Donald Trump is considering Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis as a [possible replacement for Pete Hegseth](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAURp8GOwxcRGcKim3sZtstDcJF7wbBADNm3n7j9n93ki85-XL-vJaXpUhp-20PNC3kBQQMXAIXevGW4ncZOm8CIqDq0MhJKfV8jE_V7UYP60NrD6iEfjqhQIx61TgFL2UA9B2Z2yZBaCnVpMceQD4GawNKNeIqBRsEemq59H8zpbZjiN_8wdK7fHTR7K2dlalfDGYG83VdvVtrwqveO4P5RgZzK-_j5C6nSh4LpY0XPKN1N-24VWw7v6jt3GO1qVHlHgOmiryiK9hs-fKa38XhbeuK8edFMVIdJzaI7bAU_x9qPwX6GPgXAAD__zLuatw), his controversial nominee for Secretary of Defense, sources report. Hegseth’s nomination has come under fire [over allegations of misconduct](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFzhCAQRn8NdjqwKEhBkYbu0qZ0iKwnGRRHNuf47zNcn-4VO2_ffF-P6eFjivvz029oackTcOhbAS0fpuBjuqe-CXZBBJQNWqGllGZURjarVVpqNNiPRmEIRmj0wyzFwM3oteGyibbaBPBBCKkH1QGIsfd-QSEVfgvOeo4hUj67nxx3WnFJd37h2c15a5JdiY7C5AcDx8Bd19X9Fk85-LseMHCF8nkzcDtehYE7cooU54qYcKaY98o1goETwMDxSgcStis-C9Laznmnsz4tdxtwwb1gW3A-kfzbrZVW3GjDuWbgmtOG44opxaI06_lz8zG9c-m_-V4W_gIAAP__HjBv0Q), including a 2017 sexual assault accusation he denies, as well as financial mismanagement, public intoxication, and opposition from several Republican senators.

Despite this, Hegseth has stated he will not withdraw from consideration, citing support from Donald Trump and a commitment to “keep fighting.”

Sources have confirmed that Trump has directly discussed the Defense Secretary position with DeSantis, who is reportedly "[very much in contention.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8Gd1j82MYpKG7jLrfd0prA2J4VBgRsrLz9Kum3-opPOjo6X_f1DhQo7v_hRNu2tCqhBi4VF-PqgcJrHTpvN0SFukMrjdb6Nk833R1WbwIczga8cKA1CufcBkKPKIXxaDqyb5pUYpRSm3HqlZLzALCh1BM-pGCDQE8tlf47UWwHbuGVnlh6l84u2KO1XJn-x9TC1HJdVx8fLuJV3z9TS06BGrnK1OJThOB5Kz9nZmr5LHcpVvJYKi-YAziKO8_YkB-4V2wHx_MBrQX0vKIr2KC8uMcNY0WeyfHiIshZGWO6Yn2-KASqk2GD2E-g8NFsf2V7WvUbAAD__-TNcy0)" DeSantis is a former U.S. Navy JAG officer and Bronze Star recipient.
## UnitedHealthcare CEO Killed in Targeted Murder
UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, 50, [was fatally shot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9u9CAQBPCnwR0Wu-B_BcXXuLuvTWntwXImwnCyyVl---iitOl-0kgz0nzclhvFFPPjP21saygLKjQSUKpu8RTTtZjG28CMrBu2MGitp7GfdLPa0AFOcO-gD6wo9OC81w5GGI3xDnUT7bsNUHUAeuj6FhFGQxQYdM93UMIo9rGWvf0sMdeVQ7rKi_fWla1Jdq31eQj9T-AscD7Ps813l_k83rnA-U2B89chf7VRloEqpXTJYy1V5svJtVRO8llSdCwPuuTuMsGIwzg1u_XPM6YUj34QRj02iulnvP51xsvidwAAAP__ag9hcg) Wednesday morning outside the Hilton hotel in Midtown Manhattan in what police described as a "premeditated, targeted attack." Surveillance footage captured the hooded gunman at a nearby Starbucks shortly before the shooting. The NYPD has released photos of the suspect, including one of him apparently aiming a handgun. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAQBeCnwR0RDP4tKG7jLrfd0sJmCGwwYwGJlbdfefvtRpqjT0fn677cTYghPf6bHXV1tICAlkvgolusCfGztI3VDhFQNajloJSaxn5SjdeDADlZtAhqsuuolFvltg6DGIfWdOiaoC9NguikVEPX3wDk2BrjUKoeVylYK9CGSvn2TSFVjy5-6I35ttHeRO1rPQpT_xjMDOb0OajU68VgvmAGswQGs7iuV-EJz3Ll8OSHp0qFF08nf6VQ0Xo0sfrNZOQbEl9zMIlXT_tRKBX-DDFi5iHxUk1eX9uz8BUdZbwQqiE9GMxN1vY4Q4yh9ANrxWM3If6WrX-N99bwEwAA__9K33K3). The suspect reportedly waited near the scene before firing multiple shots, striking Thompson in the back and leg, and fleeing on an [e-Citi Bike into Central Park](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8GOiIY8A8FxW3c5bZbWsSMw6yIscwkK7_9KttstfWn7xzpfFzna6RC2_1_fGDgtc6gwSkDSndzilTO2ckUVkRAKzGYwVrrx95bmQMsbox2NKuPNt586lzS_erBpcF7DyApvGkGdGeMHbr-AmBGF-OKxvZ4M1o4jYm4HpfPShtnXMtZX3hclvqQJWTmvQn7T8AkYOKMmUp5bwKmvRZaTgFTxlg4L_FAAVOnAXSv1XbuSR1YMDZsas-Va1Pt2XZcWD03Yky_P7VgVS3XyrTdBUzyCGn_olKo9YNw-v6I9KOV_FeiV4DvAAAA__8TkWmW). Thompson, in town to speak at an investor conference, had reportedly received threats related to his role as CEO of America’s largest private insurer.
## Woman Vanishes in Sinkhole Searching for Cat
A 64-year-old woman disappeared on Monday in Unity Township, Pennsylvania, after a sinkhole suddenly formed as she searched for her cat, Pepper. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1q9DAQAJ9G7mysleSfQsUHH-4uTQgpzdpa25vI0iGJO_z24dKnHhiG-bzNN2TPYX_Dk2zZ4gwt6FpC3ZrZIftr1pWzGxGQqsjKXik1Dt2oqsNuY7_gsko0ehwULUbrnhY1bJ0ZBoe6YvuySWiNlKo3XQMgB424kVQdLbIVuiXHJabmK3IoB23-ig9KzRrPytujlHsW6p-AScCEyxromZs9vrCA6eNdwHRyzhz2ek8Y3BnLQam-Uwj58g8MjHXm8H1ET3UmTOshYMolpkuoiZ1Q_6XstFQGZJWsuz_Ze85dL3S7n8j-N6T8NeZh4ScAAP__ZpxlSQ). [Elizabeth Pollard's car was found nearby](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAQQL8GOwzMgLoFxTV2e-2VBmVY5wKyUW6Nf3_Z669-yXvJ-7pPd8-Jt8enz-RqLBMoMFKDVHYKntM1mSa4SASEDTndI-Jt6G7YrG6mGWNUGDpjsL_N1sTB-iHivHjTUWjYvW0alNUae9u1AHow3kfS2NGslTCKAteyt9-Ft7pSTFd50d4uJTfJrbU-D4EfAkYB43me7eXXUt5UwLjReQgYdzqWH5LLTuchN__ih68kl5Kfe8l8UJCZN5K6V6htr2271pya3YXnySnx0fXCqEf2nP6q9b8LLwe_AQAA__9Ffl91) with her 5-year-old granddaughter safe inside, who told authorities her grandmother didn’t return after leaving to find the cat. Authorities believe the sinkhole, linked to a former coal mine, gave way beneath her. A shoe believed to belong to Pollard was found 30 feet below the surface. body:
We have numerous impactful projects and content designed to make a difference during the off-year and heading into the midterms. Your feedback on these ideas would be invaluable in helping us keep our base informed and engaged.

folks, As we continue the important work ahead, we recognize that moving forward requires more than just talking; it’s also about listening. We’re reaching out to ask for your input through a brief survey. We know that a lot of mistakes were made during the 2024 election, and we weren’t immune to those mistakes. But we also know that reflection must be a two-way street. In order to grow and improve, it’s essential that we hear from you. Your insights, concerns, and ideas are crucial as we chart the best path forward. We’re asking you to take just a few minutes to fill out a short survey. Your feedback will help us:
* Focus on the issues that matter most to our communities.
* Share opportunities for involvement that align with your passions.
* Build on big ideas and projects that create real change at the grassroots level.

Your insights are critical as we work toward a stronger, more connected movement heading into the midterms.

name: History Facts
subject: This country banned beer for 75 years
body:
If you wanted to drink beer in Iceland between 1915 and 1989, you’d have to break the law to do so. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmbau2vmiadz4208ajtsu4bvh3vs214qfl6xysm26lmyia4bi9xy3jnlcgnd4puwr55s1tbl0scrbytgr7uwh9jf7drhehmqzqw8f7xtmlq9zdpmod5xhxg8xelx46ytkpiq8ltv87mtdtp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [Beer was banned in Iceland for nearly 75 years, until 1989.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I f you wanted to drink beer in Iceland between 1915 and 1989, you’d have to break the law to do so. The alcoholic beverage was [banned](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in the small Nordic country for nearly 75 years, with the prohibition period beginning five years earlier than it did in the U.S.. The ban followed a 1908 [referendum](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that received 60% of the vote, indicating most of the country was initially in favor of prohibition. At first, all alcohol was forbidden, but wine became legal again in 1922 and all spirits except beer followed suit in 1935. Beer, however, remained forbidden for another half century.
---
Though all alcohol consumption was frowned upon at the time, beer was especially out of favor because Icelanders associated it with their fiercest rival: Denmark, from whom they were struggling to gain independence (a victory they didn’t fully achieve until 1944). Imbibing lagers and ales was therefore considered unpatriotic, a sentiment that took decades to fizzle out. The beer ban ended on March 1, 1989, a date that has been celebrated as [Bjórdagur](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=uogjbh1wjaik5op5aibex0p78gjwddvikizn49th08wc83uztk0b2a3bzylfembnjvmlxz1i1krrnr4b3w6plsotk84ih6ngegx2vbahjiqesic20ste0swe9xahcsq51c2utkdbrqjonkk5n78g70z83eh44hxy2xirk48g2pkb3ccusl5b1aryhlmplh1k6km4fz447drqdi5mg03nbe9qnwf0q5h354l5lau9ubuqq2hbzu4a4tbffh1wip35lkta7o93pnboiz60gjlknsgu7hjt0fi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) (“Beer Day”) ever since.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## About 60% of Iceland’s population lives in or near Reykjavik.
Reykjavik isn’t just Iceland’s capital and most populous city — it’s home to nearly [two-thirds](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so0s8g&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of the entire country’s population. Approximately 382,000 people live in Iceland, about 60% of whom are in the capital region and 123,000 of whom are in Reykjavik proper. The capital region includes the nearby municipalities of Kópavogur, Garðabær, Mosfellsbær, and Hafnarfjörður. At 39,768 square miles, Iceland itself isn’t exactly small; it’s the world’s 18th-largest island and roughly the same size as Ohio. But outside of the capital area, it’s very sparsely populated.

clean_body: If you wanted to drink beer in Iceland between 1915 and 1989, you’d have to break the law to do so. | I f you wanted to drink beer in Iceland between 1915 and 1989, you’d have to break the law to do so. The alcoholic beverage was in the small Nordic country for nearly 75 years, with the prohibition period beginning five years earlier than it did in the U.S.. The ban followed a 1908 that received 60% of the vote, indicating most of the country was initially in favor of prohibition. At first, all alcohol was forbidden, but wine became legal again in 1922 and all spirits except beer followed suit in 1935. Beer, however, remained forbidden for another half century. Though all alcohol consumption was frowned upon at the time, beer was especially out of favor because Icelanders associated it with their fiercest rival: Denmark, from whom they were struggling to gain independence (a victory they didn’t fully achieve until 1944). Imbibing lagers and ales was therefore considered unpatriotic, a sentiment that took decades to fizzle out. The beer ban ended on March 1, 1989, a date that has been celebrated as (“Beer Day”) ever since. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Score of Iceland’s shocking victory over England in a 2016 soccer match 2-1 | | Alcohol by volume of Snake Venom, the world’s strongest beer 67.5% | Alcohol by volume of Snake Venom, the world’s strongest beer 67.5% | | Presidents of Iceland since it gained independence in 1944 7 | | Miles of coastline in Iceland 3,700 | Miles of coastline in Iceland 3,700 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- About 60% of Iceland’s population lives in or near Reykjavik. Reykjavik isn’t just Iceland’s capital and most populous city — it’s home to nearly of the entire country’s population. Approximately 382,000 people live in Iceland, about 60% of whom are in the capital region and 123,000 of whom are in Reykjavik proper. The capital region includes the nearby municipalities of Kópavogur, Garðabær, Mosfellsbær, and Hafnarfjörður. At 39,768 square miles, Iceland itself isn’t exactly small; it’s the world’s 18th-largest island and roughly the same size as Ohio. But outside of the capital area, it’s very sparsely populated. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/5/2024
body:
Drive less, bike more? Polis’ transportation vision faces public backlash in one city
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Today's edition of the Mountain Minute is ALL original Rocky Mountain Voice content! And that doesn't even cover it all. Make sure you're checking out our RMV Originals towards the bottom of the newsletter ("Only on Rocky Mountain Voice") and checking the website for more great content!
Here’s a summary of today's newsletter:
**Here in Colorado...** Governor Jared Polis’ “Colorado Transportation Vision 2035” is facing backlash, with a plan to [build 3,540 miles of new bike lanes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), nearly doubling non-auto transportation modes by 2035 to meet climate goals. Colorado House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost sums up his anticipation toward a [new leadership role](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, Colorado's Gays Against Groomers head [advocates at U.S. Supreme Court](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and the Colorado GOP is petitioning Trump to [revoke and rescind](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) the pardon of Hunter Biden.
**On the national stage (not featured below but for your own reading)...** Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister has [withdrawn from consideration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to head the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA), Georgia judge ordered Fulton County District Attorney Fani Williams to [hand over records](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson was fatally shot outside Midtown Hilton hotel in [targeted attack](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Lastly, Pete Hegseth is [not backing down](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) despite attacks on his character. ****
**Commentary Spotlight...** The [controversy over the Dolores River National Conservation Area](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) highlights concerns about transparency and local representation as rural communities push back against claims of unified support for the proposal.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, December 5, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Drive less, bike more? Polis’ transportation vision faces public backlash in one city](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Gov. Jared Polis’ Administration plans to build 3,540 miles of new bicycle lanes, an 81% increase from the current reality.
This goal is one of many outlined in his Administration’s “Colorado Transportation Vision 2035.” The plan is aimed to play a role in helping meet the state’s climate goals.
An underlying agenda, or one sub-goal, is explicitly stated in the plan: “Doubling Colorado’s non-auto mode share from today’s level of 9.6% to 19.2% by 2035.” But what does this administrative jargon mean exactly?
No speculation is needed. The answer is provided in the plan. “This means that the percentage of trips where people choose to take transit, walk, bike or roll (instead of driving alone) would slightly more than double between 2024 and 2035.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[‘Is it January yet?,’ new Colorado House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost asks](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost expressed excitement for January, symbolizing the inauguration of President Donald Trump and the addition of three Republican seats in the state House, breaking a decade-long Democrat supermajority.
* Armagost strongly criticized the Democratic Party, describing them as "morally bankrupt" and emphasizing issues like Hunter Biden's pardon, which he used to highlight alleged hypocrisy and neglect of victims.
* He celebrated Republican victories in Colorado's Districts 16, 19, and 50, urging voters to continue supporting conservative leadership and leveraging the momentum to bring broader change in governance.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[‘There’s nothing affirming or inclusive about lying to children’: Gays Against Groomers head advocates at U.S. Supreme Court](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Dr. Rich Guggenheim, director of legislation for Gays Against Groomers, spoke at the U.S. Supreme Court, condemning the use of puberty blockers and irreversible medical treatments for children, which he described as harmful and life-altering.

* Guggenheim highlighted the risks of gender-affirming treatments, citing testimonies from detransitioners and emphasizing the psychological and physical consequences of these interventions on children.

* He urged parents, educators, and advocates to actively participate in local and state government, emphasizing the importance of community involvement in protecting children and ensuring evidence-based, ethical treatment practices.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado GOP petitioning Trump to ‘revoke and rescind illegal pardon’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado GOP is urging President-elect Donald Trump to revoke Hunter Biden's recent pardon issued by President Joe Biden, citing it as unconstitutional and a conflict of interest.

* The GOP claims the pardon serves as a cover-up to prevent future investigations into the Biden family and highlights issues of alleged double standards in the justice system.

* The petition, spearheaded by Colorado GOP Chairman Dave Williams, aims to collect signatures and requests Trump to investigate and prosecute Hunter Biden's alleged crimes.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Pond: Transparency matters in the Dolores River National Conservation Area controversy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN M. POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_In recent proceedings, Mesa County Commissioner Cody Davis made a bold claim before Colorado’s County Commissioners, asserting that there is unified support for a proposed National Conservation Area (NCA) along the Dolores River._
_However, this statement fundamentally misrepresents the complex reality facing local communities and stakeholders._
_The communities of Gateway, Nucla, Naturita, Bedrock, Paradox and surrounding areas stand in stark opposition to the proposed NCA. Their voices — the voices of those who live, work and deeply understand the local landscape — have been conspicuously absent from the decision-making process._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Lee and Lundberg: A call to get involved with Protect Kids Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY ERIN LEE & KEVIN LUNDBERG | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 4** _Protect Kids Colorado (PKC) first launched earlier this year with two citizen initiatives to address the harm being caused by gender ideology in our public schools._
**[‘Most corrupt and partisan President our nation has ever seen’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER | NATIONAL | DECEMBER 3** _The question 4th District U.S. Rep. Ken Buck, R-Windsor, once popularly asked was “Where’s Hunter?” Now, the nation and his successor, U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert, R-Windsor, want to know “Why Hunter?"_ __
[**Garbo: Hunter Biden’s pardon is the apex of corruption**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY C.J. GARBO | COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 3** _President Joe Biden’s sweeping pardon of his son, Hunter Biden, covering all crimes committed or potentially committed between 2014 and 2024, represents not only a historic abuse of power but a grave affront to the principles of justice and democracy._

clean_body: Drive less, bike more? Polis’ transportation vision faces public backlash in one city | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi folks, Today's edition of the Mountain Minute is ALL original Rocky Mountain Voice content! And that doesn't even cover it all. Make sure you're checking out our RMV Originals towards the bottom of the newsletter ("Only on Rocky Mountain Voice") and checking the website for more great content! Here’s a summary of today's newsletter: Here in Colorado... Governor Jared Polis’ “Colorado Transportation Vision 2035” is facing backlash, with a plan to , nearly doubling non-auto transportation modes by 2035 to meet climate goals. Colorado House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost sums up his anticipation toward a . Meanwhile, Colorado's Gays Against Groomers head and the Colorado GOP is petitioning Trump to the pardon of Hunter Biden. On the national stage (not featured below but for your own reading)... Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister has to head the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA), Georgia judge ordered Fulton County District Attorney Fani Williams to , and UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson was fatally shot outside Midtown Hilton hotel in . Lastly, Pete Hegseth is despite attacks on his character. ** Commentary Spotlight... The highlights concerns about transparency and local representation as rural communities push back against claims of unified support for the proposal. This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, December 5, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, Gov. Jared Polis’ Administration plans to build 3,540 miles of new bicycle lanes, an 81% increase from the current reality. This goal is one of many outlined in his Administration’s “Colorado Transportation Vision 2035.” The plan is aimed to play a role in helping meet the state’s climate goals. An underlying agenda, or one sub-goal, is explicitly stated in the plan: “Doubling Colorado’s non-auto mode share from today’s level of 9.6% to 19.2% by 2035.” But what does this administrative jargon mean exactly? No speculation is needed. The answer is provided in the plan. “This means that the percentage of trips where people choose to take transit, walk, bike or roll (instead of driving alone) would slightly more than double between 2024 and 2035.” | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Colorado House Minority Whip Ryan Armagost expressed excitement for January, symbolizing the inauguration of President Donald Trump and the addition of three Republican seats in the state House, breaking a decade-long Democrat supermajority. Armagost strongly criticized the Democratic Party, describing them as "morally bankrupt" and emphasizing issues like Hunter Biden's pardon, which he used to highlight alleged hypocrisy and neglect of victims. He celebrated Republican victories in Colorado's Districts 16, 19, and 50, urging voters to continue supporting conservative leadership and leveraging the momentum to bring broader change in governance. | Dr. Rich Guggenheim, director of legislation for Gays Against Groomers, spoke at the U.S. Supreme Court, condemning the use of puberty blockers and irreversible medical treatments for children, which he described as harmful and life-altering. Guggenheim highlighted the risks of gender-affirming treatments, citing testimonies from detransitioners and emphasizing the psychological and physical consequences of these interventions on children. He urged parents, educators, and advocates to actively participate in local and state government, emphasizing the importance of community involvement in protecting children and ensuring evidence-based, ethical treatment practices. | The Colorado GOP is urging President-elect Donald Trump to revoke Hunter Biden's recent pardon issued by President Joe Biden, citing it as unconstitutional and a conflict of interest. The GOP claims the pardon serves as a cover-up to prevent future investigations into the Biden family and highlights issues of alleged double standards in the justice system. The petition, spearheaded by Colorado GOP Chairman Dave Williams, aims to collect signatures and requests Trump to investigate and prosecute Hunter Biden's alleged crimes. | BY SEAN M. POND, In recent proceedings, Mesa County Commissioner Cody Davis made a bold claim before Colorado’s County Commissioners, asserting that there is unified support for a proposed National Conservation Area (NCA) along the Dolores River. However, this statement fundamentally misrepresents the complex reality facing local communities and stakeholders. The communities of Gateway, Nucla, Naturita, Bedrock, Paradox and surrounding areas stand in stark opposition to the proposed NCA. Their voices — the voices of those who live, work and deeply understand the local landscape — have been conspicuously absent from the decision-making process. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ ERIN LEE & KEVIN LUNDBERG | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 4 Protect Kids Colorado (PKC) first launched earlier this year with two citizen initiatives to address the harm being caused by gender ideology in our public schools. BRIAN PORTER | NATIONAL | DECEMBER 3 The question 4th District U.S. Rep. Ken Buck, R-Windsor, once popularly asked was “Where’s Hunter?” Now, the nation and his successor, U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert, R-Windsor, want to know “Why Hunter?" C.J. GARBO | COMMENTARY |DECEMBER 3 President Joe Biden’s sweeping pardon of his son, Hunter Biden, covering all crimes committed or potentially committed between 2014 and 2024, represents not only a historic abuse of power but a grave affront to the principles of justice and democracy.
