subject: Dive Deeper into Revelation with Dr. Robert Jeffress
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWHs3B_WeN

If you take a step back and look at global events through the
lens of someone who isn't a Christian,

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHs3B_WeN

Hello
Friend,
The Book
of Revelation can be one of the most challenging books of the
Bible to understand, but its message is critical for every
believer. That's why I've created Final Conquest: A
Verse-by-Verse Study of the Book of Revelation-a clear and
accessible guide that breaks down complex prophecies into
practical, easy-to-understand insights.

This
resource is designed exclusively for those who want to deepen
their understanding of the end times and live with greater
purpose in light of Christ's return. Whether you've studied
Revelation before or are approaching it for the first time, Final
Conquest offers clarity on what's to come and how to prepare your
heart for the future.
As the
Senior Pastor of First Baptist Dallas and Pathway to Victory,
I've spent years studying and teaching through Revelation,
ensuring that this book is both biblically sound and grounded in
trustworthy scholarship. You can be confident that Final Conquest
will provide a credible and reliable exploration of the final
book of the Bible.

For your
gift of any amount to Pathway to Victory, I'd be honored to send
you this exclusive resource. It's an invaluable tool that will
help you navigate the future with confidence and hope, all while
deepening your walk with Christ.

Request
your copy here:
https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1

Thank you
for joining us in sharing the truth of God's Word. Together, we
can help others live with clarity and purpose as we look forward
to Christ's return.

Sharing
the truth of God's Word,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress

Several major companies (including Amazon, Walmart, Barnes & Noble and more) have decided it’s against Americans’ best interests to carry a new book on their store shelves.

And the reason why should have you fuming...

The book is called _The First 72 Hours._

_The First 72 Hours_ was written by one of the world's leading survival authors, Damian Campbell.

And the reason these companies **won’t allow you to buy his book** is because it exposes how the left is using the current political unrest to steal our freedom in ways we never imagined...

And it teaches you how to prepare for the coming collapse.

The secrets in this book are well-known by government insiders...

And Cambell has put them all in this book in an attempt to warn you about what is going to happen in the next few months.

Since Campbell isn’t allowed to sell this book in stores we convinced him to let us hand out a few copies at a **deep discount.**

However, once you get access to this book ** _you’ll need to review it ASAP._**

I can’t tell you when **the S will hit the F.** But I can tell you Jesus was right that no man knows the hour - and that we should be vigilant and prepared.

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

[Click here for 24% off an annual plan](https://substack.com/redirect/4c2a222e-db8c-4b04-a872-9bab96a04a80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's face it -- 2024 was a long, difficult year. But if you're reading this, you've made it this far!
In 2024, Mesoscale News brought you more than 100 articles and dozens of podcast episodes to keep you current on world events, meeting my promise at the beginning of the year to bring you more frequent and diverse coverage.
Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..un1oUpnEMJGyumoivpShIUrEpsULWsaMV5osk7MaYsI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152576499)
Some of the coverage your subscription brought you in 2024 included:
A first look a[t bombshell documents](https://substack.com/redirect/4c2a222e-db8c-4b04-a872-9bab96a04a80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) made public by[ Boeing whistleblower Ed Pierson](https://substack.com/redirect/5f6ea762-5ebc-48f4-a504-b39c1a8edac0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), plus coverage on other [Whistleblower news and issues](https://substack.com/redirect/09288243-c5b1-4c1d-bc40-220e04585d8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Including [personalized invitation](https://substack.com/redirect/d2245ca9-3f58-4ba3-a7bc-cf775b4b2661?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)s to the sneak-peak showing of the documentary about my story in Florida)
Project 2025 plans regarding [NOAA a](https://substack.com/redirect/6027c8d8-d8ef-4f04-8672-822d2515cc9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)nd our national weather and climate agencies
Expert review of[ tracking deaths in Palestine](https://substack.com/redirect/0d34dab3-664d-4999-a67e-a74bd05835f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Early reporting on the death of an[ Oklahoma student](https://substack.com/redirect/2ed2bb66-a697-4632-909c-79bcb70f6408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) attacked for being LGBT
Florida's [elections,](https://substack.com/redirect/0b9dd46d-1a8d-40c7-ab14-96b0b907faa9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [politicians](https://substack.com/redirect/e9fd4122-3139-4aa1-ba82-035bcdd42c53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ([bad guys on both sides](https://substack.com/redirect/b52ab26b-616c-43a3-8781-5f0cc7843fa3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and[ insider breaking news](https://substack.com/redirect/aa097dc7-6a9d-4fb5-97d1-437ea5f20c09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Spotlights on key issues and data sets, including: [Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women](https://substack.com/redirect/ce8d36e4-79ea-410f-8ac9-2fc2b631bd30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [H5N1](https://substack.com/redirect/b2583d3d-da13-4522-acdc-bb403f579a10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [measles](https://substack.com/redirect/9700cbb5-7972-4bfa-982d-4fc2c902aac5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Vibrio vulnificus](https://substack.com/redirect/964df03d-40ae-437a-a917-41043e2b136d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and more.
Frequent posting about [hurricane season](https://substack.com/redirect/0af503de-d131-4a78-a3c8-ee0f7477855a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [storm tracking,](https://substack.com/redirect/9b01f397-acd0-41e0-a7b5-fd00a7193bff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [climate change](https://substack.com/redirect/ed244503-4dcf-486e-9460-0d987a884149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [breaking disaster news](https://substack.com/redirect/420cd97a-9227-4cbe-b120-148e2d54440f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and global[ disaster briefs.](https://substack.com/redirect/94369750-54c9-4baa-8701-53afdbd6eed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And of course development in lawsuits against Florida -- both[ for myself ](https://substack.com/redirect/a8b28d67-852d-4315-8a5b-5996ee9acb4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and other high-profile cases.
Information from reliable, trustworthy sources will become even more important when the Trump administration takes over in 2025 -- especially when it comes to coverage about natural disasters and climate change.
In 2024, I dedicated 30% of my posts to climate-related news and issues.
I'll be adding to that coverage of next week's annual meeting of the American Geophysical Union in Washington, DC, as well as my annual look at hurricane data and climate change data for the year in review.
**For now until December 31, you can save 24% off an annual subscription to Mesoscale for news that won 't dance around the details, be intimidated by political pressure, and can't be corrupted or silenced.**
[Click here for 24% off](https://substack.com/redirect/4c2a222e-db8c-4b04-a872-9bab96a04a80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I'm looking forward to covering whatever comes next with the same exclusive, unique and sharp analysis you've come to know me for.
Thank you!
-Rebekah

name: Tom Fitton
subject: FWD 169 Lawsuits!
body:
I just reviewed this month’s “Litigation Status Report,” which is an internal, first-of-the-month snapshot of where all our active lawsuits are in the judicial process.

| Dear Fellow American,

I sent this email to you just two weeks ago, and in that time we have filed three more federal lawsuits!

Our newest lawsuits are against three different federal agencies, and we have filed them because government bureaucrats are stonewalling us.

And believe me...if Judicial Watch doesn't file these lawsuits to force the release of documents and records the American people have a right to see, no one will!

So, now we are up to litigating 172 active lawsuits...and [**it would really be a big help to us if you can support us at this very important time.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71397&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

Thank you so much!

Tom Fitton
Judicial Watch

* * *

**From:** Tom Fitton
**Date:** Thur, Nov 21, 2024 at 9:14 AM
**Subject:** 169 Lawsuits!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I just reviewed this month's "**Litigation Status Report** ," which is an internal, first-of-the-month snapshot of where all our active lawsuits are in the judicial process.
And it shows that Judicial Watch is currently pursuing a stunning total of **169 active lawsuits** on behalf of the rule of law and the American people's "right to know!"
This represents a **25% increase** over the 135 active lawsuits we were carrying just one year ago!
[**And that’s why I hope I can count on you to support us today with a special contribution.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71397&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71397&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

_Thanks to our members and supporters across America_ , no one in Washington fights as effectively through the legal system and the courts _against_ corrupt politicians in both parties and _in support_ of conservative values as Judicial Watch. Over the past year:

* We exposed the collaboration between Big Tech and government entities to curtail free speech;

* We removed more ineligible names from "dirty" voter rolls, putting us over 4.5 million total ineligible names removed from voter lists around the country;

* We stopped the state of Mississippi from counting votes for 5 days after election day;

* We got to the truth about the COVID scandal;

* We exposed the legal lawfare against President Trump instigated by the Biden-Harris Justice Department;

* And we educated millions of Americans about important corruption issues facing our nation.

But our legal (and all our) work carries _very real costs_ with it...especially since most of our lawsuits are filed _against federal and state government agencies_ , who have deep pockets thanks to being funded by taxpayers!

_And those costs increase every time we file a new lawsuit_ ...which is [**why I hope you will help us today.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71397&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71397&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Your gift now will help us carry forward all 169 of our active lawsuits... _and just as importantly, stay on track with the essential research and investigations that set the stage for each and every lawsuit we file_.

Your support will also help us be able to take on new investigations and lawsuits as new challenges to the rule of law arise... _and based on our 30 years of experience, we know they will_!

**Thank you in advance for helping us fight for you and for the rule of law!**

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71397&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

|
---
|

Washington, DC 20024

name: The Collective PAC
subject: we’re not giving up — are you with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFdYH7PLeLvKWS5YPOPxFapptzX9z14vJzX7Lzoz63lsoDLbpcf9W-d56a3ENRzGBPffrsGpAFUv0DqMP7jiFOLkLu8pA5yAdwYTAF-xL8FC4rvkjKV1n_Y0IhiZpV4QpUyNiIB74CvW8hj1-4d0iNHphrKd0kHtyZE7j1USECi_b1nokEPG17bEigN_Exx67xXpvGKpAJ7BmYKNeeV3UGzY3ahkuhrwziJZDyBGcpN-aHl3ZzYrxWfBkzdwfVRhSgwcimLc5cgnWYiUfo2K8TYQvsrwwiMgmv6xyKf6NadjQOPP4iSzDWKPIxQg1nYkHkEhM3z74KL0boKCFp5LX1nJ9AG0q2SP0QmY2oBZBeKjRx/4c1/uq-_dR66TiqGH7Vv41xMFQ/h0/h001.DytAkJ3qc4-vj7TmXCpV1ji_dCoxgJtuchGeOX-B5fs) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3827zUq3-7kT__C1-tquGnudn_qxdHwWlizHWpq0mPSCOf-ClPQyKjyJEJFFR5zc2ZCRn51UC6q2Agp2Te_Dg8RGhGsa04PhcbJ5P0PppVbeYIcXm1qRuDajjQ4xX9WdaOSBFXUwinR9SX0sOSP-xIqPDI5RWG7ug-okmuYod7uZ5yKU20TkQmRE1RT-JntFkN7tBWY7aFc7j4IkCxPk1roKu9eMsTYrDLC7iv_a0QgJCmmuykG8QDaAWRpXOwbYrEm5d4liH-KLhNB_mLhhdltljrb7QcWBM5bf0aKz2UHFpb4uzLltiw45sCPhKPhEbVussyZIrP1ya9usdHPVtpk/4c1/uq-_dR66TiqGH7Vv41xMFQ/h1/h001.fpr87bQ99TibBYTmIKiVbKh7FcOA9B0_XPiNc_U53Gs) It’s easy to feel disheartened by setbacks, but as Stacey Abrams recently reminded us:
“Losing an election does not deny us power unless we _choose_ to relinquish it. I mean it, we have to _choose_ to give up. We have to _choose_ to give in. We have to _choose_ not to try. But I don't think we will.”

Today, we’re calling on you to stand with us and send a clear message: We will not give up. We will not back down. We will not stop fighting for the change our communities deserve.

**[Will you sign our petition today and show the country this fight is far from over?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3827zUq3-7kT__C1-tquGnudn_qxdHwWlizHWpq0mPSCOf-ClPQyKjyJEJFFR5zc2ZCRn51UC6q2Agp2Te_Dg8RGhGsa04PhcbJ5P0PppVbeYIcXm1qRuDajjQ4xX9WdaOSBFXUwinR9SX0sOSP-xIqgQLXQOXBY5IYAYYddO6wQFeQW0cupFATrVjxFlKDtKT4SlGZiyHlWCT8zZSKAF4GT-u6fjqh7g2JVhCr3BW1EGuX92lzS3EFESuubGqYuPQf3T3-O-GjrUWDF0w8DS9F5XCbvt-vUoND4DoQ6XC-_MbWHbp28Ed2e7KOYEoHVLyNTDYCnMkf36cDte7crLR8/4c1/uq-_dR66TiqGH7Vv41xMFQ/h2/h001.0klIUJSmYAJn00uKz-NwK8nf1hDlD3Fhi4BmJhI8CK0)** | | [SIGN ON →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3827zUq3-7kT__C1-tquGnudn_qxdHwWlizHWpq0mPSCOf-ClPQyKjyJEJFFR5zc2ZCRn51UC6q2Agp2Te_Dg8RGhGsa04PhcbJ5P0PppVbeYIcXm1qRuDajjQ4xX9WdaOSBFXUwinR9SX0sOSP-xIq8aJpszzkNgm5osf-RR2X5cT9jiZNw1zbO_r4gbsect2NF7gXv4mgx5bs643Ym1oa2y6T3c8ZzFz2CySnl_O1AASAcIi8g0eWZS504AS8wI_wySSFPShaixPh6TZQidHVZTEOMdZE1CkJ-mG5UrzIuf-WR5i8QSOw9aw2egh3Cn_lhuiwenyPcFcFSrdCUdhK/4c1/uq-_dR66TiqGH7Vv41xMFQ/h3/h001.z5V-U6in4UOmoJhql9iw11PIP-FPhTGAkyspNOuS5jE)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | It’s easy to feel disheartened by setbacks, but as Stacey Abrams recently reminded us: “Losing an election does not deny us power unless we choose to relinquish it. I mean it, we have to choose to give up. We have to choose to give in. We have to choose not to try. But I don't think we will.” Today, we’re calling on you to stand with us and send a clear message: We will not give up. We will not back down. We will not stop fighting for the change our communities deserve. | | Every signature is a declaration that we will continue to push forward, a testament to our commitment to progress, no matter the circumstances. The road ahead won’t be easy, but as Abrams so powerfully said, “we can do it anyway, because it is our right.” Thank you for standing with us as the fight continues. Together, we are unstoppable. In solidarity, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: In NJ, we know a little bit about corruption…
body:
Peter, By now, you’ve probably heard that President Joe Biden went back on his word to the American people and pardoned Hunte
|
---
| Peter, By now, you’ve probably heard that President Joe Biden went back on his word to the American people and pardoned Hunter for two felony charges. _“...A Full and Unconditional Pardon for those offenses against the United States which he has committed or may have committed...”_ After peddling his father’s influence around the globe for corrupt financial gain, his father is now using the office entrusted to him by the American people to wipe it all away. Nothing to see here. No accountability. But to us New Jerseyans, this kind of corruption feels familiar and not at all surprising. (*ahem...Bob Menendez and his wife, anyone?) And that’s just sad, honestly.
---
| | [JOIN Common Sense Club – Say No Thanks to Political Corruption](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/2e47af0f381f52f4b38357f6ac6ec2dd/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVxtYs3ERHRPESdw4-hltwP1jEy8b-3VtSlIJjTzDPP8M4EhLKSlLUQwpVujPnggMGGa46SYiWpah5Ttg4833Og4_KcGjVoCKevy29gafuMBQ7QqNEiu20U51mZHoqszC2pK2Nv_OnxP55kE2UFzPNPMQpOycW6ewjJDLgkarlNRXvTWf5EpPvQdRslhJI92mq6oV4pc3QFihpNf-LataZKa5Tt6w05jk_ffAeqFGZd)
---
| | [Already a member? Invite a friend to JOIN](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/c5630609f5d93f23242186ab61782214/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1sXatGLJrohIqbrwAepGQjpqUNOQjmIt_XdTFVcKbmfOPcOdGgi10JTmwOFGd8ZC8MCiVEahpkGhScjnlvWiIAw8OCl9HNniYoDXX8MfoB2HjMUeUGXQIYtZMsjS6Wg7TqeZI42w7safnjD6eIaTJB1D0_wU41nR8OrcJXCyF2wb5cq1oqU9Of5AZEru-3mhBWGnJKsMdmRx9ncbxFUs52sZ9aP9pNs9Op0wBnX-_kWG1UvaPAB0_Waa)
---
| We shouldn’t _have_ to accept corruption as usual. We shouldn’t _have_ to put up with politicians who say anything to get elected and then play for their own gain and answer to party bosses instead of the people. These lemons have got to go. Stay tuned for a project that aims to address that head on... More to come! In the meantime, the Common Sense Club is your home for taking on Left Wing Lunacy and saving our state. We’re calling out the BS. And if the results of November 5th are any indicator, common sense is on the move.
---
|
---
| **Share this on[Facebook](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/0869badfadbcfaa0bff8d8ab19308a53/eJyNkWFrwjAQhv9LYN-KtamdszBG6Zy0dTJEHfs00uZKM22SJdHaSf-70YmfHAwCF-6ee-9e7oAMcMJNQlGI9uYHYx85SEHBJANuYsENKc5VHAw833PQhvH1RImtROHhZvMVOKV97PcdZFoJFlnMozhLZpPPaTLLLCmJsjP-qzO46oxfo2SKuu5PYaiZGe-stkahUVs4OaLMujJLtbF8ZYzUoes2TdMrSQG5EOteIWpXV3YldQk9Wcmn7eMZvvOjW7gkFIj91YJrsM-VQhvtyjJntI_rHAdLIvQX0LQMPqDN6nlci_n9bsXi1QN9yTyG39bvw0AMZ98jnapn1YwWu7wSabZvxhtrhUgJnF7ukEH7a6g7AszAlDo=) or post it on [X](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/7f49fb4655301e6feceec6e039102211/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0viqC1mJyIyaBJ9rGNwBhqycRifkYn_vbHCVUHbd889jzsCSs01MgEU7vggJAQPrKyVUVJj2mrk9SslcRSEgQeN0pfctr0BOn4tL8B8DklIPMDBSIccdklasCo_lawqHGm4dT_-9USLJ9skrIRp-imWV4XZzbk7oGh7OS8Syq3Co20cf0Y0HfX9GnHFa1_E6-3e1bgxUovP5kIO7_L0BCOmXe0=). **
_As a New Jerseyan, the Hunter Biden pardon doesn’t surprise me. Political corruption no longer surprises me. And that’s a problem. I’m part of the #CommonSense uprising, and I urge you to join me. >> CommonSenseClub.org. _

| This is only the beginning. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: How this simple tool can help optimize your financial well-being
body:
| Hi Peter, What was the first thing you saved up to buy? What three things do you truly enjoy that don't cost a penny? That's not just food for thought. Those questions can be jumping-off points for deep, revealing conversations about money.
---
|
---
Talking about money with loved ones isn't easy. Mental blocks, subconscious taboos, and various sensitivities can come into play when conversations about finance come up. As challenging as that can be, some simple, yet thoughtful, conversation starters can help break the ice and set the stage for more productive talks about money. [**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/jB6PUmW80UvX2l8TjZgxDHA5eB2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Discussing finances is not a one-time event. name: Lila Rose
subject: Defund Planned Parenthood Petition
body:
Did you know that a preborn baby has a 62:1 chance of being aborted instead of receiving prenatal care at Planned Parenthood?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=ef0d47f2eebd4052943e49032689d0cd&_t=3i5DEDNo7bYUl_d88SdFc1TAbZp-yxkC0h50xKgnaQQztkew2ztvbHBTTIBvjLewugIxZKHJMIFN1pMyGJCFtALYZ6sL1HZIsB-gLmNGaC6zjpqtiPlTPp84KGyChApa)_
---
[ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=ef0d47f2eebd4052943e49032689d0cd&_e=OJcOT85MXdVrWuXsk83khVy_-E_Qo-YalnNTunCVR1dBkkeioauMCrPtFqvDJb3EX7dsdRtPwhBqbWBMyEXm1KiEiqoCSn45UbeYjf-Q-P7UcGvwSo1nXui1bA4QSzu59TdCYNF1ClJ8AellIloJX8kGoc7b6j4SVmfnRfktFOPBA9OYOx0YrYCkt8dyAPdrSYKFU3D2hpo_qSbWi16zEpLx8wLHezNrhO2y8j78kdjSlHfnppyQyhXxxSi8n9IUdqsjyEuuxBy53PliAZcWlTEbP7UNzw44n7gRKKgSvU7x0ugLoMFKtziJKbKExoii5Uu9mK8yKfzsJ9juR6jDXgP3tzPQm74pHfp3oPp6qPPc0MHsfdfeBufLTcn9TqbAapkkU2ZDydMYAbnwUe5jog%3D%3D)
#
Dear Friend,

Did you know that a preborn baby has a 62:1 chance of being aborted instead of receiving prenatal care at Planned Parenthood? This means millions of our tax dollars are funding an organization that prioritizes killing.

Planned Parenthood's latest report shows they performed nearly 400,000 abortions last year. That's one life lost every 80 seconds. Further alarmingly, $10.7 billion of taxpayer money has funded Planned Parenthood since 2000.

I know you do not want your tax dollars used this way. You can make your voice heard now.

Sign our petition to stop taxpayer subsidization of Planned Parenthood. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=ef0d47f2eebd4052943e49032689d0cd&_e=OJcOT85MXdVrWuXsk83khVy_-E_Qo-YalnNTunCVR1dBkkeioauMCrPtFqvDJb3EX7dsdRtPwhBqbWBMyEXm1KiEiqoCSn45UbeYjf-Q-P7UcGvwSo1nXui1bA4QSzu59TdCYNF1ClJ8AellIloJX8kGoc7b6j4SVmfnRfktFOPBA9OYOx0YrYCkt8dyAPdrSYKFU3D2hpo_qSbWi16zEpLx8wLHezNrhO2y8j78kdgs3sIrumnYD4Xhd-NsxQrp9Hlts6wtxneVzCLZC0MONv_mNGxj3b0e4cyfFhz7L4XLxR94c1Gw_QcV61vOynFu9RLD9tGx01Dly8a3oFFf14clDBv6YyTfLsMbEMatiD9Jbi8aiVlank5ksEnlZhAZB7W0Qc8x-6-Qd9O3_GF4RQ%3D%3D)**

With new leadership coming this November, your voice is crucial. Share this with your pro-life friends, and together let's demand an end to the taxpayer subsidization of Planned Parenthood.

Thank you for your support that can change history and save lives.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=ef0d47f2eebd4052943e49032689d0cd&_e=OJcOT85MXdVrWuXsk83khVy_-E_Qo-YalnNTunCVR1dBkkeioauMCrPtFqvDJb3EX7dsdRtPwhBqbWBMyEXm1KiEiqoCSn45UbeYjf-Q-P7UcGvwSo1nXui1bA4QSzu59TdCYNF1ClJ8AellIloJX8kGoc7b6j4SVmfnRfktFOPBA9OYOx0YrYCkt8dyAPdrSYKFU3D2hpo_qSbWi16zEpLx8wLHezNrhO2y8j78kdgvTguvqnwZzQMA1KfZJVz2OolO4QvO9xcpOgtY8-QjnVuBGhkm72ev1RhumQncuAQR9ipuy7egKSSF82z2T-0jI-WKQCbRelFvoAcsDI0XrXmEzUtlVdJ0pl_6gapARyI7rAU8FoN5eRwmoSJSsvozpXFRd2DJSFvUEKse3W3JQg%3D%3D)

body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98208163/515919538/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX11_20241205_YeastRS_PL&sourceid=1055475&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTRiY2VjNS0xOWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBQnR5XlHht7PJcMBM9HwhDZsvqZ0jqHLCRUEORjYZI=) Do you know what the EMILY in EMILYs List stands for, Peter?

**The acronym spells out "Early Money is Like Yeast" — because _it makes the dough rise_. In other words, _investing early pays off_.**

Our organization was built on the premise that early donations are the most critical for Democratic pro-choice women, because early investment helps launch strong, viable campaigns that will attract more donors down the line. So while it may seem early, we've already started preparing for the 2026 midterm elections. | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98208164/515919539/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX11_20241205_YeastRS_PL&sourceid=1055475&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTRiY2VjNS0xOWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBQnR5XlHht7PJcMBM9HwhDZsvqZ0jqHLCRUEORjYZI=)
---
We need to recruit strong candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we need to give those candidates as _much_ support as possible as _early_ as possible. That's how **Rep. Emilia Sykes (OH-13)** , **Sen.-elect Elissa Slotkin (MI)** , and dozens of other women built their winning campaigns in the years leading up to 2024.

There's no such thing as an "off year" in politics, Peter. The investments we make _right now_ will build the foundation for success in 2026 — a year when we need to take back the U.S. House and Senate, win and defend critical governors' seats, and shore up pro-choice majorities in state legislatures nationwide. The work doesn't stop, and neither do we.

clean_body: | = Do you know what the EMILY in EMILYs List stands for, Peter? The acronym spells out "Early Money is Like Yeast" — because it makes the dough rise. In other words, investing early pays off. Our organization was built on the premise that early donations are the most critical for Democratic pro-choice women, because early investment helps launch strong, viable campaigns that will attract more donors down the line. So while it may seem early, we've already started preparing for the 2026 midterm elections. | = We need to recruit strong candidates who can help shape the national conversation around Democratic values — and then we need to give those candidates as much support as possible as early as possible. That's how Rep. Emilia Sykes (OH-13) , Sen.-elect Elissa Slotkin (MI) , and dozens of other women built their winning campaigns in the years leading up to 2024. There's no such thing as an "off year" in politics, Peter. The investments we make right now will build the foundation for success in 2026 — a year when we need to take back the U.S. House and Senate, win and defend critical governors' seats, and shore up pro-choice majorities in state legislatures nationwide. The work doesn't stop, and neither do we. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? | | Peter, as a longtime organizer and the first Gen Z member of Congress, I’ve been sounding the alarm on the importance of progressives reaching Gen Z voters _young_ and _early_. **This year, Gen Z men swung to the right and determined the outcome of the election. This was no coincidence._Far-right extremists have been preying on these young men for the last four years._** Extremist sentiment has been seeping into the content Gen Z guys consume — turning advertising into weapons of mass fearmongering and appealing to their worst prejudices. The far right recognized Gen Z’s power long before a lot of progressives did, and had the resources to indoctrinate them into the cult that is far-right extremism. **We pushed as hard as we could to make up for lost time, and while we made great strides with other Gen Z demographics, we fell short with young men. But that doesn’t mean we give up winning them back.** Peter, we saw what happens when we let far right extremists get a headstart, and we can’t afford to let that happen again. So I’m asking you to start just the way I said: _early_. [**_Will you rush a donation right now so we can start reaching, educating, and mobilizing Gen Z and older Gen Alphas across the country EARLY, before the far right beats us to it again? clean_body: | | | Peter, as a longtime organizer and the first Gen Z member of Congress, I’ve been sounding the alarm on the importance of progressives reaching Gen Z voters young and early. This year, Gen Z men swung to the right and determined the outcome of the election. This was no coincidence.Far-right extremists have been preying on these young men for the last four years. Extremist sentiment has been seeping into the content Gen Z guys consume — turning advertising into weapons of mass fearmongering and appealing to their worst prejudices. The far right recognized Gen Z’s power long before a lot of progressives did, and had the resources to indoctrinate them into the cult that is far-right extremism. We pushed as hard as we could to make up for lost time, and while we made great strides with other Gen Z demographics, we fell short with young men. But that doesn’t mean we give up winning them back. Peter, we saw what happens when we let far right extremists get a headstart, and we can’t afford to let that happen again. So I’m asking you to start just the way I said: early. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~ Thank you, \- Maxwell Frost | Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

body:
Following our historic Republican victory.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/10908e9dd02cb2b/?utm_campaign=20241121&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the
Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a
clear message:

You asked us to clean house in Washington so that _your_ government
would once again work for _you_ – the _PEOPLE_.

But there are those on the Left who – despite such a historic
mandate from voters – would still have you believe that putting our
country and _American_ citizens first is “extreme.”

THAT’S WHY I MARCHED RIGHT INTO THE BELLY OF THE BEAST ON _CNN_
FOLLOWING THE ELECTION TO COMBAT THEIR LIES AND FALSE NARRATIVES ABOUT
VOTERS LIKE YOU, FRIEND.

and that no matter how hard they might try, the Democrats cannot deny
the voice of the people. _

But to fully prosecute my case against the Left’s continued lies and
smears, I’m counting on grassroots Americans like you to share YOUR
top priorities as we prepare to fight for you on DAY ONE of the new
Congress.

SO PLEASE, TAKE THE PEOPLE’S AGENDA SURVEY AS YOUR REPUBLICAN

NEW FUTURE.

name: Thank You Jack Smith! (via VPP)
subject: Your signature [not recorded]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Hurry before he steps down!!
| We’re running out of time to thank Special Counsel Jack Smith for his incredible work and defend him from Donald Trump’s wrath!

**When we reviewed our signature list this morning, we were STUNNED to see your name still MISSING!**

_As a top local Democrat, we don’t want you to miss this opportunity._ **You only have until MIDNIGHT:** [**Sign the letter to thank Jack Smith before he STEPS DOWN! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85242?t=6&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85242?t=7&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw)
---
Don’t delay,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**-BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE-**
**🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith **
Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge.
**He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!**
[**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85242?t=8&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw)
[Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85242?t=9&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared because he KNOWS you’re about to drop hundreds of pages of evidence detailing his treasonous crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85242?t=10&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85242?t=11&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw)
---
__X A grateful Democrat__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18140%2E878179%2EAogVIw)

name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: To the Holiday Season
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/335ed410ad09/on-the-road-again-17993849?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# To the Holiday Season!
---
| I had time last week to take a short break and enjoy a wonderful Thanksgiving weekend. This week I was back to work and on the road making sure I could hear from my constituents. Every voice matters when I work on legislation like this to improve our communities. I am looking forward to getting back in session in the spring to ensure Indiana remains a true conservative state.
---
|
---
| Last night I also had a fun time with the Hendricks County Republican Women. Plenty of good people with plenty of good food! Groups like them exemplify the importance of promoting Conservatism in our communities.
---
|
---
|
---
| Finally make sure to follow me on social media and check out our website as we roll out more pictures and announcements in the next few months!
---

In recent interviews, _**[_**House Freedom members have revealed their plans for a Trump White House!**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e705e516228a4e3b8df6e1b3b2ba42ac&_e=pG3ykF4sOFgdIuJ2hqkGwEyixDob5zVMIjiJKsl1qyau8orOzO7XG-CXGHZbO9fwk2TfSYQo4pgNo1UvGDzlX6-fPrqrk86D7znDnjlZQ7y69FuiH0oEDNAls3Y1XAtrcLEy-niafn1yloxLyPlh55zv-lO32J_Wb1AnHcwZSipf3sB4aS6i2CKT2Em-SKFWt6IQNloQYmLhzrokgsyYngq0xN2CaT1AGxCSF2_OJc8X7mJAoxnKJfQu2MNl_vxqr0HfbrsJFb4LN82fd5VZWx_jlQp60OFqJHTuFM7ZgyrRRzOlDcoqLrn2wMI_uDVXsUPYpnQru_ZEZUfUUZeBWWg5IecmWd3tN8oR5pJFPhQ1NrKd_Y1z6PXuRrDQse9otuRgNw6JVtKZAT7wwgXMHGORnfWjXP8TdUK7YyxS7wk%3D)**_

_**House Freedom Chairman Andy Harris**_ just said: **“Pound for pound, per capita, we are the strongest supporters of President Trump on Capitol Hill.”** And Rep. Eli Crane said: **“We anticipate having a big role in supporting the president’s agenda. **

**When we have a smaller majority, the Freedom Caucus definitely has the ability to have a bigger influence on outcomes.”** **House Freedom Caucus is gearing up for some _MASSIVE_ moves to support Trump’s agenda in Congress.**

This group is going to be _**CRITICAL**_ in making sure congressional Republicans do their job and **deliver on Trump's robust agenda.**

**And House Freedom Fund is the ONLY group dedicated solely to defending House Freedom Members!**

**The Dems are already plotting to undermine a future Trump White House with their so-called “shadow cabinet.” We CANNOT let them succeed!**

**The House Freedom Caucus is Trump’s strongest ally on Capitol Hill** , and they’re preparing to fight tooth and nail to deliver on his America First agenda.

But they need __**your**__ help to stay strong against the Left’s relentless attacks! **Show your support for the Trump AGENDA by STANDING WITH the House Freedom Fund!** _**[_**CHIP IN ANYTHING TO HELP HOUSE FREEDOM MEMBERS DEFEND THE TRUMP AGENDA!**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=e705e516228a4e3b8df6e1b3b2ba42ac&_e=pG3ykF4sOFgdIuJ2hqkGwEyixDob5zVMIjiJKsl1qyau8orOzO7XG-CXGHZbO9fwk2TfSYQo4pgNo1UvGDzlX6-fPrqrk86D7znDnjlZQ7y69FuiH0oEDNAls3Y1XAtrcLEy-niafn1yloxLyPlh55zv-lO32J_Wb1AnHcwZSipf3sB4aS6i2CKT2Em-SKFWt6IQNloQYmLhzrokgsyYngq0xN2CaT1AGxCSF2_OJc8X7mJAoxnKJfQu2MNl_vxqr0HfbrsJFb4LN82fd5VZW7DQ7t2Hk4RYh6mvCMd5Kd_dVC1rV58TbLCNgA4VlzUhMjP9Ftg1GJFRURdTzJOW765vqjflptZJ9h7vXPNx9zA2i-HAiTuIR9tZQ-1MBA8xIG_gNIcMuD45-PbXsHg2W5OPVurEnWSOUrjygg2XUAU%3D)**_

| | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper.

body:

|
---
Peter,

I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it.

**I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again, this time to take down Radical Leftist Tina Smith! [**Can you chip in to give me the head start I need?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c3d02d0b6df641d9987e2d14dd03fb49&_e=iq-AJz8SRUuMR9SUgsJDvoZrvlogagF3EH01wR_9h9DspIjcrqe8xoUzUDn2CfRdHrJdVV61j6CLOTP9gPK4Zzvl88TFk3gZMCQH3bfUSmVb0ys9LV4751_tedg4ucmcw-LgJOD1qRsnhe5xyckZRTBmF5_U1OLfGP4utbkqduQnXAnOwrmYGW-0dW2ZgbJeY1efT7UcGB_fOGckDJPu9_3Se4UE8NBr-d7MDTF6l7uEm-5qLcBN-wANIKM5mQ6dDyMMzVHcO_lxMeLHklgyp8KH4Du77Xif6prOGg5hvcVGcyujtK5nf7hgZ7q_zzS2YX55rUXLeH23pUr5DBSP7g%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c3d02d0b6df641d9987e2d14dd03fb49&_e=iq-AJz8SRUuMR9SUgsJDvoZrvlogagF3EH01wR_9h9DspIjcrqe8xoUzUDn2CfRdHrJdVV61j6CLOTP9gPK4Zzvl88TFk3gZMCQH3bfUSmVb0ys9LV4751_tedg4ucmcw-LgJOD1qRsnhe5xyckZRTBmF5_U1OLfGP4utbkqduQnXAnOwrmYGW-0dW2ZgbJeM0j0Tl-wb6KrOOXXTpdUu3k-y5eWpzGGb9p7j9AQGDVEwX71GKCfcysGM9nRxUh5xbPcYo2h6vCs8Zlu56RZiKjcuKQngDpbWdzuO5LvqLqsSyyMojtsMbGyKmJilCAV7v0kSMn6H8WJSbS_r4fMWw%3D%3D)
Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout.

_They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles._

For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters.

**This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat Tina Smith and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans.**

__The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose.

__[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c3d02d0b6df641d9987e2d14dd03fb49&_e=iq-AJz8SRUuMR9SUgsJDvoZrvlogagF3EH01wR_9h9DspIjcrqe8xoUzUDn2CfRdHrJdVV61j6CLOTP9gPK4Zzvl88TFk3gZMCQH3bfUSmVb0ys9LV4751_tedg4ucmcw-LgJOD1qRsnhe5xyckZRTBmF5_U1OLfGP4utbkqduQnXAnOwrmYGW-0dW2ZgbJe2rLQk-Kb1_FdgUY4nL7X1QkyZkfcrr8G4kPPPdQeCA1JyJ7DeA9SYxDnWckIEfS4Duju2fTuSl16IJ-wTJYBD3w1P7mRdkd9QUiMr0HvqVZrPBUD6pjO6bVErJbmHr_9hESFVTrGSvSJZXauG1_-Dw%3D%3D)_
But I 'm warmed up now, and I'm ready to DUNK on the Radical Left once and for all._

**In the 2024 election, we gained 8 points of the 24 that we needed. No one outside of our movement expected my campaign to be competitive, yet I got 1.3 MILLION VOTES with ZERO HELP!**

[**THIS IS WHY I NEED TO START NOW! I 'M RELYING ON YOU TO CHIP IN AND GIVE ME THE HEAD START THAT I NEED TO WIN!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c3d02d0b6df641d9987e2d14dd03fb49&_e=iq-AJz8SRUuMR9SUgsJDvoZrvlogagF3EH01wR_9h9DspIjcrqe8xoUzUDn2CfRdHrJdVV61j6CLOTP9gPK4Zzvl88TFk3gZMCQH3bfUSmVb0ys9LV4751_tedg4ucmcw-LgJOD1qRsnhe5xyckZRTBmF5_U1OLfGP4utbkqduQnXAnOwrmYGW-0dW2ZgbJe-asLx_3leiteDX362OhKEBQVtD1xGFl5YZ8pLqOdfF__IS469rVrTKbyZTJglXq9YdILl4o611Z7531ff2hIWF0TD7-E7lt4RWECHSksxV5l8leRcqiG7-zvsjFdorbDPaP4V9-ZkT8VBhPP2NjZ7A%3D%3D)

Tina Smith has spent every waking moment since she was elected in 2018 building a massive war chest, preparing for her re-election in 2026. I need your help by midnight to start amassing the resources to defeat her.

[**Peter, I 'm humbly asking you to donate just $10 before midnight to defeat a Radical Leftist who's been anti-Trump since the beginning.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c3d02d0b6df641d9987e2d14dd03fb49&_e=iq-AJz8SRUuMR9SUgsJDvoZrvlogagF3EH01wR_9h9DspIjcrqe8xoUzUDn2CfRdHrJdVV61j6CLOTP9gPK4Zzvl88TFk3gZMCQH3bfUSmVb0ys9LV4751_tedg4ucmcw-LgJOD1qRsnhe5xyckZRTBmF5_U1OLfGP4utbkqduQnXAnOwrmYGW-0dW2ZgbJeiJDjYiUZrccVrEXztz_f99L73DR6-QdjFJqnr5j16dPYL2earTyaqK32gn4EwDJHNAT9gqeW0341wFMHX4YSmmKpVTMvWLCkjxoUlkwXns-l34D1JoApUh9RzofRfsS2NeS98ecmJPZFXXOz-IycFw%3D%3D)

Here's to our Head Start,
Royce White for Senate

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=c3d02d0b6df641d9987e2d14dd03fb49&_e=iq-AJz8SRUuMR9SUgsJDvoZrvlogagF3EH01wR_9h9DspIjcrqe8xoUzUDn2CfRdHrJdVV61j6CLOTP9gPK4Zzvl88TFk3gZMCQH3bfUSmVb0ys9LV4751_tedg4ucmcw-LgJOD1qRsnhe5xyckZRTBmF5_U1OLfGP4utbkqduQnXAnOwrmYGW-0dW2ZgbJeIUhL4sVZSLEVJYZ10-QYayc_TTXfzfIey0wvfDozvBTGOcIsd_pkoRHVMU2U_7kpFQiutlBOI5b56JrYg6__M92yMWFZA59HO1YspSwBgaYYLWi4Qmwjab3AoqD0Dfm2qZLjHZsgIyn-NLwU4bKVSQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is working tirelessly to FLIP Minnesota Red and give President Trump the MAGA reinforcements he needs. Can you help him by clicking the button below?

name: GIFFORDS
subject: We must save the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The gun lobby is already pushing to dismantle this key office that was created to save lives from preventable gun violence
#

In case you missed this news, we have an urgent update for you:
**The NSSF, which is the firearm industry's trade association, is trying to shut down the federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.**
The Office of Gun Violence Prevention was established by the Biden-Harris Administration in 2023. It has been a first-of-its-kind federal government effort to coordinate with states and federal officials to stop violence, invest in community intervention programs, respond to shootings, and support survivors.
It’s no surprise that the NSSF, whose mission is to drive gun manufacturer profits, would rather line their pockets through selling more firearms than keep our communities safe from preventable gun violence.
We must save the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Preventing gun violence should be a bipartisan priority. That’s why we’re already hard at work to call on the Trump Administration to keep this federal office intact, but we need your help to keep the pressure on.
[**So please, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us call on the incoming administration to keep the critically important Office of Gun Violence Prevention in place?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241205-1-30&t=1&akid=9561%2E3935704%2Eon2c_z)

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different

Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Research Survey [Voter Action Project]
subject: Supporter poll: Ballot initiatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Democracy Docket: Lawmakers Look To Restrict Ballot Initiative Process in Florida, Missouri and Ohio [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DD_BallotInitiativesHarder.png]
In state legislative sessions, suppressive lawmakers across the country have looked to curtail the ballot initiative process, which allows citizens to directly affect policy change by voting on proposals to change state laws and state constitutions.
In recent years, progressive policies — including Medicaid expansion, minimum-wage increases, marijuana legalization and establishment of independent redistricting commissions — have proved overwhelmingly popular with voters and have been put into law via this process.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about ballot initiatives. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should state officials limit the ballot initiative process?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

In recent years, progressive policies — including Medicaid expansion, minimum-wage increases, marijuana legalization and establishment of independent redistricting commissions — have proved overwhelmingly popular with voters and have been put into law via this process. body:
The fight for truth and justice shouldn’t come at the cost of personal safety.

|
---
| | | | [**Unequal Justice: Kennedy Denied, Fauci Protected**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_5_24_nd1&n=1)

|
---
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_5_24_nd1&n=2)

[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_5_24_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_5_24_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Kennedy Denied, Fauci Protected
[DOUBLE STANDARD EXPOSED](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fauci_protected_12_5_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
This is scandalous.
Recent news media reports reveal **Dr. Anthony Fauci** , now a private citizen, enjoys taxpayer-funded security costing more than $15 million since his retirement in January 2023 — **complete with U.S. Marshals, a chauffeur-driven limousine, and armed protection.**
Meanwhile, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was denied Secret Service protection for all but 43 days of his campaign. Even after multiple extremely alarming threats to his life, the Biden administration ignored the long-established practice of affording protection to high-profile candidates.
Think about this for a moment. Fauci, who was paid more than the President of the United States, now enjoys an eight-figure net worth and a record-breaking pension. He asserts his protection is necessary.
Yet Kennedy — a man who has risked everything to fight corruption and speak the truth — was forced to pay millions out-of-pocket for his safety.
Why? Because the establishment fears RFK Jr. They know he is a threat to their agenda — a man who won’t be silenced — and who can’t be bought.
So they left RFK, Jr. exposed, even as they spared no expense to shield one of their own — a lifetime bureaucrat who made arbitrary, non-science-based decisions that led to the worst COVID outcomes in the industrialized world.
Now, Kennedy is carrying the burden of millions in debt, forced to pay for his own safety while fighting for a better future for all of us.
[**Our goal is to retire this debt by the end of the year. Your support can make a difference. clean_body: The fight for truth and justice shouldn’t come at the cost of personal safety. | | | | | | | Kennedy Denied, Fauci Protected Dear Peter, This is scandalous. Recent news media reports reveal Dr. Anthony Fauci , now a private citizen, enjoys taxpayer-funded security costing more than $15 million since his retirement in January 2023 — complete with U.S. Marshals, a chauffeur-driven limousine, and armed protection. Meanwhile, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was denied Secret Service protection for all but 43 days of his campaign. Even after multiple extremely alarming threats to his life, the Biden administration ignored the long-established practice of affording protection to high-profile candidates. Think about this for a moment. Fauci, who was paid more than the President of the United States, now enjoys an eight-figure net worth and a record-breaking pension. He asserts his protection is necessary. Yet Kennedy — a man who has risked everything to fight corruption and speak the truth — was forced to pay millions out-of-pocket for his safety. Why? Because the establishment fears RFK Jr. They know he is a threat to their agenda — a man who won’t be silenced — and who can’t be bought. So they left RFK, Jr. exposed, even as they spared no expense to shield one of their own — a lifetime bureaucrat who made arbitrary, non-science-based decisions that led to the worst COVID outcomes in the industrialized world. Now, Kennedy is carrying the burden of millions in debt, forced to pay for his own safety while fighting for a better future for all of us. The fight for truth and justice shouldn’t come at the cost of personal safety. Let’s stand with Kennedy so he’ll be able to focus fully on the task ahead: protecting the health and well-being of every American. Your support matters more than ever. name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Announces Jennifer Nassour as Finance Chair
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SJGObKQ-6qo9nGswICMk2GJjH4wAXMbrh5nTwBRbatQb3rlZenUFdM4TJ524QEo5xsiMbPFCXKYDs4Tp0s7LHr7mHq9PxNMuy6h4mfKdcPxT2d40lQ94CreKlYk8VraMqhKonYFBZmxO4pk6VWsgiQ==&c=xdmjcKAWVPQ387S6VcUH66XTc3X80vW7LE0UrUBvAsG6Wk12r0wxGQ==&ch=QjBN53YjI8ZKPm5X7_jumda-JaHIvIDG96k8ehvvOz0RJJh9_DWD-w==)
---
| MassGOP Announces Jennifer Nassour as Finance Chair
---
---
| Boston, MA- Today, the Massachusetts Republican Party proudly announced the appointment of former Party Chair Jennifer Nassour as the new Finance Chair. Nassour, an attorney and seasoned political operative, brings a wealth of experience to this critical role. During her tenure as Party Chair, she played a pivotal role in the election of former Senator Scott Brown to the U.S. Senate in 2010, marking the first time a Republican had been elected to the U.S. Senate from Massachusetts since 1972. Additionally, she oversaw the election of 16 Republicans to the Massachusetts House of Representatives, achieving the first net increase of Republicans in 20 years.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale expressed her full support for Nassour's appointment, stating, "I can't think of anyone better suited for the job. Jenn has a proven history of success in Massachusetts, and her network and ability to lead are unmatched. I'm confident she will continue the party's momentum and elevate our fundraising efforts into 2026."
Carnevale continued, "Jenn is a superstar. She's a powerful communicator and connector who excels in every setting. She will be an outstanding representative of the party and we're lucky to have her on board."
Nassour herself expressed enthusiasm and determination in her new role, stating, "I'm excited to get started. Under Amy's leadership, the MassGOP has made tremendous strides in winning elections and strengthening the Party. We are in a strong position to raise money and achieve even greater success. We've been punching well above our weight, and I look forward to bringing in more resources to fuel our victories in 2026 and beyond."
###
---

In this Tuesday, Aug. 10, 2021, file photo, students, some wearing protective masks, arrive for the first day of school at Sessums Elementary School in Riverview, Florida. (AP Photo/Chris O'Meara, File)
By Illinois Review

On Wednesday, the U.S. House Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic released its final report after a 2-year investigation that confirmed what many Americans have been saying along – the vaccine did not stop the spread or transmission of the disease, mask mandates were implemented without any scientific data – and lockdowns – especially school closures – caused “immeasurable harm” to children and adults.

The report also found that many decisions by government officials that included social distancing guidelines were not based on science – as former National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases Director Dr. Anthony Fauci testified that the guidance “sort of just appeared.” Widespread abuse of power by government officials, including Fauci was also identified in the findings. Officials also purposely ignored the effectiveness of natural immunity.

name: MAGA Patriot Alerts
subject: What they did to Pete Hegseth will shock you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by RANGER PAC
body:
President Trump’s nominee is under attack

| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c680debad4e4f009446afb35c2fa255&_e=JwO5fcB68bp3qLeoDJKxovHgLk3rOqdWIVzdMWNiKd_rC1cBPq44OzL8RQjItGm-eN0mjGhoPThQUo6TzD0r7zDbT2KX3UhhhKboBwy8m7-2QqP2WHA2YBB8G-VY8RGzSpqfKfnAzhSQyWRSJE85V0zovUys5PJaRqVL0JxEs9Sgr4H3WEq1ghRAh6GMCm_W1-Pqwa4Q7KeVf0ZZos2xifhn6F3TRmIq6JK39OY_RZ_PHC-IWDA_daFhl5urnpOnyeCak6NsmL2vimi9G_1Eu16YYW1t_VJKTP1EjbI5OCDXiE8dGJU8LTi-yi4fMKkt4kmdvk_fBXoCJcTfuAH77XwVjqPX_CnpQJiBsfW7nj6LyRTgCh05qV6pFXAqGZV5cv3d58bWcRxsYuMsZOAiw8UE-5pWaVW9f5kE5_K-H4yben6Uy-pkDuWxM5Q-OyKet1AJva585bd62csncWwuqw%3D%3D)
---
|
---
|
---
| | _**WAR DECLARED ON MAGA**_

Pete Hegseth is an Army combat veteran, Bronze Star recipient, proud Christian Father - but the Democrats don’t care.

They’re more concerned that he defended President Trump, while the Radical Left tried to put him in **PRISON**.

Now that he’s been nominated for Secretary of Defense, they’re doing everything they can to take down his nomination.

They’re launching **SCATHING ATTACKS** and **NOTHING** is off limits - they realize the only way to get to President Trump is if they **RUIN** Pete Hegseth and drag his name through the **MUD**.
---
|
---
[STAND WITH HEGSETH](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c680debad4e4f009446afb35c2fa255&_e=JwO5fcB68bp3qLeoDJKxovHgLk3rOqdWIVzdMWNiKd_rC1cBPq44OzL8RQjItGm-eN0mjGhoPThQUo6TzD0r7zDbT2KX3UhhhKboBwy8m7-2QqP2WHA2YBB8G-VY8RGzSpqfKfnAzhSQyWRSJE85V0zovUys5PJaRqVL0JxEs9Sgr4H3WEq1ghRAh6GMCm_W1-Pqwa4Q7KeVf0ZZos2xifhn6F3TRmIq6JK39OY_RZ_PHC-IWDA_daFhl5urnpOnyeCak6NsmL2vimi9G_1Eu16YYW1t_VJKTP1EjbI5OCDXiE8dGJU8LTi-yi4fMKktywEDHNNYZxtaI8AcE5N9MxwcXk7P4-L-WFxVFGhaKktrgulTwG_71dwNWvwlglgWcOxxbZ4S5-dZzI_hFzENsxCydX5EMTtdzRMXOAxx4CLqkBn3pb53IFfmMVQ-WXZCM0QA0SHX29RdV_scnepCzw%3D%3D)
|
---
Now it’s **PERSONAL** \- they’re attacking his family, and **DEMANDING** his immediate resignation based on made-up **LIES**.

If Pete Hegseth goes, then Democrats will have total unchecked power to go after President Trump, and eventually **YOU**.

That’s why we’re calling on 1,000,000 Patriots to go on the record and say:

_**[I STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c680debad4e4f009446afb35c2fa255&_e=JwO5fcB68bp3qLeoDJKxovHgLk3rOqdWIVzdMWNiKd_rC1cBPq44OzL8RQjItGm-eN0mjGhoPThQUo6TzD0r7zDbT2KX3UhhhKboBwy8m7-2QqP2WHA2YBB8G-VY8RGzSpqfKfnAzhSQyWRSJE85V0zovUys5PJaRqVL0JxEs9Sgr4H3WEq1ghRAh6GMCm_W1-Pqwa4Q7KeVf0ZZos2xifhn6F3TRmIq6JK39OY_RZ_PHC-IWDA_daFhl5urnpOnyeCak6NsmL2vimi9G_1Eu16YYW1t_VJKTP1EjbI5OCDXiE8dGJU8LTi-yi4fMKkt9IXDPHHfH0tyTGpNk97iyDWeRu8J05ranpOhaLvAAjh4WUkGLGDenQj_vUk9pfWvgDfHQ9PlgilIJGpS65WV-8DVk4sSTl9GWdE4Eg-r2Gwil3cf7StGli72xqJa1pvjiR-SpryT4vBfrj7vBu45cA%3D%3D)**_

Don’t let this be the end.

If we can’t save Pete, then we lose the last line of defense against the Democrats.

They’re more concerned that he defended President Trump, while the Radical Left tried to put him in PRISON. Now that he’s been nominated for Secretary of Defense, they’re doing everything they can to take down his nomination. They’re launching SCATHING ATTACKS and NOTHING is off limits - they realize the only way to get to President Trump is if they RUIN Pete Hegseth and drag his name through the MUD. | | Now it’s PERSONAL \- they’re attacking his family, and DEMANDING his immediate resignation based on made-up LIES. If Pete Hegseth goes, then Democrats will have total unchecked power to go after President Trump, and eventually YOU. That’s why we’re calling on 1,000,000 Patriots to go on the record and say: Don’t let this be the end. If we can’t save Pete, then we lose the last line of defense against the Democrats. | | | | | | | | Paid for by RANGER PAC P.O. Short on time? The brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ is now available: [https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=59ae2d82d25d4c8b9a143f730149cb86&_e=TfjA00JOhSQseyRPhgT4zinOBS2N6CCJtP2o1ujwT9_khuqWN0GNsxiPa_BDo0sk3D28DVX159uYKynsRKGBUswnkvKKyqPxlXM0Qm7EnWx2sXkt97ceLYlbgl-YjaRuiQ5y37u5yqh3aGTpDTBoYhUfd_BNoWcHCbGrKaaDFJ0m5BM-Y6AYsCBg6UvHRt5JG0adgD8Jo4SkQXroe5n02tk7cYa53NVHWHLuQWv_Rv9FtegMd7aqIJPJf_HyGlM4kKP1Ykjg5e9zzYIvVedZ7skQ2pi4sBxqC5emeVap0Uixbs7tmePLaOFWjpm7kUXoS-uDnVGZP8D5zgHZgZdjLGUy71TyW6ulkSdfuf725m1oJQUL6iPGH8wkiIow4wRTwKO8VB9mNRgM8wTGycq0dedaBG9rjR584zFjRmgL4Vs%3D)

Hello Friend,

Staying connected to Jesus each day is essential for growing in our faith and reflecting His light in the world around us. One way we can strengthen that connection is through daily Bible reading and devotionals that speak God's truth into our hearts--setting aside intentional time with God's Word to keep our minds focused on Him.

With that in mind, I'm excited to offer you the brand-new _2025 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_. This beautiful devotional, featuring 260 daily messages (one for every weekday of the year), is designed to help you grow in your faith and keep your focus on God all year long. Each season will provide fresh insights to encourage and strengthen you:
* In the winter, discover God's will for your life. That's something we all want to know!
* Through spring and summer, deepen your relationship with Jesus through the book of Colossians.
* In the fall, journey through the parable of the prodigal son and experience the unconditional love of your heavenly Father.

---
| | For your gift of any amount, we'd love to send you this devotional as our thank-you. Every day, you'll find inspiration to carry you through life's challenges and opportunities.

This year's edition is beautifully bound in navy blue with gold trim that would not only grace your nightstand, where you can access it every morning or evening, but it would also make an attractive gift to give to someone you know and love.
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=59ae2d82d25d4c8b9a143f730149cb86&_e=TfjA00JOhSQseyRPhgT4zinOBS2N6CCJtP2o1ujwT9_khuqWN0GNsxiPa_BDo0sk3D28DVX159uYKynsRKGBUswnkvKKyqPxlXM0Qm7EnWx2sXkt97ceLYlbgl-YjaRuiQ5y37u5yqh3aGTpDTBoYhUfd_BNoWcHCbGrKaaDFJ0m5BM-Y6AYsCBg6UvHRt5JG0adgD8Jo4SkQXroe5n02tk7cYa53NVHWHLuQWv_Rv9FtegMd7aqIJPJf_HyGlM4A_VYmrhjMj_MLDbwLUu8mVziiY2RNF1UGT2g272XAP2zlbC2Wn43oIRplZKAcEc9XFfzFYHywNw7X2yENTw7ne4vYgp0u4BNnU5rN6L4LmSQhmxxrXcTGs9oOhp-M2QZ4pCrbHhyPTZ6aziasD7Q2QGSxr9ejGs6BWuL8-Cydls%3D)
---
| | Request your copy here:
[https://secure.ptv.org/2025-navy-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional-generous-gift-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=59ae2d82d25d4c8b9a143f730149cb86&_e=TfjA00JOhSQseyRPhgT4zinOBS2N6CCJtP2o1ujwT9_khuqWN0GNsxiPa_BDo0sk3D28DVX159uYKynsRKGBUswnkvKKyqPxlXM0Qm7EnWx2sXkt97ceLYlbgl-YjaRuiQ5y37u5yqh3aGTpDTBoYhUfd_BNoWcHCbGrKaaDFJ0m5BM-Y6AYsCBg6UvHRt5JG0adgD8Jo4SkQXroe5n02tk7cYa53NVHWHLuQWv_Rv9FtegMd7aqIJPJf_HyGlM4dFXEcDLsj_93KQnS9-hsw7h_PJim8olCgcZ7-eUGYL9dFFnHraS9afM-JPeSOx_bOZg9yyAnpURjW7z9CGXYZBgL405sE5bzsbMwxrNFBGyLRXQOpAdMY_QGpF-l5ItntYfgLG7FEyHuNaPsKVb3N5NF-m-sPSN4VJTGQ01Utdo%3D)

Thank you for being a part of this ministry. I'm praying that this new devotional will be a daily anchor point of encouragement and wisdom for all who read it.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffres

Dear Must Read Texas reader:
You receive the _free version_ of the indispensable Must Read Texas morning email (325k+ subscribers!), which we spend _several hours_ each weekday morning compiling.
As you know, instead of the PAID version with complete story summaries to save you time, you now receive _just the headlines_ and _links._
Our paid subscribers LOVE Must Read Texas, and we are confident you will too.
**To become a paid subscriber** , please visit:
» [mustreadtexas.substack.com](https://substack.com/redirect/e99b0cb6-8b1e-46f5-984a-3c8ec293ffb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
