name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: FAFSA Workshop, Christmas Tree Lighting, Toy Drive, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]

Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
P.O. Box 13842
Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: Before Giving Week ends, make a donation to UWDA
body:
Our work has never been more important | | | Peter: We’re just weeks away from the second Trump administration. Our work over the next four years will be critical and life-saving for so many in our community. **[Before Giving Week is over, can you pitch in today to fuel our work?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1ATRIbG1nkGqtSehgyyTD5TChC0No3a93hbP-T6UatPPxeIF4rhx1iWQ_VxGuojjHrG1vW32-TlEN0zjrIBFzaGX9ztNh6TtxbfcqHCRFR6YBDdU-5H5HZ2LHUelASmSFHj3A46mg4ndF8DHEf_q-gVuGwHIinTNB7m8-T62hrE_hjeUJ5fUlit1AoKRXdVtjZ-s6kvoVapn1ZUbaFDM3SpD9RlLbXVOv6kjgyLZbYPz3yNzVKcdRBxfOTKMSYJf6w8aRjPz9wgW5umH_6iehiVCE3YIb7Vum2U_U1i70FTbwwAhu0DWZoVHk7Z0mtl8Dhb3xoep9Y20DwbP1Ke6P7E0XHjVpKqYipeiC-Y_AQ8VBA/4c1/f9On2fpsTb6Wd2SWSRxHPw/h0/h001.JJVd4ITU8iKEC6Drz709PH91r-ZhJkBke3ZdZ4cpYR0)** | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1ATRIbG1nkGqtSehgyyTD5TChC0No3a93hbP-T6UatPPxS6lPByewPaVcqkZcXLs66HhUxD_r3dbVbcwmpz6RznnfXm8PaArPmElZ2n0C8wu0bL8OQa2-QeCf1JBWY-joXP38Jo8ddn6n1Y879KlBH4XKE9oJprswVXUkWTRZPGfbaWhkMUQT3BE20EE_6SjeYWNpgJvGJoU8OedKezqZeWdy2ZO0UhKpCLyHyXxDoxgD2WkgQmU3XfDr2p7ao1FThJau0B5L2UqMTiBtDL0eqRH8_GwfbYf0f8vB_aKBihJPYGMfWOlpTrT9DYO2nMIMoExnPUMgBzT_AYwt7U0X8Oi4YPAAE0DD3Iy4HQQg-xPjA/4c1/f9On2fpsTb6Wd2SWSRxHPw/h1/h001.CaDkrd4w_0CwedgRiZp-Mk-awlXDGxw8bqBvzIWE3-g)
---
Your donation today will allow UWDA to staff up, grow our organizing program, reach deeper into online communities, host weeks of action, combat misinformation, mobilize voters, show up at the doors of Congress, and so much more.
These actions are how we fight back — _how we win._
Donald Trump operates with hate, racism, cruelty, lies, and violence. We have to be prepared for his attacks on immigrants. But we’ll counter them with community care, solidarity, and justice.
Now is the time for all of us — immigrants and women and people of color and LGBTQ+ folks and allies — to stand together and protect each other from the danger ahead.
We must unapologetically oppose Trump at every turn. And we’re not throwing in the towel. Our movement is powerful, and we will face this together. 🧡

**The Second Amendment couldn 't be clearer: _" shall not be infringed."_**

But the National Firearms Act (NFA) has been doing just that for decades--**_infringing on your constitutional rights and making felons out of law-abiding gun owners simply for owning legal items._**
Will you join me in this fight to protect our freedoms?

This is about restoring the full power of your constitutional rights.

name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
We are not going back.

| Peter,

**It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.**

After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — **nothing would have changed.**

Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times.

This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either.

Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge:

We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads.

Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom.

We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature.

We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House.

Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them.

Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with UNITEDemocrats, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. clean_body: We are not going back. | Peter, It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next. After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — nothing would have changed. Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with UNITEDemocrats, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Leaders We Deserve and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: ** | = = = Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with UNITEDemocrats, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Leaders We Deserve and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = In service, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve P.S. Peter,

With the 119th Congress starting in under a month, the GOP has a historically narrow Majority, and the Democrats are already gearing up to take that from us in just 2 years. If we are going to have any shot at keeping this lead, we need to start fighting back ASAP.

Democrats will march in lockstep with the party line to destroy anything we put forward, and if we have any hope of continuing to advance our America First agenda, we need to get ahead on building our war chest for the next cycle. **[Will you chip in to help us get ahead on defending our Majority?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**

name: Biz @ NDRC
subject: Made for this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We’ve been resisting Republican overreach and power-grabbing since the day we began.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98223415/515959536/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkZGM1MzBmLTJkYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=04n4bKFjO2sYhIDi_763yfRlHZWO7Hy2C3x41XRUL70=&emci=d068053f-15b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=addc530f-2db3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, I’ve been having a lot of conversations about where we (Democrats broadly) need to put in the work over the next couple of years to hold the line against extreme policies and roll back Republican gains. I’m proud, and grateful, to be able to say that at the end of every conversation, I feel more confident than ever that working to achieve fair maps across the country is one of the most important endeavors we could take on. And what’s more: Our strategy is working and our team (including you) is up for the challenge. Fair maps and a representative democracy will drive progress no matter what you care about — whether that’s combating climate change or protecting reproductive rights or reforming the criminal justice system or stopping gun violence. (For me, one thing I’m passionate about is ensuring access to quality, affordable healthcare for everyone.) A second Trump administration and Republican-led government will make this work more challenging. But despite the difficult tasks ahead, success is certainly not impossible. We’ve been here before: Attorney General Eric Holder officially launched the NDRC just _days_ before Donald Trump was inaugurated in 2017. We’ve been resisting Republican overreach and power-grabbing _since the day we began_ , and we’ve been working in places where gerrymandering and attacks on voting rights have been egregious — places like Texas, Georgia, Louisiana, Alabama, Florida, North Carolina, Ohio, and Wisconsin. Progress does not happen overnight — it takes focus and perpetual commitment. We’ve accomplished a lot together. Some of the things I’m most proud of are:
* Achieving new legislative maps in Wisconsin in 2024 through an investment into the state supreme court races in 2018, 2019, 2020, and 2023.
* Over the course of a few years, supporting the efforts around independent redistricting commissions in Colorado and Michigan. The commissions were eventually established, and when they were, they passed fair and competitive maps. Those maps enabled voters in Michigan to turn around in 2022 and elect a Democratic trifecta that could enact popular policies.
* Investing in hard-fought governor’s races and helping elect pro-democracy champions like Tom Wolf in Pennsylvania and Governor Tony Evers in Wisconsin — who were then all able to hold the line on Republican gerrymandering efforts.

We’re playing the long game, anchored by our core belief that American voters deserve fair maps — ones that truly represent our communities. We’re not giving up on that and I’m confident we’re going to keep making gains. Helping lead this organization — organizing people in support of a cause that pushes for a better, more structurally sound and representative country — is the honor of my lifetime. I’m so grateful for your continued support of the NDRC. I hope you will stay tuned and stay engaged. We’ve got a long road ahead of us to ensure democracy is protected. My best,
Biz

John Bisognano
President | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98223416/515959537/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_OriginStory_email_20241205-NDRC-Tier1-OriginStory_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241205-NDRC-Tier1-OriginStory_&utm_campaign=OriginStory&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkZGM1MzBmLTJkYjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=04n4bKFjO2sYhIDi_763yfRlHZWO7Hy2C3x41XRUL70=)

name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: Thank you for being steadfast, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Let me explain, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, let me explain: [**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224266/515961934/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241205_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjExZTRhOC0yZmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgM1kKOLNr5pmxop7yJRueOU9Wvpy2AA_pTGMrKRoio=) Mike Johnson spent $141 million to keep us locked out of power. [**BUT THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224267/515961935/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241205_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjExZTRhOC0yZmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgM1kKOLNr5pmxop7yJRueOU9Wvpy2AA_pTGMrKRoio=) Democrats flipped 8 (!!!) House seats to hand Republicans one of the smallest House majorities in HISTORY. [**AND NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224269/515961936/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241205_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjExZTRhOC0yZmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgM1kKOLNr5pmxop7yJRueOU9Wvpy2AA_pTGMrKRoio=) We have THREE opportunities to flip seats from red to blue in special elections. [_**Peter, hear me when I say: We’re entering an unprecedented political environment, and your $14 could make a world of difference. I have to help Democrats win these special elections, render Johnson’s majority useless, and hand Republicans an embarrassing loss. body:
Now is the time to make news more accessible, not less

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224883/515963944/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2NzBmZWYtMzBiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D6M79MFDgdHZhiJEUfrRL0mvIf8WoulLAD-6tpkBVGc=&emci=1d670fef-30b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2b670fef-30b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
The legacy media is in crisis.
After historic layoffs in 2023, the collapse deepened in 2024. And with Trump’s reelection, his threats to jail reporters, revoke broadcast licenses, and strip legal protections for journalists have put the industry on high alert.
The result? News organizations are scrambling to survive. Paywalls are going up everywhere, and some, like _The New York Times_ and _Semafor_ , are now, literally shilling for Big Tobacco with ads alongside their content. **Just take a look:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224887/515963948/-593472309?refcode=20241204-EM-LegacyAds&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2NzBmZWYtMzBiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D6M79MFDgdHZhiJEUfrRL0mvIf8WoulLAD-6tpkBVGc=)
[**COURIER is here to offer an alternative to the failing legacy media model. If you support our mission, can you chip in $25 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224891/515963952/-593472309?refcode=20241204-EM-LegacyAds&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2NzBmZWYtMzBiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D6M79MFDgdHZhiJEUfrRL0mvIf8WoulLAD-6tpkBVGc=)
**COURIER is different.** We’re proud to be a completely independent, progressive media network that doesn’t bow to corporate sponsors, the far right, or legacy institutions.
That independence means we can call out anyone—Big Tobacco, the far right, and even the legacy media—without fear. It means we publish fact-based reporting free of paywalls, accessible to everyone, no strings attached.
But to build a progressive alternative that can counter the right’s powerful disinformation campaigns, we need your help.
[**Can you chip in $25 now to support our mission?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224895/515963956/-593472309?refcode=20241204-EM-LegacyAds&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2NzBmZWYtMzBiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D6M79MFDgdHZhiJEUfrRL0mvIf8WoulLAD-6tpkBVGc=)
Here at COURIER, we’re redefining what media can be:
* **Free and accessible:** No paywalls, no corporate sponsors—just trusted journalism for everyone.
* **Independent and progressive:** We call out lies, whether they come from Trump, the far right, or Big Tobacco and the corporations subsidizing the legacy media.
* **Community-focused:** Our reporting reaches voters directly in their communities and online, where disinformation spreads fastest.

With Trump’s lies dominating the narrative and legacy media in retreat, the need for a progressive media alternative has never been clearer.
To keep building that alternative, we count on grassroots supporters like you.
[**Can you chip in $25 now to power COURIER’s mission and fight back against disinformation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98224897/515963961/-593472309?refcode=20241204-EM-LegacyAds&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2NzBmZWYtMzBiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D6M79MFDgdHZhiJEUfrRL0mvIf8WoulLAD-6tpkBVGc=)

clean_body: Now is the time to make news more accessible, not less Peter – The legacy media is in crisis. After historic layoffs in 2023, the collapse deepened in 2024. And with Trump’s reelection, his threats to jail reporters, revoke broadcast licenses, and strip legal protections for journalists have put the industry on high alert. The result? News organizations are scrambling to survive. Paywalls are going up everywhere, and some, like The New York Times and Semafor , are now, literally shilling for Big Tobacco with ads alongside their content. Just take a look: = = COURIER is different. We’re proud to be a completely independent, progressive media network that doesn’t bow to corporate sponsors, the far right, or legacy institutions. That independence means we can call out anyone—Big Tobacco, the far right, and even the legacy media—without fear. It means we publish fact-based reporting free of paywalls, accessible to everyone, no strings attached. But to build a progressive alternative that can counter the right’s powerful disinformation campaigns, we need your help. = Here at COURIER, we’re redefining what media can be: Free and accessible: No paywalls, no corporate sponsors—just trusted journalism for everyone. Independent and progressive: We call out lies, whether they come from Trump, the far right, or Big Tobacco and the corporations subsidizing the legacy media. Community-focused: Our reporting reaches voters directly in their communities and online, where disinformation spreads fastest. With Trump’s lies dominating the narrative and legacy media in retreat, the need for a progressive media alternative has never been clearer. To keep building that alternative, we count on grassroots supporters like you. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you for standing with us, COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Fellow American,

You helped Turning Point Action CHASE THE VOTE and WIN BIG --
and now I want to send you a special "47" hat as my thanks.

Fellow American, thanks to grassroots patriots across America, Turning
Point Action chased the vote to VICTORY in 10 out of 10
battleground states for President DONALD TRUMP.

To celebrate our WINNING MOMENTUM, I want to send you a LIMITED
EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP.

All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning
Point Action KEEP WINNING for America First.

Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!

Thanks to patriots like YOU, Turning Point Action:

built the FIRST and LARGEST ballot-chasing initiative on
the right with CHASE THE VOTE,

registered thousands of voters, chased hundreds of
thousands of ballots, and reached millions online with our
Pro-America message, and

WON BIG for AMERICA FIRST on Election Day, November 5!

Now it's time to CELEBRATE our HISTORIC VICTORY -- and keep up
our INCREDIBLE MOMENTUM so we can continue WINNING BIG in 2025
and beyond!

Please, Fellow American, make your gift of any amount today to help
Turning Point Action KEEP FIGHTING and KEEP WINNING, and I'll
send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.

Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!

Every time you put on this "47" hat, you will show that YOU are
part of the PRO-AMERICA Movement that helped True Conservative
Leaders like President DONALD TRUMP WIN BIG in 2024...

...and that grassroots patriots are ready to work together
through Turning Point Action to KEEP WINNING in 2025 and beyond!

Please make your gift of ANY amount to Turning Point Action
today to claim your "47" hat as my personal gift.

Thank YOU for your patriotism and your commitment to SAVE
AMERICA in 2024 and beyond. Now let's get back to work to fight
for President TRUMP's AMERICA FIRST agenda!

Charlie Kirk

Founder

Turning Point Action

Support Turning Point Action

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: New Hunter Biden Bombshell
body:
| | | | **The following information is for MTG’s Top Advisors only...**_**If you are receiving this message,_that means you_.**___FOR YOUR EYES ONLY__
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend,

Joe Biden’s pardon of Hunter came as a shock to nobody... _**We knew they were dirty, but now, they aren’t even trying to hide it.**_
I'm staying at my office late to write this letter for you, because **The Fake News Media** & **Big Tech Conglomerates** are going to censor it...
**The Democrats, and the special interests they serve want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**
They are going to be mad as hell that I sent this out...
But I don't care, because I don’t work for them:
_**I work for the American people. I WORK FOR YOU. **_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
From 2014 until now, the Biden Crime Family received **over $27,000,000** from foreign individuals and groups as part of a **conspiracy** to get rich from Joe Biden’s positions in government... _**Thousands of these dollars can be traced directly back to _China_**_. The Biden Crime Family went as far as to set up shell companies to _hide these payments from our investigators._
Joe Biden used his position as Vice President to change American policies, making _**millions of dollars**_ for both his son, and his son’s _**foreign business partners**_. Witnesses say Joe Biden was directly involved in business dealings with **_Russian_ , _Ukrainian_** , and **_Chinese groups_.**
****
**You know it. I know it. Even the Democrats and the DOJ know it. **

But the DOJ and FBI _**gave special treatment**_ to Hunter because he is Joe Biden’s son.

We are even learning that the White House _**directly interfered with our investigators**_ by withholding key documents and witnesses!

Friend, the level of corruption we are witnessing is _**unprecedented, in the entire history of our country:**_
_****_
_****__**Joe Biden is the most corrupt President in American history...
And he isn’t even the one that has been controlling the White House.**_

Joe can issue as many pardons as he wants: _**this fight is far from over.**_

_**The American people are _done_ tolerating corruption at the highest levels: We demand better!**_
_****_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Deepstate, Corrupt RINO “Republicans,” and Democrat special interest megadonors _**hate**_ that I am exposing this... they want these crimes to stay out of sight, and out of mind.
_**They want the pardons to be filed, and they want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**_
_**[We can’t let that happen.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
__**Now that we’ve got real, actionable evidence against Joe Biden, things are about to get much, much worse.**__
We need to raise awareness... We need to mobilize our legal experts... We need to shed light on the Biden family’s corruption _**once and for all...**_
Nobody who loves our country can sit on the sidelines in the face of this sort of corruption: __**[we need to fight back harder than ever.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__

_**[Can I count on you to join me in this fight, and help me EXPOSE THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Yours in Freedom,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene
_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9z4h/?__vbtrk=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYzNzE4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=263718&trkid=552707522&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: [Response needed] Add your name and endorse Ruben Gallego
body:
He would be honored if you would renew your support as he gets ready to take office.
#

Peter -
Thanks to your help, Ruben will be serving in the United States Senate for the next six years.
And as we organize in advance of Trump’s second term in the White House, there is no one more committed to fighting for our values and what we have accomplished together than Ruben.
Ruben enlisted in the Marine Corps and fought for this country in Iraq. He was ready to fight for it again on January 6th. And he will be on the frontline of the fight in the years ahead.
As he works to defend our communities and deliver for the people of Arizona, he’s going to need your help again. **So, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Ruben Gallego.**
[**Will you add your name to say that you’re ready to fight alongside Ruben? He would be honored if you would renew your support as he gets ready to take office.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_dec24/?source=em241205-1-90&akid=3593%2E734936%2EOmdaao) With so much happening, it might seem like adding your name is a small, insignificant act. But with thousands joining you it adds up to something far larger. When you add your name you’re helping support Ruben as he defends our democracy and fights to deliver real results to improve people’s lives through his work in the Senate. It’s important. Really. So thank you in advance for adding your name. Team Gallego

President Trump’s nominee is under attack

| | | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZzqfYJMwVLrFf1gGQmyBYA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNIeAP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9yYW5nZXItcGFjL3JwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaGVnc2V0aC1wb3AtdjEtczI_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbHJlbnRhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBvcCZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQxMjA1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwNF9yYW5nZXJwYWNfdGhpc3dpbGxzaG9ja3lvdSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1kb25hdGUmYW1vdW50PTIwLjI1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmdG1-5RZx5icYBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

| | _**WAR DECLARED ON MAGA**_

Pete Hegseth is an Army combat veteran, Bronze Star recipient, proud Christian Father - but the Democrats don’t care.

They’re more concerned that he defended President Trump, while the Radical Left tried to put him in **PRISON**.

Now that he’s been nominated for Secretary of Defense, they’re doing everything they can to take down his nomination.

They’re launching **SCATHING ATTACKS** and **NOTHING** is off limits - they realize the only way to get to President Trump is if they **RUIN** Pete Hegseth and drag his name through the **MUD**.
---
|
---
[STAND WITH HEGSETH](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZzqfYJMwVLrFf1gGQmyBYA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpNIeAP0TeaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9yYW5nZXItcGFjL3JwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaGVnc2V0aC1wb3AtdjEtczI_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbHJlbnRhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBvcCZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjQxMjA1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwNF9yYW5nZXJwYWNfdGhpc3dpbGxzaG9ja3lvdSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1kb25hdGUmYW1vdW50PTIwLjI1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlVwNzcGNCCmdG1-5RZx5icYBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
|
---
Now it’s **PERSONAL** \- they’re attacking his family, and **DEMANDING** his immediate resignation based on made-up **LIES**.

body:
Our state and federal legislators have targeted the small business owner with the bulk of the tax burden and regulatory. Their lobbyists have big corp
| | [](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=1481033.634.1.c6f45427a622317d04dc307706f75566)
---
[](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=1481033.635.1.1e0eb1a4c07a0fa75660a537ea972a84) |
---
Our state and federal legislators have targeted the small business owner with the bulk of the tax burden and regulatory. Their lobbyists have big corps paying almost zero tax and have turned their regulatory into secondary markets where they trade "credits" for cash and stick us with the bill. At BIZPAC, we have organized and are fighting back. Join with us and take control. Together, we are taking control and turning this around for small business owners.
---
## Announcing the VIP Founders Club
---
Join at the VIP Founders Club level and you and your guest never wait in line, pay a fee and you are invited to private briefings and exclusive receptions with only fellow VIP Founders Club Members. **We have 24 Luncheons and Receptions planned for 2025** **PLUS Special Events and trips to the Capital to work with our Legislators** **And** **the BIZPAC Center for Business Excellence Accelerator and PITCH ROOM**
---
|

Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! name: Stop the slaughter via Our Revolution
subject: Gaza
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

It happened again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20607?t=1011&akid=7353%2E5885482%2E_rNEcg ][IMG]

Three aid workers driving in a clearly marked World Central Kitchen
vehicle were just murdered by an Israeli airstrike. One victim,
Palestinian chef and co-founder of the Gaza Soup Kitchen, spent the last
year working day and night to feed more than 3,000 people a day.

Now he is dead, and even the UN has had to halt aid deliveries because it
is too dangerous. Without aid, starvation is imminent.

We HAVE to do something. And we have just a few weeks left before Trump
takes office to FORCE Biden and Congress to end U.S. support for this
heartbreaking, immoral war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20607?source=email-120524&t=1012&akid=7353%2E5885482%2E_rNEcg ]With enough public pressure, we can make this a tipping point moment to
bring this carnage to an end. Will you add your name, NOW?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20607?source=email-120524&t=1013&akid=7353%2E5885482%2E_rNEcg ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s easy to feel hopeless with one heartbreaking news story after the
next. But last week, President Biden announced that the U.S. had brokered
a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon. It was a huge step
forward, and shows that progress IS possible.

But we don’t have much time. Netanyahu was THRILLED by Trump’s victory
because he knows Trump will let him get away with anything he wants.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20607?t=1014&akid=7353%2E5885482%2E_rNEcg ][IMG]

That means we have just weeks left to FORCE Biden and Congress to act.
Tens of thousands of us have taken action – but we need to make it even
bigger, mobilizing record numbers to demand the U.S. stop enabling
Israel's wars.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20607?source=email-120524&t=1015&akid=7353%2E5885482%2E_rNEcg ]Will you help us build a massive call on the U.S. to stop the horrors?
Our voices will be delivered straight to decision-makers in these crucial
final weeks.

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, It happened again. [ ][IMG] Three aid workers driving in a clearly marked World Central Kitchen vehicle were just murdered by an Israeli airstrike. One victim, Palestinian chef and co-founder of the Gaza Soup Kitchen, spent the last year working day and night to feed more than 3,000 people a day. Now he is dead, and even the UN has had to halt aid deliveries because it is too dangerous. Without aid, starvation is imminent. We HAVE to do something. And we have just a few weeks left before Trump takes office to FORCE Biden and Congress to end U.S. support for this heartbreaking, immoral war. [ ]With enough public pressure, we can make this a tipping point moment to bring this carnage to an end. Will you add your name, NOW? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME It’s easy to feel hopeless with one heartbreaking news story after the next. But last week, President Biden announced that the U.S. had brokered a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon. It was a huge step forward, and shows that progress IS possible. But we don’t have much time. Netanyahu was THRILLED by Trump’s victory because he knows Trump will let him get away with anything he wants. [ ][IMG] That means we have just weeks left to FORCE Biden and Congress to act. Tens of thousands of us have taken action – but we need to make it even bigger, mobilizing record numbers to demand the U.S. stop enabling Israel's wars. [ ]Will you help us build a massive call on the U.S. to stop the horrors? Our voices will be delivered straight to decision-makers in these crucial final weeks. When we organize, we win. # [America's Violent Health System](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152597796&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTk3Nzk2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM0MjQ2ODUsImV4cCI6MTczNjAxNjY4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hilkBx4UqGaaPDxyCNCHoPtJyGNStzWILkQTIaZzf5w)
### An unknown assailant murdered the UnitedHealth CEO in broad daylight--and the majority of people watching laughed. Why?
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=152597796&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyNTk3Nzk2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMzQyNDY4NSwiZXhwIjoxNzM2MDE2Njg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jGfKPpLGCP0G0ggh6ouKYxiOhzcwUnfQS4_unh0G6JI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9hbWVyaWNhcy12aW9sZW50LWhlYWx0aC1zeXN0ZW0_.BaRFsgSgHO3WGDJLzD0avBOgflisQhYprDoh5Ggy6Jg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/americas-violent-health-system?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

"Kill a man, and you are a murderer. Kill millions of men, and you are a conqueror." -- Jean Rostand
This week's headlines report that the CEO of UnitedHealth was killed in broad daylight, the assailant escaping on what appeared to be an e-bike. While this shocking incident grabs the headlines, the deeper, quieter violence perpetrated by America's health ~~scam~~ system remains largely ignored. **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ye0CFZlO5QnZ0mZeNJI0ro40ha52oFNF644SoFu5LSE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152597796)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ea133240-b4ce-47de-8496-bbc90e5f0f03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Creator: Ronen Tivony | Credit: NurPhoto via Getty ImagesCopyright: Ronen Tivony/NurPhoto
### Let's Start With a Question
Can we agree that in the wealthiest country on Earth, no parent should have to watch their severely asthmatic child gasp for air because health insurance corporations deny them care? In 2017 I received a call from my wife Ayesha, frantic as she drove our then 4-year-old son to his doctor as he suffered an asthma attack. I was out of state and felt helpless but knew Ayesha would not relent until our son was safe.
Horrifyingly, our son's doctor would not see him because our insurance company declined coverage on the spot. My wife offered to pay out of pocket (by clearing out what little we had in our savings). The doctor explained that they also could not accept cash payments as our insurance company had a provision restricting cash payments when they were our insurer. Ridiculously, our insurance company was simultaneously denying us coverage, while preventing our doctor from treating us because, perhaps because they did not want to lose the revenue of a cash payment.
Finally, Ayesha rushed our son to the emergency room, where they were able to treat him and alleviate his asthma attack. It took us more than a year to pay the several thousand dollar emergency room bill.
Our health insurance company, the one who denied us care, was UnitedHealth.
Unfortunately, our story is not unique and the consequences are staggering. According to _The Lancet_ , at least [68,000 Americans die preventable deaths every year ](https://substack.com/redirect/b75ffcc5-2974-45fc-8699-33f38aa76c77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)because they are denied care or can't afford it. That's 68,000 people--grandparents, children, and loved ones--lost because healthcare in America is treated as a commodity rather than a basic human right.
And while we express disgust at the reckless murder of the UnitedHealth CEO, why stop there? Where is the outrage at UnitedHealth for perpetually being the worst offender and rejecting more insurance claims than any other company--rejections that cost countless lives annually?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d8ce9c2-4576-4a4c-993e-aabc14d0ad11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My child was among the 32% of patients suffering a medical emergency, denied care because UnitedHealth felt their right to make money was more important than my child's right to live. And my son is not alone. Last year UnitedHealth fired its intake team and implemented AI technology to process insurance claims for senior citizens. This decision resulted in the [rejection of more than 90% of claims for senior citizens](https://substack.com/redirect/335c76ac-9470-4f86-a96a-7674223147ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), leaving many without the critical medications they needed to survive, _and killing them_. This isn't just negligence--it's a system designed to prioritize profits over human lives.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ye0CFZlO5QnZ0mZeNJI0ro40ha52oFNF644SoFu5LSE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152597796)
### Why Are People Laughing At Murder?
In response to the murder of their CEO, UnitedHealth posted the below message on Facebook. Shortly after posting, they closed the comments section. Pay close attention to the makeup of the 42,000 reactions to the bottom left of their post.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13ca14f1-9098-4f16-87d7-d655a57f2549?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Of the 42,000+ reactions, 37,000 of them--nearly 90%--are people laughing in the face of UnitedHealth Group. Why?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67fc1377-9ef7-4fff-9669-c114c719f834?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I do not believe people are naturally cynical or evil minded. I do believe people see the horrible hypocrisy in lamenting the preventable death of one CEO worth tens of millions of dollars, while ignoring the annual preventable deaths of 70,000 Americans who are not worth tens of millions of dollars. Those upset about the 37,000 people laughing can either feel offended and (wrongly) assume 90% of Americans are evil, or they can reflect and realize the cruelty of the for-profit healthcare system is a daily torture for hundreds of millions of Americans--and people are tired of it. They are tired of an exploitative system that asks barbaric questions like, "_Is curing patients a sustainable business model_?"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5589cf15-3390-4e97-aff7-26618ad18a69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The corporate for profit grip on our healthcare system has pushed millions into financial ruin--with estimates of [500,000 annual medical bankruptcies](https://substack.com/redirect/d2a028cd-a64b-4982-a218-316d563080aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That financial ruin comes not just from major illnesses, but even from every day medications. For example, insulin, a life-saving medication that costs about $70 a year to produce, now costs $18,000 annually for many Americans. This is not inflation--it is exploitation--especially given that the scientists who discovered insulin sold its patent for $1 to ensure it would remain accessible to everyone.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ye0CFZlO5QnZ0mZeNJI0ro40ha52oFNF644SoFu5LSE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152597796)
### Let's Conclude With An Answer
It does not have to be this way. Countries around the world have proven that universal healthcare is possible and effective. They prioritize human dignity over corporate profits, while Americans are forced to fund a healthcare racket that leaves us sicker, poorer, and desperate. In fact, every single developed nation on Earth guarantees healthcare to its residents--except the United States.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/215ffc65-bba0-4e63-ad29-55711d129203?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A universal healthcare model would not only save thousands of precious lives, it would cost us $450 billion _less_ annually. Yet, this violence against human life, perpetrated by corporate greed, doesn't spark the outrage it deserves.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2cc56094-ab7c-4571-8841-28aba84dc737?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Study after study, including from prestigious outlets like The Lancet, prove that universal healthcare costs half per capita as the current exploitative for profit model, results in higher life expectancy, lower maternal mortality, lower infant mortality, and notably zero medical bankruptcies.
And to those who allege that a universal healthcare model will "result in long lines," I ask you to consider this. However those lines may be, keep in mind that already nearly 70,000 Americans die annually waiting in long American lines. Meanwhile, every developed nation that has universal healthcare has a higher life expectancy, lower maternal mortality, and lower infant mortality. This is not accident, it is the result of accessible healthcare. So however "long" those lines are in nations that guarantee healthcare, they are all shorter than the waiting lines in the United States that ultimately deny healthcare.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ea7f7b5-b9b7-418d-a51f-b825cc7d8e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And finally, while Republicans are the worst offenders in working to strip away healthcare after taking corporate money from Big Pharma, too many Democrats buy into the corporate greed as well.
For example, last year I ran for U.S. Congress on the platform of guaranteed universal healthcare. My opponent, a Democrat named Bill Foster, has voted three separate times with Republicans to gut the ACA, including to strip away protections for people with pre-existing conditions. Had he been successful it would have been a literal death sentence for two of my children, both of whom have chronic health conditions with preexisting conditions that are fatal if not immediately treated. I did not win the primary election, in significant part because the same corporate money used to buy Bill Foster's vote to try to strip our healthcare, was then spent to ensure he stayed in office, lest a new representative emerge who is focused on people's health, not personal profit.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ye0CFZlO5QnZ0mZeNJI0ro40ha52oFNF644SoFu5LSE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152597796)
### Conclusion
The struggle is ongoing, and we cannot relent. This same day the assailant murdered the UnitedHealth CEO, Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield announced that patients will have to pay out of pocket for anesthesia if their surgical procedure goes longer than expected. To call this dystopian is an understatement. And in case you were wondering, anesthesia typically costs $400 for the first 30 minutes and then $600 an hour after that.
The point of the Jean Rostand quote at the top of this article thus becomes clear. The man responsible for the UnitedHealth CEO's death is a murderer. Meanwhile, UnitedHealth and the for profit health insurance industry that has enabled the deaths of more than a million people in the 21st century alone, are on the cover of Fortune, Forbes, and Wall Street Journal, hailed as corporate conquerors.
Change will not come until we recognize that each of the nearly 70,000 lives annually lost due to denied healthcare, is as preventable and as cruel as the UnitedHealth CEO's targeted death. Because whether you are pulling a trigger in broad daylight, or denying life saving medication to an innocent 4-year-old child, the end result is the same preventable death.
This is a fight for human rights that we must win. It is a fight for our children, for the 70,000 Americans who die needlessly every year, for the 500,000 Americans who file medical bankruptcy annually, and for the tens of millions of families trapped in the cruel cycle of profit-driven exploitation. Let us demand better. Let us demand guaranteed universal healthcare--because our lives literally depend on it.
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. **To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32384bc4-a4f2-4363-93d5-93137c0d5ccc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

They are tired of an exploitative system that asks barbaric questions like, "Is curing patients a sustainable business model?" | | ---|---|--- The corporate for profit grip on our healthcare system has pushed millions into financial ruin--with estimates of . That financial ruin comes not just from major illnesses, but even from every day medications. For example, insulin, a life-saving medication that costs about $70 a year to produce, now costs $18,000 annually for many Americans. This is not inflation--it is exploitation--especially given that the scientists who discovered insulin sold its patent for $1 to ensure it would remain accessible to everyone. Let's Conclude With An Answer It does not have to be this way. Countries around the world have proven that universal healthcare is possible and effective. They prioritize human dignity over corporate profits, while Americans are forced to fund a healthcare racket that leaves us sicker, poorer, and desperate. In fact, every single developed nation on Earth guarantees healthcare to its residents--except the United States. | | ---|---|--- A universal healthcare model would not only save thousands of precious lives, it would cost us $450 billion less annually. Yet, this violence against human life, perpetrated by corporate greed, doesn't spark the outrage it deserves. | | ---|---|--- Study after study, including from prestigious outlets like The Lancet, prove that universal healthcare costs half per capita as the current exploitative for profit model, results in higher life expectancy, lower maternal mortality, lower infant mortality, and notably zero medical bankruptcies. And to those who allege that a universal healthcare model will "result in long lines," I ask you to consider this. However those lines may be, keep in mind that already nearly 70,000 Americans die annually waiting in long American lines. Meanwhile, every developed nation that has universal healthcare has a higher life expectancy, lower maternal mortality, and lower infant mortality. This is not accident, it is the result of accessible healthcare. So however "long" those lines are in nations that guarantee healthcare, they are all shorter than the waiting lines in the United States that ultimately deny healthcare. | | ---|---|--- And finally, while Republicans are the worst offenders in working to strip away healthcare after taking corporate money from Big Pharma, too many Democrats buy into the corporate greed as well. For example, last year I ran for U.S. Congress on the platform of guaranteed universal healthcare. My opponent, a Democrat named Bill Foster, has voted three separate times with Republicans to gut the ACA, including to strip away protections for people with pre-existing conditions. Had he been successful it would have been a literal death sentence for two of my children, both of whom have chronic health conditions with preexisting conditions that are fatal if not immediately treated. I did not win the primary election, in significant part because the same corporate money used to buy Bill Foster's vote to try to strip our healthcare, was then spent to ensure he stayed in office, lest a new representative emerge who is focused on people's health, not personal profit. Conclusion The struggle is ongoing, and we cannot relent. This same day the assailant murdered the UnitedHealth CEO, Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield announced that patients will have to pay out of pocket for anesthesia if their surgical procedure goes longer than expected. To call this dystopian is an understatement. And in case you were wondering, anesthesia typically costs $400 for the first 30 minutes and then $600 an hour after that. The point of the Jean Rostand quote at the top of this article thus becomes clear. The man responsible for the UnitedHealth CEO's death is a murderer. Meanwhile, UnitedHealth and the for profit health insurance industry that has enabled the deaths of more than a million people in the 21st century alone, are on the cover of Fortune, Forbes, and Wall Street Journal, hailed as corporate conquerors. Change will not come until we recognize that each of the nearly 70,000 lives annually lost due to denied healthcare, is as preventable and as cruel as the UnitedHealth CEO's targeted death. Because whether you are pulling a trigger in broad daylight, or denying life saving medication to an innocent 4-year-old child, the end result is the same preventable death. This is a fight for human rights that we must win. It is a fight for our children, for the 70,000 Americans who die needlessly every year, for the 500,000 Americans who file medical bankruptcy annually, and for the tens of millions of families trapped in the cruel cycle of profit-driven exploitation. Let us demand better. Let us demand guaranteed universal healthcare--because our lives literally depend on it. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.** | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid. When possible, I hope you'll upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

Folks, we ALL knew Trump's cabinet picks were going to be bad, but this one really pisses us off.
Last month Trump nominated Lee Zeldin to lead the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA). Don't know who that is? Let us catch you up to speed:
Not only has Zeldin publicly questioned the validity of climate change, he's promised to "roll back" the environmental regulations that keep our air, water, and communities clean. While in Congress, he voted to cut the EPA's budget by _over one billion dollars. _He also took **over $200,000** from Big Oil for his campaigns.
**So why did this guy get nominated to lead the EPA? _Because he's a Trump loyalist willing to bow down to Big Oil._**
[As head of the EPA, Lee Zeldin would be nothing more than a stand-in for Big Oil. That's why we're partnering with other progressive leaders to fight his appointment. | _**We officially have our first Republican opponent of 2026.**_

With the recent Trump victory, MAGA Republicans are feeling emboldened. It’s no surprise far-right opponents are already lining up to take this seat in the midterms. While we’re so proud of our victory, Republicans see something different–I LOST ground! I won by three points LESS than my first election.

I honestly can’t tell you how much I dislike the constant fundraising in campaigns. But we can expect my opponents to come prepared with a massive war chest funded by Republican megadonors. We can’t take anything for granted. You know by now–it takes 3 cycles to truly claim a new district–flip, hold, build.

But we know that MI-03 is a beacon for our ability to make progress. Our victory this year was only possible thanks to the work we put in TWO years in advance. [_**That means that the path to a 2026 victory begins right here, right now. clean_body: We can’t take anything for granted. You know by now–it takes 3 cycles to truly claim a new district–flip, hold, build. | = | We officially have our first Republican opponent of 2026. With the recent Trump victory, MAGA Republicans are feeling emboldened. It’s no surprise far-right opponents are already lining up to take this seat in the midterms. While we’re so proud of our victory, Republicans see something different–I LOST ground! I won by three points LESS than my first election. I honestly can’t tell you how much I dislike the constant fundraising in campaigns. But we can expect my opponents to come prepared with a massive war chest funded by Republican megadonors. We can’t take anything for granted. You know by now–it takes 3 cycles to truly claim a new district–flip, hold, build. But we know that MI-03 is a beacon for our ability to make progress. Our victory this year was only possible thanks to the work we put in TWO years in advance. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: David Horowitz
subject: America Betrayed
body:
I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. | |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c4ed10affcd444388f2829a49ece2269&_e=njXqCtw8aGpAJHnUKg1XYyYRyNmyH8BGsGsbo6R0dafOrJidHDNVNPtdSOtfDEdFvAB6nlw7tOwZkCVlBYzNgkDuAMiHX7UTT9C-cydSypsKrGCT3CfCLxlJoyeu0jKna5pYYfcjx66YM9Laqu-5dlFFluRz-ZUdFeT1C-xCJznjMgCWMX3bgRFaHln6ZcX10uZsdOg9ezb_UJbKiLpbon8emUdXt9YRQYomMc_d-MPXz90fxPZTKfWfic22AchKuJB0PwwsR_eSrIYb6d89A639JpshPB1lOLiDLBVUdwkOiz1GaklmbBkWhuqMnZUHva5Vb9IQk-BFxsiryvXA2V9CPPgDQOQkAPIopap_rkAGzZZIz71bD_HGU48e_wvKCah7orZZeGMd7k-wK1XD3g%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c4ed10affcd444388f2829a49ece2269&_e=njXqCtw8aGpAJHnUKg1XYyYRyNmyH8BGsGsbo6R0dafOrJidHDNVNPtdSOtfDEdFvAB6nlw7tOwZkCVlBYzNgkDuAMiHX7UTT9C-cydSypsKrGCT3CfCLxlJoyeu0jKna5pYYfcjx66YM9Laqu-5dlFFluRz-ZUdFeT1C-xCJznjMgCWMX3bgRFaHln6ZcX10uZsdOg9ezb_UJbKiLpbon8emUdXt9YRQYomMc_d-MPXz90fxPZTKfWfic22AchKJTznuwb6et1qmWeM6IRJqXOklpuHaVGvnriGoMVigPop1xl4TkG4ZMG2gr4SNT3sWjFHR5BW0k6JUaCZD56xKV-wwskicc82L2GL6A7rvZj6LZUCujbcDtK3fIUoxW-RT9xAgVGK4teMRLoI5l702g%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c4ed10affcd444388f2829a49ece2269&_e=njXqCtw8aGpAJHnUKg1XYyYRyNmyH8BGsGsbo6R0dafOrJidHDNVNPtdSOtfDEdFvAB6nlw7tOwZkCVlBYzNgkDuAMiHX7UTT9C-cydSypsKrGCT3CfCLxlJoyeu0jKna5pYYfcjx66YM9Laqu-5dlFFluRz-ZUdFeT1C-xCJznjMgCWMX3bgRFaHln6ZcX10uZsdOg9ezb_UJbKiLpbon8emUdXt9YRQYomMc_d-MPXz90fxPZTKfWfic22AchKj4FJk7mvfzPCakTIEcYZKi6b9Eu7HMc7hrXEmSaN5gjXbJcdFmZmHgn9WBNVjk8GPmIy_fqGMf3lVrCmX1RL79oJAVIIut4QkGICCPgVGh9Y7h3jUFIdkLr18uY0WQ-LzC1xa1RyGjpRfP-sLHHT1g%3D%3D)**

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I could use your help, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This will only take a minute:

|
---
| | | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n6jeH23JCJ693vnlxVtwLA~~/AARclAA~)
---

**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM
HOUSE MAJORITY LEADER STEVE SCALISE **
As House Majority Leader, I'm committed to delivering on the America First agenda that we've been fighting for. **But I could use your help.
**
As someone who's been in the trenches, fighting for our conservative values, I know that the best ideas don't come from Washington - they come from people like you. That's why House Republicans are launching the **[America First Majority Agenda Audit](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n6jeH23JCJ693vnlxVtwLA~~/AARclAA~ "America First Majority Agenda Audit")** , and I'm specifically asking for your input, Friend.

**I chose you out of thousands of patriots because I want to hear directly from you about what matters most to you.** This survey covers a wide range of issues like securing our borders, energy independence, no tax on tips, and much more. As always, I'll leave a space where you can freely share your input and advice.

Your input will help shape our legislative priorities and ensure that we're fighting for the issues that matter most to you.

This isn't just about checking a box or sending a survey - **this is about building a movement. This is about taking back our country from the Radical Left and restoring the values that have always made America great.**

So please, take a few minutes to share your thoughts with me. **[What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n6jeH23JCJ693vnlxVtwLA~~/AARclAA~ "What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA AUDIT >> ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n6jeH23JCJ693vnlxVtwLA~~/AARclAA~ "Generic Button")
---

**My team and I will review every response submitted before 10 PM tonight and we'll be using your input to shape our legislative agenda.** This is your chance to make your voice heard and help us build an America First Majority that will last for generations to come.

I look forward to reviewing your responses.

For America,

---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n6jeH23JCJ693vnlxVtwLA~~/AARclAA~)
---

_Steve Scalise_

**MAJORITY LEADER**

This is about taking back our country from the Radical Left and restoring the values that have always made America great. So please, take a few minutes to share your thoughts with me. "What should we be focusing on? What are your top priorities?" | | | "Generic Button" My team and I will review every response submitted before 10 PM tonight and we'll be using your input to shape our legislative agenda. This is your chance to make your voice heard and help us build an America First Majority that will last for generations to come. I look forward to reviewing your responses. For America, | Steve Scalise MAJORITY LEADER | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ~ NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). name: Our 51st State!? (via VPP)
subject: this is a TOTAL gamechanger!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Click to unlock 2 more Dem Senators >>
| **You know:** DC is missing representation in Congress due to its lack of statehood. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241205_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18142%2E878179%2ExuV40x) **You know:** If DC becomes a state, we’d be __almost guaranteed__ to gain 2 more Democratic Senators.

**And you know:** Control of the Senate usually comes down to just 1 or 2 seats — _DC statehood could _lock down_ a Democratic Senate majority for us, team!_

**[So we need to know if you support the fight for DC Statehood: Take your one-click poll ASAP! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241205_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18142%2E878179%2ExuV40x)** | [DC SHOULD BE THE 51ST STATE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241205_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18142%2E878179%2ExuV40x)

[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v3/?source=VPP_20241205_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=18142%2E878179%2ExuV40x)
Thank you!
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18142%2E878179%2ExuV40x). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18142%2E878179%2ExuV40x).**

body:
