Hi Derek, Virginia’s future depends on bold action – but we don’t need a wizard to help us, we need **you**. With your help, we can ensure that Virginia is changed _For Good._ But here’s the twist: Republicans are scheming to undo everything we’ve accomplished. They want to turn back the clock on reproductive rights, economic opportunity, and the fight for justice. But have we got news for them: _**Nobody, in all of Virginia, is ever gonna bring us down!**_ [_**By joining Team DPVA as a recurring donor, you’ll help us build the year-round infrastructure we need to keep Virginia _Dancing Through Life._ Will you commit to a monthly pledge of $10?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98231680/515983550/-807643367?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11691-20241205-Wicked-SL-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBhNzQ5Zi00MGIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9v_q9teNrsffiaVz8-oJesYArSUMnN-C24QZLyii8w=) | **************[PLEDGE $10 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98231681/515983551/-807643367?&recurring=auto&refcode=E11691-20241205-Wicked-SB-Other&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBhNzQ5Zi00MGIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9v_q9teNrsffiaVz8-oJesYArSUMnN-C24QZLyii8w=)**************

Here’s why it matters:
💚 Monthly gifts help us fight back against _Wicked_ Republican rhetoric;

# [#]
Peter,

The 2025 legislative session starts in January, and the Texas GOP is going ALL IN to attack everyday Texans by:

* Introducing a new bathroom bill to target our transgender community and ban them from using publicly owned bathrooms in Texas.
* Ignoring the humanity of migrants by introducing new bills that would further dehumanize and target them.
* Continuously targeting our reproductive freedom by trying to empower the Texas Attorney General to prosecute abortion-related “criminal offenses”.

Enough is enough, Peter.

We’re ready to show MAGA extremists that we can fight back against their attacks, but we need to know if you’re with us. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today.

Will you commit to helping us fight back against their attacks on our rights by adding your name to our pledge today? We only need 1,000 of our top supporters to sign on » [https://secure.everyaction.com/SlqjF-1Rl0W0nfWxBewtaw2]

SIGN THE PLEDGE ✍️ » [https://secure.everyaction.com/SlqjF-1Rl0W0nfWxBewtaw2]

Here at TOP PAC, our mission is to push our state toward a progressive future where ALL TEXANS have the opportunity to thrive — no matter our age, race, faith, or gender.

Thank you for signing!

While Democrats in New Mexico and beyond get ready to defend democracy and our freedoms, Donald Trump is fully underway with his nominations for the U.S. Cabinet.
From Project 2025 co-author Brendan Carr to celebrity surgeon Dr. Mehmet Oz to controversial former Fox News host Pete Hegseth, Trump’s nominations are alarming, to say the least.
That’s why we need to hear from you, folks. It’s an unprecedented, difficult time, but we’ve got a long road ahead of us and we need to get ready. name: Team McBride
subject: Staying focused on what matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Sarah’s already hard at work planning how to best serve our neighbors in Congress.
#
It’s been one month since Sarah was elected to be Delaware’s next Congresswoman — and even though she hasn’t been sworn in yet, she’s already hard at work planning how to best serve our neighbors in Congress.
From orientation at the Capitol to attacks from the far-right, it’s been a busy month to say the least. And with the new Congress set to begin on January 3rd, we don’t expect things to slow down any time soon.
**Through all of it, Sarah’s staying focused on what matters most: bringing costs down and improving the quality of life for Delawareans up and down the state.**
And as we get ready for what’s sure to be a busy and chaotic term, we’re so grateful to have you on our team. Your support helped Sarah make history in November, and it will help her continue to deliver for Delaware in the next Congress.
[**As we start to look toward a new year under a new Trump administration, will you pitch in $5 or more to help Sarah keep fighting for Delaware?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241205-1?refcode=em20241205-1601&amount=5&refcode2=1601_21716_AILHfD&akid=1601%2E21716%2EAILHfD)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241205-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241205-1601&refcode2=1601_21716_AILHfD&akid=1601%2E21716%2EAILHfD)**
Thank you,
Team McBride

name: VoteVets
subject: Trump and his billionaire buddies want to destroy the VA to make a quick buck
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump’s appointees — the architects of Project 2025 — are getting ready to execute their plan to slash benefits for Veterans, gut the agency of career public servants, replace them with Trump loyalists, and privatize care. And we’ll just let you guess who will pick up those contracts when privatization comes around...
#
Peter —
Trump has tasked Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy — two filthy rich, unelected bureaucrats — with dismantling the federal government and slashing trillions in spending.
They’re going to start by destroying the VA.
**FIRST:** Ramaswamy put the Veteran's Health Care Eligibility Act, a $119 billion program that funds medical services for Veterans, on the chopping block.
**THEN:** Trump’s team soft launched a hit campaign at the “absurdly generous” disability benefits Veterans receive in an uncredited editorial from The Economist.
**NOW:** Trump’s appointees — the architects of Project 2025 — are getting ready to execute their plan to slash benefits for Veterans, gut the agency of career public servants, replace them with Trump loyalists, and privatize care. And we’ll just let you guess who will pick up those contracts when privatization comes around...
So, they’ve told us what they want to do. Trump campaigned on it. Project 2025 goes into exacting detail about it. And now, with weeks until they take office, his team is finalizing their plans.
It’s a complete and total betrayal of the pact we made with our Veterans, and VoteVets will do everything we can to stop it.
If every person reading this email chipped in $5 or $10, we’d raise enough to put these charlatans and hucksters on blast — on television, radio, social media, and beyond.
But that’s just the problem. Not everyone donates. And that’s why it is so important that you chip in if you can, Peter.
[**Can we count on you to chip in $15 and help us fight back against Trump and his administration's plans to gut care for Veterans?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241205-1-30&t=1&akid=34008%2E3013755%2Eh9npNK)

| | Standing up for hardworking Oregonians has always been my top priority, Peter. I’ve fought hard to raise wages, lower prices, and strengthen workers’ rights — and thanks to the support of people like you who helped me win reelection in Oregon’s 4th District, I’ll continue that fight for the next two years. But as Donald Trump prepares to reenter the White House, I wanted to reach out to you before the holidays to ensure I’m also fighting for your priorities during the second Trump administration. body:
Extreme politicians have tried time and time again to raise the retirement age and cut funding for Social Security

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98233951/515989390/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDkwNDA0Mi00OGIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hm-vhtXNN4JcQhoVRATZUaHI1OoaNjt0RvtAo84WT08=) Since her first day in Congress, Sharice Davids has put the needs of Kansas families first — no matter what party is in charge in Washington. That’s why she voted earlier this year to pass a bipartisan bill to expand Social Security benefits to thousands of police officers, teachers, firefighters, and public sector retirees across Kansas: _**“Sharice Davids Votes for Social Security Fairness Act to Repeal Unfair Provisions” - KCLY**_ Lately, we’ve seen extreme politicians try again and again to raise the retirement age and cut Social Security benefits. But Sharice understands just how vital Social Security is to seniors and working families, and she’s worked with members of both parties to ensure hard-working Kansans receive each and every benefit they’ve earned. Sharice is committed to making our government work for everyone — and that includes keeping our promise to America’s seniors, who have put in a lifetime of hard work to earn these benefits. [_**Every day, Sharice has brought effective, bipartisan leadership to the halls of Congress — all while staying true to the values of KS-03. name: Dr. Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: How to Read the Bible like a Seminary Professor
body:
Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible? | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=9f5424d0a5184fd1a01ce24f8a471498&_t=1yqfjkylodNWJUMh3F6OPvNlAJ43rZus89f-BP0vxpg5koaIcylNR34qb5jRHy4MsEaG_N823nrCdLY78afDVEcpAvDuOqn2h4BQtVeH6B6Z1QEm8GktYvxNylpYOP8s)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9f5424d0a5184fd1a01ce24f8a471498&_e=HqpnJmXQOoYGAHk0xZDkPRwP9hBHhx8xyzpdM7BXsuiJlCYLfEPvlrWH7BWQHg2_NMQ_rfPUMYMZPZCQ-W8nUnVwGFQsyZJCgg3sfFnURWiTPfXbG5fo06MfEIgkLF5ERw5AYasNGceXRAp6bYq2Cld4jFJZfft0xKe2a0f1gWIWYv9n7j63p6qLBtwMWaxAX_ha8ClLfRIvZRGA6jsIGgQq4l0p5efT9q4i8U14cVYTVIdLbMuDJAYtrvemlZqD3QUhqtkj49qAFJaSH7Siq-nGOo_CHEl6VOH_u9MYKfdbupbpG-W4JGvw8OeARzKBzpl1NdV0vQ0QQYA6JJQ4vX-mlqKhdOWYKK2A-LHOm0JVPVsdrIKk3FNXJR6GChWBx8CdPHrcg2RbzVswz-s4AQQzQe3jVyApZyC73e46RSE%3D)
Dear Friend, Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible?

You read for a few minutes, shut your Bible, and then go about your day without another thought about what you've read. In some cases, it's become more of a task than inspiration. Or you've given up on reading the Bible altogether because it's just too overwhelming.

Maybe you've said to yourself: "I don't even know how to begin." [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9f5424d0a5184fd1a01ce24f8a471498&_e=HqpnJmXQOoYGAHk0xZDkPRwP9hBHhx8xyzpdM7BXsuiJlCYLfEPvlrWH7BWQHg2_NMQ_rfPUMYMZPZCQ-W8nUnVwGFQsyZJCgg3sfFnURWiTPfXbG5fo06MfEIgkLF5ERw5AYasNGceXRAp6bYq2Cld4jFJZfft0xKe2a0f1gWIWYv9n7j63p6qLBtwMWaxAX_ha8ClLfRIvZRGA6jsIGgQq4l0p5efT9q4i8U14cVYTVIdLbMuDJAYtrvemlZqD3QUhqtkj49qAFJaSH7SiqyjMxMeQXMtLuCsCsc77rJe_OVqyn-5EcCPwbpBha_Xt5ukf0xuK6Rkm2nFCJop6PmsYwWVxABfLyPlx4DY_9xt7RQ4z1wC4xwlwIchXFx0w0SPLgd-WyOKLEH1TwgNIgn88Blhb0H2zXVp42MdmnEM%3D)
__ I understand. We all go through this in our spiritual journey.

Please let me encourage you that God loves it when you read His Word and offer you some guidance. **The goal of studying the Bible is not information --it's transformation.**

To help you grow stronger in your faith and spiritual maturity as you read the Bible, we've put together a free online course, ["How to Read the Bible Like a Seminary Professor."](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9f5424d0a5184fd1a01ce24f8a471498&_e=HqpnJmXQOoYGAHk0xZDkPRwP9hBHhx8xyzpdM7BXsuiJlCYLfEPvlrWH7BWQHg2_NMQ_rfPUMYMZPZCQ-W8nUnVwGFQsyZJCgg3sfFnURWiTPfXbG5fo06MfEIgkLF5ERw5AYasNGceXRAp6bYq2Cld4jFJZfft0xKe2a0f1gWIWYv9n7j63p6qLBtwMWaxAX_ha8ClLfRIvZRGA6jsIGgQq4l0p5efT9q4i8U14cVYTVIdLbMuDJAYtrvemlZqD3QUhqtkj49qAFJaSH7SiqzDjWnuPJSOg7ylNKSfwZHHNOSss_SjhsCvmdg6rVeB6G8bYNS92g9iBp9qFgYbqA476RQkGrOXiIiTxeuCN45DXKbcj9ClmPErA8vC2-xT-LSNpDpQWJqIVXI0wMZcgwv7h1QYypnQS59vllTZI8js%3D)

In this course, Dr. Howard G. Hendricks uses his 3-step approach of observation, interpretation, and application to help you get the most from reading the Bible.

I pray, as you go through the course, you'll discover the personal joy of reading God's Word.

If you want to deepen your faith and transform your life, access your free course now: [https://courses.dts.edu/courses/how-to-read-the-bible-like-a-seminary-professor](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9f5424d0a5184fd1a01ce24f8a471498&_e=HqpnJmXQOoYGAHk0xZDkPRwP9hBHhx8xyzpdM7BXsuiJlCYLfEPvlrWH7BWQHg2_NMQ_rfPUMYMZPZCQ-W8nUnVwGFQsyZJCgg3sfFnURWiTPfXbG5fo06MfEIgkLF5ERw5AYasNGceXRAp6bYq2Cld4jFJZfft0xKe2a0f1gWIWYv9n7j63p6qLBtwMWaxAX_ha8ClLfRIvZRGA6jsIGgQq4l0p5efT9q4i8U14cVYTVIdLbMuDJAYtrvemlZqD3QUhqtkj49qAFJaSH7Siq1oNOKwBxSz-A-6SFwglDyq2mh9bqOkbJZAGXWBSNiQ1091rjv6uKhctz1I7lnsMN0RMgfRgCJ6g4tzX8M-KJn-FnOaezvEctB1TLOf4-0p2eR-N41EMhVs-I6NK2Vl-wZY2J4ESKceEycS3DlGWOKg%3D)

clean_body: Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible? | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible? You read for a few minutes, shut your Bible, and then go about your day without another thought about what you've read. In some cases, it's become more of a task than inspiration. Or you've given up on reading the Bible altogether because it's just too overwhelming. Maybe you've said to yourself: "I don't even know how to begin." I understand. We all go through this in our spiritual journey. Please let me encourage you that God loves it when you read His Word and offer you some guidance. The goal of studying the Bible is not information --it's transformation. To help you grow stronger in your faith and spiritual maturity as you read the Bible, we've put together a free online course, In this course, Dr. Howard G. Hendricks uses his 3-step approach of observation, interpretation, and application to help you get the most from reading the Bible. I pray, as you go through the course, you'll discover the personal joy of reading God's Word. If you want to deepen your faith and transform your life, access your free course now: Blessings, Dr. Mark Yarbrough President P.S. Reading the Bible can change your life. Access your free online course, "How to Read the Bible Like a Seminary Professor." >> Dallas Theological Seminary 3909 Swiss Avenue Dallas, TX 75204 USA .

name: David Hogg
subject: Some thoughts on accountability
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I should have told President Biden to drop out of the race.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241205-1&t=1&akid=1499%2E587540%2Exh_z8l)
Peter,
I think one of the hardest parts of watching the pundits and folks on social media discuss the election results these past few weeks is the refusal of many to take accountability. We (including myself) made mistakes and it’s time to learn to do better.
**I’ll start by taking some personal accountability:** I met with President Biden one-on-one in the Oval Office fourteen months ago. I distinctly remember him asking me how he could win the youth vote in the election. Looking back, I realize now that I should have told President Biden to drop out of the race then and there.
Instead, I told the president what he wanted to hear, not what he needed to hear. If I had the courage to say what I should have said, I might’ve been kicked out of the meeting. And even if I weren’t, it’s unlikely he’d have listened to me.
What made it hard to say that is what I think many also felt, which is that President Biden had so many significant accomplishments under his belt. He was the most pro-labor president in history, passed the first gun law at the federal level in 30 years and spearheaded the largest investment in climate action ever. He was handed a pandemic-era economy and did everything he could to turn it around.
But just because President Biden was successful didn’t mean he could win the election, and Democrats should have reckoned with that fact far sooner – including myself.
There were serious concerns about whether President Biden was up to the job. We should have been honest about that long before the disastrous June debate.
The truth of the matter is that, even during our meeting, I had some unspoken fears about the youth vote, especially young men. I knew that President Biden and Democrats were largely losing this group. We needed a new message – **and a new messenger throughout the campaign** – if we were going to reach them. The consultant class didn’t want to hear about that, but I should’ve been more forceful about voicing my concerns and pushing for change. I should have pushed even harder to make sure we focused more on young voters when I was yelled at by 45+ year old consultants who insisted the youth vote was fine after I raised these concerns publicly prior to the election.
In retrospect, that meeting with President Biden that I was so excited about will be a permanent nightmare for me. But it’s also a clear lesson on how I can do better. This is only one piece of the puzzle about why we lost, but it’s a piece I can own.
**I’m done with telling people what they want to hear, no matter how powerful they are. As Democrats, we should be honest and hold each other accountable.**
I’ve seen just how important the work we’re doing here at Leaders We Deserve really is. We aren’t going to win the youth vote with the old guard of Democratic establishment politicians from yesterday. We need to lift up the future of our movement and support the next generation of bold, progressive leaders.
**If Democrats want to win with young people, we can no longer represent the status quo. We need to support the leaders who understand our struggles and are willing to stand up and fight for us.** Leaders who understand that while institutions are important we also need to do the real work to improve them rather than sending the signal to voters that all is fine even as our government gets hollowed out by the billionaires like Elon Musk who want to starve the middle class by crushing unions and poison us by cutting environmental regulations.
We need to give young people a real reason to vote for Democrats – otherwise, we’ll continue to lose like we did in this election.
**[With that in mind, will you make a $5 contribution now to power the work we’re doing electing Gen-Z and Millennials to state legislatures and Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241205-1?refcode=em20241205-1499&amount=5&refcode2=1499_587540_xh_z8l&akid=1499%2E587540%2Exh_z8l)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241205-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241205-1499&refcode2=1499_587540_xh_z8l&akid=1499%2E587540%2Exh_z8l)**
**Thank you for staying in the fight, Peter.**
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241205-1&t=2&refcode2=1499_587540_xh_z8l&akid=1499%2E587540%2Exh_z8l)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1499%2E587540%2Exh_z8l)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1499%2E587540%2Exh_z8l)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=caf7e35cb6d54d9593dfba4ad6c6740c&_e=7diSm5lvQOF0VJ_TWqSfBWKOuOhLGx2as8zzKjs180869nyBD_R1fXt7OXmeLjg6rn1zn5moT-LhpnLGw82A1QtRStPxp83S8PkTq9IaXuxnMcl1noDK75_T7AVki0QHmbVrDA25_ouJx2rFxCVO2I0j8cUt-by7UvlJDm22GB0D3KqtFdmVVmSbQRgUX-qZPmIDMl_I1tKATftFXchgOFTcp7DqD4Eln2Wy-aiudvt84aj6RBYiNA16QrDmuKmlngPONH957Jl6xSHxLThHkRw-_en_TFgRvt7skVAAdczYGQsliduqmBE-X-8S2nRpU_Koy_ivDxgkIzAqfWdUsbzMNv6FsnHukQdXGkoFknd-KE_yZQtbKODrOq2WyXQs9q4jJ89QVAOdyI8AtjBGIQ%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=caf7e35cb6d54d9593dfba4ad6c6740c&_e=7diSm5lvQOF0VJ_TWqSfBWKOuOhLGx2as8zzKjs180869nyBD_R1fXt7OXmeLjg6rn1zn5moT-LhpnLGw82A1QtRStPxp83S8PkTq9IaXuxnMcl1noDK75_T7AVki0QHmbVrDA25_ouJx2rFxCVO2I0j8cUt-by7UvlJDm22GB0D3KqtFdmVVmSbQRgUX-qZPmIDMl_I1tKATftFXchgOFTcp7DqD4Eln2Wy-aiudvt84aj6RBYiNA16QrDmuKmll8kbvwLaoWA5pWBeoa734dHkcMClx686Fmlvl1eT4cQjGwotpB4DVcEnBWcgSsR8-AtxtUFl03yDE1kY3ORJJU-bm53mh7IXWZCopl9aSqJTJPArRd-gQmXLzlOVwvg6SWOgEYRQx8RDRpfpBL_FIA%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=caf7e35cb6d54d9593dfba4ad6c6740c&_e=7diSm5lvQOF0VJ_TWqSfBWKOuOhLGx2as8zzKjs180869nyBD_R1fXt7OXmeLjg6rn1zn5moT-LhpnLGw82A1QtRStPxp83S8PkTq9IaXuxnMcl1noDK75_T7AVki0QHmbVrDA25_ouJx2rFxCVO2I0j8cUt-by7UvlJDm22GB0D3KqtFdmVVmSbQRgUX-qZPmIDMl_I1tKATftFXchgOFTcp7DqD4Eln2Wy-aiudvt84aj6RBYiNA16QrDmuKmlHOsIKt0nqVD2f-T6n6lDqSsn3wcvYi2ioQLLYhYzEIHb9eoueav-UunAnbxAeachaJYoeH-_pwyy_j5D9rYc8X7GUbwxwYw-wfFHSDBqK9vTSowBSZ9ffsGlxXV_81wQQ_Y90O5iVv8pN9ZBGt_D0g%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=caf7e35cb6d54d9593dfba4ad6c6740c&_e=7diSm5lvQOF0VJ_TWqSfBWKOuOhLGx2as8zzKjs180869nyBD_R1fXt7OXmeLjg6rn1zn5moT-LhpnLGw82A1QtRStPxp83S8PkTq9IaXuxnMcl1noDK75_T7AVki0QHmbVrDA25_ouJx2rFxCVO2I0j8cUt-by7UvlJDm22GB0D3KqtFdmVVmSbQRgUX-qZPmIDMl_I1tKATftFXchgOFTcp7DqD4Eln2Wy-aiudvt84aj6RBYiNA16QrDmuKml3zL9hLSvFbnJxoq1fpG_VyrCs1mIelHWvmT_oDOpH4MFeLH1UPr7KqiVwg5eig2LJk4Atz9bbMe1OeO3Cg6wtyI5rgCO8G4Bu1SBbCDcSPGVfHZsxQ1dv-GFTMR5Jgn9E0uGCNuUcefzf75iM-iWmA%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=caf7e35cb6d54d9593dfba4ad6c6740c&_e=7diSm5lvQOF0VJ_TWqSfBWKOuOhLGx2as8zzKjs180869nyBD_R1fXt7OXmeLjg6rn1zn5moT-LhpnLGw82A1QtRStPxp83S8PkTq9IaXuxnMcl1noDK75_T7AVki0QHmbVrDA25_ouJx2rFxCVO2I0j8cUt-by7UvlJDm22GB0D3KqtFdmVVmSbQRgUX-qZPmIDMl_I1tKATftFXchgOFTcp7DqD4Eln2Wy-aiudvt84aj6RBYiNA16QrDmuKmlNtWVj7yvmPf-camiqnj2OgDyiXGIDFxICkgeW6vo0OLttYkC4K6t3PydVzMHNALoBmcnNJHC5SbCT4bds7Uq1bi2QbFqoWfNIRzpuq1Y9rzvHy4WxJXNfv0MhqS4OvKrwueORsUZVpBS8UgKe0ehkA%3D%3D)

name: Team Cooper Updates
subject: nearly 600,000 covered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Medicaid expansion has been a SUCCESS.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98234433/515991181/823540626?refcode=ea.0ef3c5bf-4ab3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.0ef3c5bf-4ab3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWYzYzViZi00YWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yUK9xoUMGO86SYN6rqrHESF5Cm0WZwmhwcPInhWqrA8=&emci=df26416e-35b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0ef3c5bf-4ab3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1049176)
**As Governor of North Carolina, one of Roy Cooper’s top missions has been to get people healthier. That’s why he prioritized expanding Medicaid from Day One — and just over a year ago, after years of twists and turns, Medicaid expansion was finally enacted.** It wasn’t easy, Peter, but we _never_ gave up on our goal of leveling the health care playing field to get working North Carolinians the care they deserve. After trying to expand Medicaid during his first week in office, the Republican legislature sued Gov. Cooper in federal court. But in 2023, some of those same legislative leaders joined him to sign the Medicaid expansion bill we needed for so long. It was a bold step that will have a positive impact on our state for generations to come. **We are proud and grateful that nearly 600,000 North Carolinians have already enrolled in Medicaid through the expansion just one year later. That’s the number we originally hoped to see in _two_ years!** Passing expansion also unlocked more than $830 million in new investments in mental health and addiction treatment that we know go hand in hand with staying healthy. Not only will it make our state healthier, Medicaid expansion will also help North Carolinians achieve greater educational and employment opportunities. People need to be healthy in order to get educated and to work at good jobs to make money for their families. **This is a big win for all of North Carolina — and we couldn’t have done it without you.** You joined us in tirelessly advocating for this outcome. Your support moved the needle to get Republicans on board. _Thank you._ There is still more work to do for our state. More progress to achieve. We’re counting on you to be with us. Thank you, Team Cooper | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98234434/515991182/-1724542601?refcode=ea.0ef3c5bf-4ab3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.0ef3c5bf-4ab3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWYzYzViZi00YWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yUK9xoUMGO86SYN6rqrHESF5Cm0WZwmhwcPInhWqrA8=)

name: WFP Election Results
subject: The final seat in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, The last race for Congress was just called in California — and the result may end up having a huge impact on the national political landscape. After all the ballot counting finished this week, Democrat Adam Gray ended up successfully ousting the incumbent Republican in California’s 13th Congressional District by less than 200 votes. With every Congressional seat across the country now called, it’s official: **Republicans will enter the new Congress with the narrowest House majority of any party since at least the 1930s — a 220-215 vote margin that will be even slimmer at the start of 2025 due to three vacancies.** Effectively, starting in January, Republicans will need to rely on _every last vote_ in their fractious caucus in order to advance their agenda in the House. None of us have a crystal ball. But throw in absences, special elections, the chaos of the new administration, and other unpredictable events, and there’s every chance that we could end up with some major opportunities over the next year or two to block the Republican agenda and win back governing power for working people in the House. [**We need to be prepared for whatever this new Congress might throw at us starting in just a few weeks. clean_body: | | | Peter, The last race for Congress was just called in California — and the result may end up having a huge impact on the national political landscape. After all the ballot counting finished this week, Democrat Adam Gray ended up successfully ousting the incumbent Republican in California’s 13th Congressional District by less than 200 votes. With every Congressional seat across the country now called, it’s official: Republicans will enter the new Congress with the narrowest House majority of any party since at least the 1930s — a 220-215 vote margin that will be even slimmer at the start of 2025 due to three vacancies. Effectively, starting in January, Republicans will need to rely on every last vote in their fractious caucus in order to advance their agenda in the House. None of us have a crystal ball. But throw in absences, special elections, the chaos of the new administration, and other unpredictable events, and there’s every chance that we could end up with some major opportunities over the next year or two to block the Republican agenda and win back governing power for working people in the House. The race in CA-13 was one of many battleground districts which came down to the wire this year. And our work made a huge collective difference in narrowing the Republican majority from coast to coast. In 2023, we helped launch two coalition efforts: Battleground New York and Battleground California , that raised millions to target and flip competitive House districts, bringing together base-building organizations to lay the groundwork to identify and target flippable districts. Through Battleground’s canvassing, phonebanking, digital advertising, mail, and other voter outreach, our hard work paid off. In total, we helped flip six House seats in battleground districts in 2024 in California and New York — wins that helped erode the Republican majority into the smallest in living memory. And over the last few weeks since Election Day, Battleground CA member organizations cured more than 300 ballots in CA-13, helping make sure every last ballot was counted in the final race to be called. Republicans and Trump may be dead set on passing their Project 2025 agenda through the House — but we are dead set on doing everything we can to thwart them at every turn, and preparing now to upend their slim majority in 2026. Our work in battleground districts this year is proof of what’s possible when we invest early with a plan and build the infrastructure we need for electoral success. And we intend to keep building on that success in the years to come. That work starts now. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . subject: This is THE END of the Deep State.

body:
_“ON DAY ONE I’LL SHUT DOWN THE FBI HOVER BUILDING... AND REOPEN
IT AS A MUSEUM OF THE DEEP STATE”_

WOW!

Trump's new FBI pick is making waves.

In case you missed it Trump nominated Kash Patel to be our next FBI
Director.

This is MASSIVE!

And it has the Left sweating.

They know that he’s going to END the rampant corruption and return
our country to the American people.

We just have one BIG PROBLEM!

He needs to be confirmed by the Senate first.

It would only take 3 RINOs in the Senate to stop his appointment and
any other of Trump's picks..

So we need to keep the pressure on them to GET THE JOB DONE!

It’s not enough to just win an election, we have to MAGA.

And that means appointing every one of Trump's nominees.

We have to make sure Republicans who just won DO THEIR JOBS and DRAIN
THE SWAMP!

Because if Trump can’t rely on the Senate to get patriots like Kash
appointed, then we won for nothing.

Any RINO Republican that refuses to help Trump MAGA needs to lose
their seat.

It’s that simple.

And we need your help to keep them in check.

Without the commitment of voters like you to get rid of FAKE
CONSERVATIVES, the MAGA movement could be dead in the water.

PLEASE, sign this petition now and pledge to hold the Senate
accountable:

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Democrats have our work cut out for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We must be responsive to the needs of working people, or we will continue to lose.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241205-4567-footer&t=1&akid=4567%2E420207%2EWvh4cQ)
Democrats have our work cut out for us next year, Peter.
Not only will we have to deal with the chaos and cruelty of a new Trump administration, we _also_ have the task of rebuilding our party around a bold, populist, working-class agenda. It’s not going to be easy.
Some are saying Democrats need to move to the right in order to win again, but we know that’s not the answer. What we truly need is to commit to an agenda that centers the working class, and to rebuild trust with voters that we’ll actually deliver when we’re in power.
Progressive policies that will make a real difference in working people’s lives are broadly popular:
* Medicare for All
* A higher minimum wage
* Paid family and medical leave
* Free college for everyone who wants it

These policies need to be core pillars of our agenda moving forward, whether billionaires like it or not. We can’t be a party that is limited in our ambition by the wealthiest donors — we _must_ be responsive to the needs of working people, or we will continue to lose.
**So Peter, with 2025 closing in, I’m ready to get to work. And since I don’t take corporate PAC money, I’m counting on you to be right there with me.**
[**Will you pitch in $3 or any amount you can to help us build a broad working class movement and make our progressive agenda a reality?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241205?refcode=em20241205-4567&amount=3&refcode2=4567_420207_Wvh4cQ&akid=4567%2E420207%2EWvh4cQ)

In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

clean_body: We must be responsive to the needs of working people, or we will continue to lose. Democrats have our work cut out for us next year, Peter. Not only will we have to deal with the chaos and cruelty of a new Trump administration, we also have the task of rebuilding our party around a bold, populist, working-class agenda. It’s not going to be easy. Some are saying Democrats need to move to the right in order to win again, but we know that’s not the answer. What we truly need is to commit to an agenda that centers the working class, and to rebuild trust with voters that we’ll actually deliver when we’re in power. Progressive policies that will make a real difference in working people’s lives are broadly popular: Medicare for All A higher minimum wage Paid family and medical leave Free college for everyone who wants it These policies need to be core pillars of our agenda moving forward, whether billionaires like it or not. We can’t be a party that is limited in our ambition by the wealthiest donors — we must be responsive to the needs of working people, or we will continue to lose. So Peter, with 2025 closing in, I’m ready to get to work. And since I don’t take corporate PAC money, I’m counting on you to be right there with me. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Care in Action
subject: Your Story = Real Change for Caregivers 🌳
body:
Share your care story today!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236558/515998437/664783965?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
Care is a universal experience. Whether we’re caring for children, aging parents, or loved ones with disabilities or providing care as professionals—care touches each of us. **With over 105 million caregivers in the U.S., that’s more than 40% of the population.** Yet, too often, the voices of caregivers are left out of policy decisions.
**That’s why** **Care in Action needs your help**.
[**_When you share your story_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236559/515998438/918907339?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787), you’re adding a powerful voice to our fight for real change. Care in Action uses stories like yours to move hearts, change minds, and show lawmakers why they must invest in caregiving. **Personal stories remind policymakers that behind every statistic is a family, a community, and a caregiver who deserves support**.
[SHARE YOUR CARE STORY →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236560/515998439/918907339?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
_"My 2nd child was born with severe cerebral palsy. He was a wonderful baby who needed total care of his family. He continued to require more care as he grew. The last 3 and a half years of his life required that he be attached to a ventilator with 24 hour nursing services. I am an attorney who worked full time for the state Medicaid agency. Only by having the advantage of care staff was my family able to keep our child at home while keeping our needed income. My son qualified for a Medicaid waiver while thousands did not get enriched services. He loved his staff, he graduated from high school, and he had many friends among his staff. There is no way to substitute the care of good staff."_
_— Lynn R._
Whether you’ve faced struggles balancing work and caregiving, challenges finding reliable childcare, or are a home care worker seeking fair pay, [**your story matters**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236561/515998440/918907339?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787). When we put names and faces to the statistics, we can build real momentum to make caregiving a national priority.
[**Will you share your care story with us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236562/515998441/918907339?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787) Together, our stories amplify the urgency of this issue and help move the needle toward policies that support caregivers and strengthen our communities.
[SHARE YOUR CARE STORY →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236563/515998442/918907339?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Thank you for helping us lift up caregivers across the country. Together, we’ll create a future where caregiving is valued, respected, and supported.
Care in Action
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236564/515998443/-1554439957?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236565/515998444/326371895?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236566/515998445/955979663?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
This email was sent by [Care in Action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98236567/515998446/664783965?ms=120524_carestory&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTQ3OTgyZS01MmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-EivKQ9PZ0vH1cuZD8B2qevZVfPGMTD463byW6WdK4=&emci=a0de806c-56b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e947982e-52b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787). * **TOP NEWS**

"**'City Hall must listen': Dallas Mayor Eric Johnson assesses city,** " Dallas Morning News' **Devyani Chhetri** -- "In the council chambers on Thursday, flanked by 14 of his peers on the Dallas City Council, Mayor **Eric Johnson** began his assessment of the city's track record with an emphasis on 4 P's: public safety, parks, potholes and property tax relief.

"These four pillars are essential to Dallas remaining a city of opportunity for everyone," Johnson said.

He also announced he will release the city's "first-ever comprehensive public safety policy" in the coming months -- though it's unclear what that entails.

Johnson's state of the city address, a tradition mandated by the city's charter, echoed much of what he's said before. The speech is generally a roadmap of what the city government has accomplished and wants to accomplish.

This year's edition comes exactly a month after the November elections, where the passage of [propositions S and U](https://substack.com/redirect/3dfd021c-d338-433a-9078-533f01512479?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was widely seen as a "wake-up call" for municipal government

The passed propositions waive government immunity and open the city up to lawsuits if it doesn't adhere to the charter. They direct half of any new revenue year after year to the police and fire pension system and other public safety initiatives and also mandate the city figure out a way to hire nearly 900 more police officers.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/b549ff11-ceb6-418c-a9ac-5566eeb978a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"These calls from our residents for greater public safety and stronger government accountability could not be more clear," Johnson said. "And City Hall must listen."

The opposition to these propositions came from a big bipartisan coalition of former mayors and council members. Several saw these amendments as legal mandates that could negatively affect city operations.

Almost immediately after the propositions passed, Moody's Ratings, a top credit rating firm, [downgraded the city's debt outlook from "stable" to "negative"](https://substack.com/redirect/10a17ace-a74c-46c9-80dc-296fcba94a56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) due to the [passage of Proposition U](https://substack.com/redirect/3dfd021c-d338-433a-9078-533f01512479?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The firm said the proposition lowers the flexibility the city has when it comes to its expenses and in the world of stocks and bonds, that type of an assessment can impact a lender's confidence in the city's management of its debt.

Johnson was absent from the public effort.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/b549ff11-ceb6-418c-a9ac-5566eeb978a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A man of few words, his opinion on the propositions came as an op-ed in The Dallas Morning News, where he and council member Cara **Mendelsohn** asked voters to reject all 18 charter propositions, despite months of work by the charter review commission, a volunteer group tasked with coming up with the majority of the amendments.

Still, on Thursday, Johnson referenced the commission's work as a milestone.

So what's next for the city?

Dallas, he said, needed to keep investing in first responders to continue its streak of lowering violent crime, he said. The city needed to maintain its focus on the parks system and fix crippling potholes, a clarion call apparent in the passage of the $1.25 billion bond program earlier this year, he continued. This comes as Dallas is expected to host thousands of visitors for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, [the new Texas Stock Exchange](https://substack.com/redirect/4d399386-aff4-4a25-814d-77080cea55b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and two professional sports teams in the Dallas Wings and the Dallas Trinity FC." "These four pillars are essential to Dallas remaining a city of opportunity for everyone," Johnson said. He also announced he will release the city's "first-ever comprehensive public safety policy" in the coming months -- though it's unclear what that entails. Johnson's state of the city address, a tradition mandated by the city's charter, echoed much of what he's said before. The speech is generally a roadmap of what the city government has accomplished and wants to accomplish. This year's edition comes exactly a month after the November elections, where the passage of was widely seen as a "wake-up call" for municipal government The passed propositions waive government immunity and open the city up to lawsuits if it doesn't adhere to the charter. They direct half of any new revenue year after year to the police and fire pension system and other public safety initiatives and also mandate the city figure out a way to hire nearly 900 more police officers. "These calls from our residents for greater public safety and stronger government accountability could not be more clear," Johnson said. "And City Hall must listen." The opposition to these propositions came from a big bipartisan coalition of former mayors and council members. Several saw these amendments as legal mandates that could negatively affect city operations. Almost immediately after the propositions passed, Moody's Ratings, a top credit rating firm, due to the . The firm said the proposition lowers the flexibility the city has when it comes to its expenses and in the world of stocks and bonds, that type of an assessment can impact a lender's confidence in the city's management of its debt. Johnson was absent from the public effort. A man of few words, his opinion on the propositions came as an op-ed in The Dallas Morning News, where he and council member Cara Mendelsohn asked voters to reject all 18 charter propositions, despite months of work by the charter review commission, a volunteer group tasked with coming up with the majority of the amendments. Still, on Thursday, Johnson referenced the commission's work as a milestone. So what's next for the city? Dallas, he said, needed to keep investing in first responders to continue its streak of lowering violent crime, he said. The city needed to maintain its focus on the parks system and fix crippling potholes, a clarion call apparent in the passage of the $1.25 billion bond program earlier this year, he continued. This comes as Dallas is expected to host thousands of visitors for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and two professional sports teams in the Dallas Wings and the Dallas Trinity FC." * * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**'City Hall must listen': Dallas Mayor Eric Johnson assesses city,** " Dallas Morning News' **Devyani Chhetri** -- "In the council chambers on Thursday, flanked by 14 of his peers on the Dallas City Council, Mayor **Eric Johnson** began his assessment of the city's track record with an emphasis on 4 P's: public safety, parks, potholes and property tax relief.

"These four pillars are essential to Dallas remaining a city of opportunity for everyone," Johnson said.

He also announced he will release the city's "first-ever comprehensive public safety policy" in the coming months -- though it's unclear what that entails.

Johnson's state of the city address, a tradition mandated by the city's charter, echoed much of what he's said before. The speech is generally a roadmap of what the city government has accomplished and wants to accomplish.

This year's edition comes exactly a month after the November elections, where the passage of [propositions S and U](https://substack.com/redirect/3b523c86-10c4-408c-96dc-34f8cebbb211?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was widely seen as a "wake-up call" for municipal government

The passed propositions waive government immunity and open the city up to lawsuits if it doesn't adhere to the charter. They direct half of any new revenue year after year to the police and fire pension system and other public safety initiatives and also mandate the city figure out a way to hire nearly 900 more police officers.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/5db01c05-5eca-4f3e-bfa5-e2774b4f2503?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"These calls from our residents for greater public safety and stronger government accountability could not be more clear," Johnson said. "And City Hall must listen."

The opposition to these propositions came from a big bipartisan coalition of former mayors and council members. Several saw these amendments as legal mandates that could negatively affect city operations.

Almost immediately after the propositions passed, Moody's Ratings, a top credit rating firm, [downgraded the city's debt outlook from "stable" to "negative"](https://substack.com/redirect/551b2803-6bac-48e6-a887-708bddfd42e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) due to the [passage of Proposition U](https://substack.com/redirect/3b523c86-10c4-408c-96dc-34f8cebbb211?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The firm said the proposition lowers the flexibility the city has when it comes to its expenses and in the world of stocks and bonds, that type of an assessment can impact a lender's confidence in the city's management of its debt.

Johnson was absent from the public effort.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/5db01c05-5eca-4f3e-bfa5-e2774b4f2503?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
A man of few words, his opinion on the propositions came as an op-ed in The Dallas Morning News, where he and council member Cara **Mendelsohn** asked voters to reject all 18 charter propositions, despite months of work by the charter review commission, a volunteer group tasked with coming up with the majority of the amendments.

Still, on Thursday, Johnson referenced the commission's work as a milestone.

So what's next for the city?

Dallas, he said, needed to keep investing in first responders to continue its streak of lowering violent crime, he said. The city needed to maintain its focus on the parks system and fix crippling potholes, a clarion call apparent in the passage of the $1.25 billion bond program earlier this year, he continued. This comes as Dallas is expected to host thousands of visitors for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, [the new Texas Stock Exchange](https://substack.com/redirect/cb3b7d0e-a206-48be-868a-a264e7b35e8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and two professional sports teams in the Dallas Wings and the Dallas Trinity FC." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "'City Hall must listen': Dallas Mayor Eric Johnson assesses city, " Dallas Morning News' Devyani Chhetri -- "In the council chambers on Thursday, flanked by 14 of his peers on the Dallas City Council, Mayor Eric Johnson began his assessment of the city's track record with an emphasis on 4 P's: public safety, parks, potholes and property tax relief. "These four pillars are essential to Dallas remaining a city of opportunity for everyone," Johnson said. He also announced he will release the city's "first-ever comprehensive public safety policy" in the coming months -- though it's unclear what that entails. Johnson's state of the city address, a tradition mandated by the city's charter, echoed much of what he's said before. The speech is generally a roadmap of what the city government has accomplished and wants to accomplish. This year's edition comes exactly a month after the November elections, where the passage of was widely seen as a "wake-up call" for municipal government The passed propositions waive government immunity and open the city up to lawsuits if it doesn't adhere to the charter. They direct half of any new revenue year after year to the police and fire pension system and other public safety initiatives and also mandate the city figure out a way to hire nearly 900 more police officers. "These calls from our residents for greater public safety and stronger government accountability could not be more clear," Johnson said. "And City Hall must listen." The opposition to these propositions came from a big bipartisan coalition of former mayors and council members. Several saw these amendments as legal mandates that could negatively affect city operations. Almost immediately after the propositions passed, Moody's Ratings, a top credit rating firm, due to the . The firm said the proposition lowers the flexibility the city has when it comes to its expenses and in the world of stocks and bonds, that type of an assessment can impact a lender's confidence in the city's management of its debt. Johnson was absent from the public effort. A man of few words, his opinion on the propositions came as an op-ed in The Dallas Morning News, where he and council member Cara Mendelsohn asked voters to reject all 18 charter propositions, despite months of work by the charter review commission, a volunteer group tasked with coming up with the majority of the amendments. Still, on Thursday, Johnson referenced the commission's work as a milestone. So what's next for the city? Dallas, he said, needed to keep investing in first responders to continue its streak of lowering violent crime, he said. The city needed to maintain its focus on the parks system and fix crippling potholes, a clarion call apparent in the passage of the $1.25 billion bond program earlier this year, he continued. This comes as Dallas is expected to host thousands of visitors for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and two professional sports teams in the Dallas Wings and the Dallas Trinity FC." body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39337%2E3422442%2Eupws0D)
Derek,
Have you ever voted by mail and then wondered if your ballot was actually counted? Katie introduced legislation to address this very issue—so voters like you can track your ballot and its status.
**Just a few days ago, Katie’s bill passed the House almost unanimously!** Now we need your help to get it passed in the Senate so that it becomes law >>
**[Will you add your name right now to call on the Senate to vote on and pass Katie’s legislation, the Vote By Mail Tracking Act?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241205/?source=em20241205-39337&akid=39337%2E3422442%2Eupws0D)**
[Sign On](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241205/?source=em20241205-39337&akid=39337%2E3422442%2Eupws0D)
Some states already have ballot tracking systems in place, but in other states it can be difficult to verify a ballot’s status. Congress needs to do everything it can to give every American, in every state, full confidence that every vote is counted properly.
**[Please, add your name today to make your voice heard and call on the Senate to pass this crucial piece of legislation.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241205/?source=em20241205-39337&akid=39337%2E3422442%2Eupws0D)**
Even though Katie is leaving Congress in January, she’s still hard at work for the American people and her constituents in Orange County, California.
Thank you for taking action!
Team Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241205-39337&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39337_3422442_upws0D&akid=39337%2E3422442%2Eupws0D)**

name: Claire Low @ NDRC
subject: 🗓️ Here’s what’s on the docket for the next few months and beyond:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Some of our first chances to fight back for our democracy:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98237169/516000509/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzZDI3ZTQ3LTU0YjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9qZ7Zt_WYMnAbfy_l0c-buu4-u5FpySAI7u9Yt8iWwA=&emci=cbf318d6-32b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a3d27e47-54b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, the truth is there is no “offseason” in our line of work. There is no time off in defending our freedoms. **So as we continue to analyze this year’s election results, we’re getting ready for some of our first opportunities to fight back for our democracy in 2025.** Here’s what’s on the docket: | **🗓️ JANUARY 🗓️**
---
* **Virginia** will hold a special election that will decide control of the state senate AND the house of delegates. Currently, Democrats hold 21 seats and Republicans have 19 seats in the Senate. If the GOP flips this seat, the Republican lieutenant governor would be the tie-breaking vote, giving them the majority. If Democrats win both seats, we will be able to fend off a Republican trifecta.

* **Michigan** will hold a special election that will set the balance of power in the state senate, as Democrats currently hold 20 seats and Republicans with 18 seats. If the GOP is able to turn this seat red, it would leave Democratic Lt. Gov. Garlin Gilchrist as the tie-breaking vote.

**🗓️ APRIL 🗓️**
---
* **Wisconsin** will hold an election for a 10-year term on the state supreme court. While justices are elected as nonpartisan, the current breakdown of the court has four liberals and three conservatives. If conservatives are able to win this election, they will flip control of the court.

**🗓️ NOVEMBER 🗓️**
---
* **Virginia and New Jersey** will hold statewide elections for governor, lieutenant governor, and the house of delegates.

* **Pennsylvania** will hold an election for three state supreme court seats. Currently, Democrats have a 5-2 partisan advantage on the court. But because three Democrats are up for reelection, losing just two of these elections will flip the makeup of the court.

And sometime in 2025, **Ohio** will start the process of redrawing its congressional map. The new map will need to be completed by early 2026.
**Peter, I know that was a lot — but it’s critically important you understand what’s at stake over this next year, and why your support today matters so much. In 2025 and beyond, we’ll keep pushing to elect candidates who will defend our democracy, and that work has never been more critical.**
[**Please make a $30 donation today to power the fight for fair maps and fair elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98237170/516000510/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2025ElectionNOR_email_20241205-NDRC-Tier1-2025ElectionNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241205-NDRC-Tier1-2025ElectionNOR_&utm_campaign=2025ElectionNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzZDI3ZTQ3LTU0YjMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9qZ7Zt_WYMnAbfy_l0c-buu4-u5FpySAI7u9Yt8iWwA=)

clean_body: Some of our first chances to fight back for our democracy: | Peter, the truth is there is no “offseason” in our line of work. There is no time off in defending our freedoms. So as we continue to analyze this year’s election results, we’re getting ready for some of our first opportunities to fight back for our democracy in 2025. Here’s what’s on the docket: | 🗓️ JANUARY 🗓️ Virginia will hold a special election that will decide control of the state senate AND the house of delegates. Currently, Democrats hold 21 seats and Republicans have 19 seats in the Senate. If the GOP flips this seat, the Republican lieutenant governor would be the tie-breaking vote, giving them the majority. If Democrats win both seats, we will be able to fend off a Republican trifecta. Michigan will hold a special election that will set the balance of power in the state senate, as Democrats currently hold 20 seats and Republicans with 18 seats. If the GOP is able to turn this seat red, it would leave Democratic Lt. Gov. Garlin Gilchrist as the tie-breaking vote. 🗓️ APRIL 🗓️ Wisconsin will hold an election for a 10-year term on the state supreme court. While justices are elected as nonpartisan, the current breakdown of the court has four liberals and three conservatives. If conservatives are able to win this election, they will flip control of the court. 🗓️ NOVEMBER 🗓️ Virginia and New Jersey will hold statewide elections for governor, lieutenant governor, and the house of delegates. Pennsylvania will hold an election for three state supreme court seats. Currently, Democrats have a 5-2 partisan advantage on the court. But because three Democrats are up for reelection, losing just two of these elections will flip the makeup of the court. And sometime in 2025, Ohio will start the process of redrawing its congressional map. The new map will need to be completed by early 2026. Peter, I know that was a lot — but it’s critically important you understand what’s at stake over this next year, and why your support today matters so much. In 2025 and beyond, we’ll keep pushing to elect candidates who will defend our democracy, and that work has never been more critical. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you so much, Claire Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Subject: Urgent: Sign Our Petition for Justice in Pakistan
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=7b1b739a89&u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=a288075d93)
---
| **Join Us in Demanding Justice for Those Who Sacrifice Everything for Freedom – Sign the Petition Today!**
---
| | | |
---
|
Dear Friend,
I urgently need your help. On November 26, 2024, peaceful protesters in Islamabad faced unimaginable brutality as Pakistani authorities opened fire on them. This horrific event is part of a larger, ongoing assault on democracy and human rights in Pakistan, where thousands of activists remain unjustly detained.
We are demanding action from key institutions, including:
\- An independent international inquiry into the events.\- Immediate release of all political prisoners.\- Protection of evidence and victims' families.\- Timely sanctions against those responsible for these human rights violations.
This fight is not just for Pakistan; it’s a stand for democracy and human rights worldwide. With the rise of authoritarianism globally, including in countries like Korea and Romania, we must remain vigilant in demanding that human rights are respected everywhere.
Your voice matters.**Please sign this petition and help us demand justice for those who risk everything for their freedom.**
Thank you for your support.
Best regards,
Dr. Asif Mahmood Human Rights Advocate

---

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: three guiding truths
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team,

There are three truths that have guided me, from Congress to now. Three things have been true in every campaign I’ve run:
1. I fight to protect Jersey Values – standing up for what’s right, like reproductive freedom, clean air and clean water, LGBTQ+ rights, lower health care and housing costs, child care, and commonsense gun safety.
2. I will work with anyone, on any side of the political aisle, to get things done and deliver meaningful change for the hardworking people of Jersey.
3. My campaign signs have always said “Lower Taxes” at the bottom since I first ran for Congress. That’s because I have always known my goal: **to make life in Jersey more affordable for everyone who lives here.**

[**I will continue to fight every day for Lower Costs, Lower Taxes, and Jersey Values. Chip in anything you can here to help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98237353/516001175/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20241205_FR_GeneralFR_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGY1Y2FkNS01NGIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHXx4OQbYY9XG0qhQwjiXJWthSkjgvKZQrrQBMVhWdI=&emci=ccb7d435-76b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=b8f5cad5-54b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=37438246)

Josh

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=4e8e72d1ec9140bfa6a188e4e75cc4d6&_e=42rPthBLTDUXK-_RIT2SH6n_LpSos7Qs9lwLP2m9upyKqGqyDIDW0Qs_ki0LH73gWdck31ydM0b6R186idu9FszxOl0sPPJL8eapkRzOeVDEiruapDKvIh7pSmccQNKyBBefNT8rpWCt02MeXt1HYAChVaY4mi9Q_PG9zNrwTOtVB2icxoYy8KmK0EY3CPIa2bSCl5UDEXUON-I22Qq0WJj70CWxxq9tQ7yT0oXtvlmgFbCG1DjVRXvTFfn0Cyl7-Dtk0OfZdtI0pqQfE_Tz_C-HBcxgB5LZAAcO4SvuhoihHgh8JTKdyX0hFuVCHdfEO5PMPefVPh3NN-dv98I9dTbFhqdMToepjkenCCXAnn1VFdgTR-gAwyOD9FpSlSL4I7R7E_ErpZSahN-qeaAesg%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own.
