clean_body: I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

name: Voter Action Project
subject: We're going to need this for the next four years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]
Team,
We know Trump’s constant attacks on the free press won’t stop in his second term. The U.S. House already unanimously passed bipartisan protections for journalists. Now, the Senate must act before Trump is inaugurated.
The PRESS Act would protect journalists and the investigative reporting the public relies on to understand the inner workings of our government. With this legislation, government officials would not be able to force reporters to give up their sources or seize the phone and email records of journalists.
The New York Times Editorial Board said, “ Hostility toward the news media in the polarized politics of the day makes it more urgent than ever to ensure that reporters can continue to pursue their essential role as watchdogs over the government without the threat of court-ordered demands for their sources and information. The PRESS Act is needed now. "
The House passed the PRESS Act without any opposition. The Senate must act now and pass this legislation!
Add your name today: Pass the PRESS Act now to protect the free press! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: This is disgusting!

body:
| | | **When a man is gunned down in the streets, the Left celebrates. ** **It's disgusting!** In case you haven’t seen the news, a healthcare executive was assassinated in broad daylight. And the Left has been having a field day. They couldn’t even wait an hour before they started celebrating. Over the past few years they’ve shown their true colors. And I thank God every day we won’t have to live in a radical-Democrat run country for another 4 years. But we have to make sure these sick people never have power again. And I’m going to make sure they never do. My name is Ryan Mackenzie. I’m a state representative, smart conservative, proud father, and Trump-endorsed Republican. I won a hard-fought race to get rid of Pennsylvania's most liberal Congresswoman. But I’m not stopping there. I’m going to keep fighting until we get rid of every far-left loon in Washington. It’s simple. America Deserves better leadership, and the American people deserve better representation. Now it’s my job to make that happen. And I want you by my side when I do it. Add your name now and join my fight to save this country. It might be the most important thing you do all day.

name: Kari Lake
subject: Enormous fine for speaking the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
If you feel like everything you ever considered “normal” in America has been turned upside down, you’re not alone. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---

As we work to make progress on the most critical issues like expanding affordable healthcare, protecting reproductive rights, and tackling the climate crisis, I hope I’ll continue to have your support.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98237832/516002896/-1583825582?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2024-12-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWYxYmRmNzctNThiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GhtMud1q1PQ6ffBEYgz8eQtoNsnSjqkVfzScynuRUj0=)

| Peter,

I was recently on Fox 5’s On the Hill discussing the importance of our win here in Maryland’s 6th District.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98237834/516002901/-72375404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWYxYmRmNzctNThiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GhtMud1q1PQ6ffBEYgz8eQtoNsnSjqkVfzScynuRUj0=&emci=4baf81df-4eb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=5f1bdf77-58b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16017524)
I ran a common sense, common ground campaign, and as I prepare to get sworn in this January, I intend to keep that promise. We were able to win this district because we did the work of going out and engaging with Marylanders and listening to their concerns.

As we work to make progress on the most critical issues like expanding affordable healthcare, protecting reproductive rights, and tackling the climate crisis, I hope I’ll continue to have your support.

Grateful,

April

name: Voter Action Project
subject: [Corrected Link] We're going to need this for the next four years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]
Team,
We know Trump’s constant attacks on the free press won’t stop in his second term. The U.S. House already unanimously passed bipartisan protections for journalists. Now, the Senate must act before Trump is inaugurated.
The PRESS Act would protect journalists and the investigative reporting the public relies on to understand the inner workings of our government. With this legislation, government officials would not be able to force reporters to give up their sources or seize the phone and email records of journalists.
The New York Times Editorial Board said, “ Hostility toward the news media in the polarized politics of the day makes it more urgent than ever to ensure that reporters can continue to pursue their essential role as watchdogs over the government without the threat of court-ordered demands for their sources and information. The PRESS Act is needed now. "
The House passed the PRESS Act without any opposition. The Senate must act now and pass this legislation!
Add your name today: Pass the PRESS Act now to protect the free press! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120524_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.

Portland, OR 97280

name: AOC
subject: Do you buy the argument that woke loses elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A question I got after the election.
#
Here’s a question I got after the election:
Personally, I don’t. I think that a lot of voters really don’t like fake people.
They’re sick and tired of fake politicians. So what I actually think is worse is **saying something you don’t believe**.
If during the entire campaign season, you’re saying that you’re “down with trans people or the LGBT community”, and then you lose an election and the next day you say “All that stuff was wrong” — I actually think what people are more upset about is that someone was doing something they _didn’t_ believe and just _saying_ it.
**If you weren’t about that life, why did you campaign as if you were?** That is the actual, core issue of the problem.
Now, I will say I think that there are some things that the Left — an activist left — can do to **ensure that we remain committed to growing a mass movement**.
There are pockets of the Left that are sometimes the most amplified online, that are built on a policing structure – and those elements can drive people away, put them off, etc. I think we saw a lot of that this year.
**That’s different than fighting for people**.
And if we actually want to change things, **we need to get real about building a mass movement** for guaranteed healthcare, bold climate action, and a better world for working people across the country.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to power our fight? Every dollar goes to our campaign for real progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241205.wuiT_J&refcode=em20241205-7703-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241205.wuiT_J&refcode=em20241205-7703-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241205?refcode=em20241205-7703-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=7703_2526796_Ei0KqK&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241205-7703-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=22&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7703%2E2526796%2EEi0KqK)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: It’s important that you know this, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238151/516003975/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzc1ZTA4YS01YWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SK-QI0vlmFRl1IEBQmu47iU3kCXS5SmNDLSVIjlJFsg=)
---
Hey Peter, it’s Ritchie.

Today, I'm asking you to chip in a small donation to support this people-powered movement. **But first, I think it's really important that you know _who I am_ and _what I stand for._**

So, will you please give me the courtesy to read this entire email? It won't take long. [If you’re already with me, you can click here to skip it and chip in! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238152/516003976/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241205_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzc1ZTA4YS01YWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SK-QI0vlmFRl1IEBQmu47iU3kCXS5SmNDLSVIjlJFsg=)

Unlike many of my colleagues, I _actually know_ what it’s like to be a working class citizen in this country.

**I grew up in vermin-infested public housing, raised by a single mother making just over $4 an hour to keep our family afloat.
I know what it’s like to go to bed hungry.
I don’t have a college degree or fancy connections.**

But Peter, it’s my lived experiences that are the reason I am fighting tirelessly for:

**Affordable housing and building social safety nets to eliminate poverty. LGBTQ+ equality.
Social Security and Medicare.
Expanding access to physical and mental health care, and _more._**

I hope to keep up this fight as long as you’ll let me, Peter — but our common-sense, progressive movement is powered by the people. I don’t do a second of “call-time” – I only have you:

**That’s why I have to ask:[We spent a lot to help Democrats in 2024, and we’re back to square one. So as a top supporter of this grassroots movement, will you chip in $3 or $7 to help us rebuild this people-powered coalition? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238153/516003977/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241205_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzc1ZTA4YS01YWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SK-QI0vlmFRl1IEBQmu47iU3kCXS5SmNDLSVIjlJFsg=)** | [$15,000 END-OF-YEAR GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO SUPPORT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238154/516003978/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241205_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzc1ZTA4YS01YWIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SK-QI0vlmFRl1IEBQmu47iU3kCXS5SmNDLSVIjlJFsg=)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

_Ritchie Torres_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Team Mazie
subject: We must stay in the fight together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, As Democrats, and as people who care deeply about our working families, our planet, our freedoms, and our future, it has been a deeply painful and troubling few weeks. Donald Trump won re-election and Republicans gained control of the Senate and the House. Trump has — as expected — nominated right-wing billionaires and MAGA loyalists to his cabinet and other important government agencies. _After years of divisive rhetoric, devastating blows to our fundamental rights, and endless political stunts, it’s clear that this election will have severe consequences for the values and people we hold dear._ **But we cannot give up now. We must stay the course.** No matter what happens next, Mazie is going to continue speaking out against extremism and fighting for her progressive agenda for all Americans. She needs you to stay in this fight with her — just like you always have, Peter. [**So please, add your name to show Mazie you’re still in this fight with her. We wouldn’t be where we are today, and the victories ahead of us can’t be won without you. It would mean so much to Mazie to know you’re with her for the long haul.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238216/516004160/1418427750?contactdata=ZoM+PTf1j6vQ9GzkyqelO2ODUzzo4JHpNmjuOOrmMuS1WgisdxGaLfo66GUEz4JH7mtTkKgje7riSCUDBEnSHcMqsbf8BXJm2Qn7vcuFdAlPWnOHXCkgQBDQqD1Dy27zPxsCKAk3UaGD3Cys7ZZe0sqj9S5nXZXxu9BVvFuzJG4=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJlMDczNS01YmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2d9d7wpIEoXt-T0gzsqM4YTtcZFqNuhnDuac9iF21k8=&emci=6da9f659-5ab3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c8be0735-5bb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23190490) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238217/516004161/1418427750?contactdata=ZoM+PTf1j6vQ9GzkyqelO2ODUzzo4JHpNmjuOOrmMuS1WgisdxGaLfo66GUEz4JH7mtTkKgje7riSCUDBEnSHcMqsbf8BXJm2Qn7vcuFdAlPWnOHXCkgQBDQqD1Dy27zPxsCKAk3UaGD3Cys7ZZe0sqj9S5nXZXxu9BVvFuzJG4=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJlMDczNS01YmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2d9d7wpIEoXt-T0gzsqM4YTtcZFqNuhnDuac9iF21k8=&emci=6da9f659-5ab3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c8be0735-5bb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=23190490)

clean_body: | Peter, As Democrats, and as people who care deeply about our working families, our planet, our freedoms, and our future, it has been a deeply painful and troubling few weeks. Donald Trump won re-election and Republicans gained control of the Senate and the House. Trump has — as expected — nominated right-wing billionaires and MAGA loyalists to his cabinet and other important government agencies. After years of divisive rhetoric, devastating blows to our fundamental rights, and endless political stunts, it’s clear that this election will have severe consequences for the values and people we hold dear. But we cannot give up now. We must stay the course. No matter what happens next, Mazie is going to continue speaking out against extremism and fighting for her progressive agenda for all Americans. She needs you to stay in this fight with her — just like you always have, Peter. | Over the last six years, this grassroots team has shown incredible resilience, optimism, and strength. That’s exactly the attitude we need to hold on to in this next election cycle and beyond. Thank you for everything you do, Team Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign on to support new legislation to expand access to drinking water:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Let’s establish the first-ever permanent federal low-income water affordability program. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWzUOzUNdQEA5K3octjBN0Yud_DjX5rM7TlU3-9UpO_qwXz59dUQOPDPautB03iI4upZrG6gGeU8uKRLXteEpdYyE18iVbu8ORZew_4n2Zp1O-PMjtT0xSkEc6_N-CXNqp1Fs5jsoMUXMeQh1d0K6an4LE0kFE8ZySLy8jdK1desGi74s116t29aLnjBreCrn1c7U3C1u04XGo01N1kxybmI9fTSRYXE61uztes4gAkOlOH4SdI1ExN3UhUQY4zAmy/4c1/OracsZsrTkyEpTJ-agHAdw/h0/h001.uYjHfQC5CBDdZ6YJJhqH6hkHdUWFaWNltwUXILsSH4c)
---
Friend, While our country continues to find the funding and bombs for a genocide, here at home families across the country can't afford water. In the richest country in the world, millions of our neighbors have their water shut off as the cost continues to rise. Access to clean water is a fundamental human right, and cutting off water anywhere is a form of violence—in Michigan, throughout the U.S., in Palestine, and beyond. **Our government keeps finding billions of dollars to support war and genocide, but not clean drinking water for U.S. residents, which families need in order to survive and to stay in their homes.** Back in 2021, Congresswoman Debbie Dingell and I established a $1.1 billion _Low-Income Household Water Assistance Program_ to save lives and keep people’s water flowing during the pandemic. That first-ever emergency program has expired and families urgently need assistance to access drinking water. So Rep. Dingell and I just introduced the _H2O UP Act (Half-Century Update for Water Access and Affordability Act)_ to establish the first-ever permanent federal low-income water affordability program. [**Can you add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of our new legislation to support our communities’ access to safe, reliable drinking water?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBiO5_wGaxBwj5DYs8UKw2iNb4PYnCQFxX3_EnVohGIfqWT1L9Jvp45_8lZyA0ldS3ML9-nBZUQbXcmrq5XlKcwCPl4XydTxgyFuGKnH_1XRDLYplyIUSaWFfyGPvPzf166DMLTGXF_qTlxeuq9su1uIO7OkZtXPhpuaOIlhU2y_57u5Q6CLjiT4iXur456W4YEyya9BHp9OTyqEmDO8f5Szpza4dsGyuU5KPbF1M0cuopWQ0lDGw0zy0LfIX8FRB9f_LdhVCn3-3zHWyR_iLO8HY5mkXDeDEScxt-g9PElwcc8omN540aRvUFTx7z6f5lmSOfPPmFCKQtSBWHrKw2k8/4c1/OracsZsrTkyEpTJ-agHAdw/h1/h001.LIJPImSIcTUtoKaOtOSBVpxkkB40NK4jMlTOgAtenuA) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBgQ5mcY3gRAozSKVtbrcWEpVPJIstGIJZL1XcLBHjqnl0E4jh7bDgR1yKCq3W6VxOaW5zVhruAnzl81wkeK-FX3JdgYv6NnVp0Le0XWUGmUoL4Tuub3RAv8wmRhSvlXPDDVL4dBXcAdurTaMntV6FY7JhkpBj-LiXaC2jzbhUNfSVS8ZuA-63iPNYwVDe5-KepGR2OHDoL15_QhA5c6EFNwR65iX_sVxUVVUirvb1STsN7sjbWs9mwiFXlc3kwsLPfM0nfXG7DubcJU6LPWV6F92giZlsTjIUJUDo37hkYO6NVAe3bOGk0beSiVYGanZR61My4g2m6EVO7dMlw0vJUF/4c1/OracsZsrTkyEpTJ-agHAdw/h2/h001.yuJqfc8FPP8NoXimieCgNBvfPVWF2XHltRdDdc8Fa5w)
---
Amidst Detroit’s ongoing waves of water shutoffs for unpaid water bills, a community-based grassroots organization We the People of Detroit**** has been distributing water to families in my community, doing critical research about water shutoffs’ risks to public health, and advocating for equitable water access locally and around the world.
**We the People of Detroit is among the 40 regional and national organizations endorsing the**** _H2O UP Act_** , and CEO and co-founder Monica Lewis-Patrick said:
> _“This legislation tackles the water affordability crisis from multiple angles, ensuring households receive a water bill they can afford while also supporting water systems with the technical assistance and funding necessary to maintain safe, reliable service. Integral to the Act’s success is the establishment of Community Advisory Committees, which provide local residents, nonprofits, and stakeholders a seat at the table to guide program implementation in each region.”_
This policy would be a step toward involving more people in co-governance as well as ending dehumanizing water shutoffs. The U.S. federal government sent more than $20 billion taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military this past year and keeps growing the U.S. military budget by tens of billions every year, so it should be able to afford billions of dollars annually to ensure universal access to clean drinking water.
[**Will you sign on to demand water as a human right and support our new**** _H2O UP Act_****to ensure safe, affordable water for all low-income U.S. households?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9Fm2Mas4UdC2klm0c-ARXo9KZqkD2XBimLszUXQWgUjZV8aoVZaVBSM0v_5AAcl_9y7-Y2mKsD3n-4wVf9umi1GBLBB9bRGW84C23p_6XhejBjM6ZY4u0DNcrWOxTfc9g-GhMaIrR2mAjul9rsHRxKLoMcXQcWpFQ9NYklOa7bP4KZHDTe83SsZABsMLfolnS40Fu7GLCwmOeneR_iwieidTa6wviQBQdlLUIY6mmjXFyBx-13neXj8TIr4XJioOwI2uvmJIfhfCSvhw0LMXRLjlHulTmiOflxYIu6YhPtXWTe1tjM-Iir094HA96v1uQpJYFvVu6PXJYwCyt_MvJhsRIqkc8KLbczX6-tz3dOAB__KMz-afnn4X8biqvkfbflXsKxjZFJD4rypdCO6b6IUQS9SZiuUq9ehIV2_cXhFzJoPwQBOpu_5y-0KZsJN9qh6/4c1/OracsZsrTkyEpTJ-agHAdw/h3/h001.BT4rJk8oIejfTM8nqW3khb-BSspIJEmjlAIl60ZAtg8)
Together, we’re going to keep fighting for our human rights, including everyone’s right to access the utility services they need to survive.
In solidarity and service,
Rashida

subject: Did you see this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Based on Trump’s disastrous nominees so far, D’Esposito seems to fit right in.

| _**Did you see this, Peter?**_
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238228/516004193/549506455?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-12-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzY5ZDY2Ni01YmIzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N8M9yNvFH4qzu1Fxo3-kTyocgQbu1jAVLTDjciz6QXY=) **Defeated Republican Rep. Anthony D'Esposito lobbies to be Trump's DEA chief**
---
Just last month, we defeated Anthony D’Esposito because of his patterns of corruption, dishonesty and incompetence. Now, he’s lobbying to be Trump’s Drug Enforcement Agency chief and rallying around support for his bid.

Anthony D’Esposito has time and again shown he is incapable of serving in any position of power. As a law enforcement officer, he _“failed to safeguard”_ his department-issued firearm, which was stolen from a vehicle he left it in, allegedly _"lied in 2011 to a grand jury"_ and the District Attorney about an illegal weapons case, internal affairs investigated D'Esposito for _"driving while intoxicated and disgracing the uniform,"_ and so much more.

Based on Trump’s disastrous nominees so far, D’Esposito seems to fit right in. Laura will work with anyone to help Long Islanders, but we need to be ready to stand up and fight back against Trump’s destructive policies.

[_**Will you contribute $25 or more today to fuel our fight? clean_body: Based on Trump’s disastrous nominees so far, D’Esposito seems to fit right in. | Did you see this, Peter? | | = Defeated Republican Rep. Anthony D'Esposito lobbies to be Trump's DEA chief Just last month, we defeated Anthony D’Esposito because of his patterns of corruption, dishonesty and incompetence. Now, he’s lobbying to be Trump’s Drug Enforcement Agency chief and rallying around support for his bid. Anthony D’Esposito has time and again shown he is incapable of serving in any position of power. As a law enforcement officer, he “failed to safeguard” his department-issued firearm, which was stolen from a vehicle he left it in, allegedly "lied in 2011 to a grand jury" and the District Attorney about an illegal weapons case, internal affairs investigated D'Esposito for "driving while intoxicated and disgracing the uniform," and so much more. Based on Trump’s disastrous nominees so far, D’Esposito seems to fit right in. Laura will work with anyone to help Long Islanders, but we need to be ready to stand up and fight back against Trump’s destructive policies. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Gillen HQ * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Farmers are the heart of America— thank God for them! So often, we take for granted our stocked grocery stores and fail to think about where that bounty came from.

During the campaign, farmers were a focal point because they feed our homes and fuel our our economies. And I can tell you, the best harvest comes from the best land - that land is Missouri! _**Check out this August campaign stop from a beautiful Missouri farm!**_

name: Alan Cohn
subject: We need Equal Justice Under Law!
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238335/516004918/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzliMmM5YTgtNWNiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kEZIJ4vWzI3BFmE5gtRiYtBVqAuGFMZPqDoTIwU4iFg=&emci=0fae3537-4cb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=79b2c9a8-5cb3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
Do you want to bet which way the radical right-wing MAGA majority on the Supreme Court will rule?
Conservatives love talking about “parental rights” when demanding they have the right to demand their kids aren’t exposed to certain lessons or certain books while at school.
But right now, Trump’s hand-picked justices, led by Clarence Thomas, are leaning towards upholding Tennessee’s ban on the rights away of parents to make decisions for their children when it comes to gender identity care.

This happens when you have justices with lifetime appointments and no accountability to the law, precedent, or the public.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, and WE’RE going to change that!
We’re the national campaign working with over 75 members of the House and Senate, including Hakeem Jeffries, Adam Schiff, Sheldon Whitehouse, Jamie Raskin, and Dan Goldman, to enact 18-year term limits on SCOTUS.
We know you’re disappointed about the election, but we’re back at work!
We have a job to do and need your help. We’re mounting a major public pressure campaign on Congress and raising what’s needed to support candidates in the mid-terms pledging to vote for the TERM act.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238336/516004919/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzliMmM5YTgtNWNiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kEZIJ4vWzI3BFmE5gtRiYtBVqAuGFMZPqDoTIwU4iFg=)

**[>>>From ending the right of women to choose, to creating immunity for Trump, we’ve seen what this court will do. Support us and save the indispensable institution of our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238337/516004920/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzliMmM5YTgtNWNiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kEZIJ4vWzI3BFmE5gtRiYtBVqAuGFMZPqDoTIwU4iFg=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238338/516004921/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzliMmM5YTgtNWNiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kEZIJ4vWzI3BFmE5gtRiYtBVqAuGFMZPqDoTIwU4iFg=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98238339/516004922/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzliMmM5YTgtNWNiMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kEZIJ4vWzI3BFmE5gtRiYtBVqAuGFMZPqDoTIwU4iFg=)

subject: Trump’s Plan to SILENCE Rep. Raskin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
“American carnage is Trump’s legacy”
| | **_Folks, Rep. Jamie Raskin is RIGHT:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/approve_raskin_v2/?source=VPP_20241205_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18143%2E878179%2EDrujAr) Trump has left a TRAIL of destruction behind him since he entered the White House in 2016.

Now that Trump is about to become president again, we know Jamie Raskin is at the top of his list of political enemies!

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m gonna let you in on a little secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Voters aren’t gonna remember who gave the loudest speech opposing Trump’s troll-level nominees.
#
Derek, first it was Matt Gaetz, now it’s Pete Hegseth.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241205?refcode=em20241205-9658&refcode2=9658_434096_1oeBtZ&akid=9658%2E434096%2E1oeBtZ)
**I’m gonna let you in on a little secret:** the shock value is the point. That’s about as obvious as Ron DeSantis wearing lifts in his shoes. 🤯
**We need to tune out the noise and stay focused on the dangerous stuff that could actually happen** , like the Republicans’ plan to destroy Social Security and Medicare to pass more tax cuts for rich guys like Trump.
Or their plan to fire all the career experts in the federal government to replace them with political hacks. What could go wrong there? 🤦♂️
We’ve gotta keep our eyes on the ball, people. In four years voters aren’t gonna remember who gave the loudest speech opposing Trump’s troll-level nominees. **They’re gonna remember whoever stands up for the working class** — and that has to be our focus.
I’m fighting for yinz + youse every single day, Derek. But I’m going to need your help to keep PA and this Senate seat 🔵 over the next few years.
[**Can you help us get a head start on 2025 by pitching in $5 to my campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241205?refcode=em20241205-9658&refcode2=9658_434096_1oeBtZ&akid=9658%2E434096%2E1oeBtZ)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241205?amount=5&refcode=em20241205-9658&refcode2=9658_434096_1oeBtZ&akid=9658%2E434096%2E1oeBtZ)**
Thanks,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241205-9658-footer&t=1&refcode2=9658_434096_1oeBtZ&akid=9658%2E434096%2E1oeBtZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9658%2E434096%2E1oeBtZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9658%2E434096%2E1oeBtZ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=dc184282d04a45fbb23ad803ab299351&_t=OLoHvfOOHn8NYzwMyWEqbfn8OJ2JJQzVr096hBXmRt1z002kRh9Js3yE1ichp8CHkH4_ZcFWCh1jc_voB6lKLs5Kq-iPJ3Sz8-5a3cOSWj4t3HjomKnprAQbu4Vwcynl)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc184282d04a45fbb23ad803ab299351&_e=OTc4ie8w7DNNPNEJtJb8vRdVGe68DxkxW-n_RgjHpNB943glfqjdluXUzmHPO1blRnoz54FTILcUAMX_cpWY2v0vxx38yUqqo8q2hlasDFkCJgkkLqbam_tLoX0xYfvfOxLqXFJMUpUkTZiYLbzmhej-CCiw8bbldlyh97kYSS6U8b9xVl3IrJh8-kf4OnC_QszT2JFh1JX_5frfTcaXSjwqkLvXt5BjfBrTNbBm8TRZB9UZcdhyi8Buu4FukCmlMozvIaNegR7wr-iEfsaSkTyT8a2bOn_qwhlde2n4KdeUfMX7vbvdFzw9kO2a5UkefZf6gltSyl-k8psJ6MHJ3G10qwJgvqYK_eGJrnv3_tl17r2BZvmd_E_8LGsu_DkSsE6F0wbyWg7THo36RIcF3Q%3D%3D)
| |
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc184282d04a45fbb23ad803ab299351&_e=OTc4ie8w7DNNPNEJtJb8vRdVGe68DxkxW-n_RgjHpNB943glfqjdluXUzmHPO1blRnoz54FTILcUAMX_cpWY2v0vxx38yUqqo8q2hlasDFkCJgkkLqbam_tLoX0xYfvfOxLqXFJMUpUkTZiYLbzmhej-CCiw8bbldlyh97kYSS6U8b9xVl3IrJh8-kf4OnC_QszT2JFh1JX_5frfTcaXSjwqkLvXt5BjfBrTNbBm8TRZB9UZcdhyi8Buu4FukCmlJbKuGgLRBPP11IwPKRvsm7QADwV-cIwaMPfk1OgaCyM6NYJbT-Tz-WTznWa81iuN5WOYIbIxC3iSGwEi9qU16hVfFAz3tEqXNUwvrPTDs7ABCaqQkooLPiZAKOVgpMngL-m_OtqTI7dhFJdrmc3jFA%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc184282d04a45fbb23ad803ab299351&_e=OTc4ie8w7DNNPNEJtJb8vRdVGe68DxkxW-n_RgjHpNB943glfqjdluXUzmHPO1blRnoz54FTILcUAMX_cpWY2v0vxx38yUqqo8q2hlasDFkCJgkkLqbam_tLoX0xYfvfOxLqXFJMUpUkTZiYLbzmhej-CCiw8bbldlyh97kYSS6U8b9xVl3IrJh8-kf4OnC_QszT2JFh1JX_5frfTcaXSjwqkLvXt5BjfBrTNbBm8TRZB9UZcdhyi8Buu4FukCmlRqHfzFl4PZ-w8Xi3Qgt-an5R6346mTX9dvP3bogjWXE9iscls9hxvP1aAueJzpP_mRwpJNouqD-PvB3sEIeiI9Z5l_ASAMp39nbVshCny8WwQGt-90g6pTN_PBbjcyrWuCqksTdb2P2azlum5oyOig%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
